title: CRO Specialist & Web Developer
description:
The Mane Attraction is a fast-growing haircare and skincare brand dedicated to helping individuals feel confident through high-quality, results-driven products. As we continue to scale, we’re seeking a data-driven CRO Specialist & Web Developer to optimize our website performance, enhance user experience, and drive revenue growth.



???? Role Overview



We are looking for a results-oriented professional who combines Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) expertise with strong web development skills. This role focuses on analyzing user behavior, implementing data-backed improvements, and maintaining a high-performing, user-friendly e-commerce website. The ideal candidate is both analytical and technically proficient, with experience in Shopify and a passion for the beauty or e-commerce industry.



????? Key Responsibilities

Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)

Analyze website performance using tools such as Google Analytics, Hotjar, and Shopify Analytics.

Identify conversion bottlenecks and recommend data-driven improvements.

Plan, execute, and analyze A/B and multivariate tests.

Optimize landing pages, product pages, and checkout flows to increase conversions and average order value.

Develop strategies to reduce cart abandonment and improve customer retention.

Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) such as conversion rate, bounce rate, and customer journey metrics.

Web Development

Design, develop, and maintain the Shopify website.

Customize Shopify themes using Liquid, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

Implement new features, integrations, and third-party applications.

Ensure website responsiveness, speed optimization, and cross-browser compatibility.

Troubleshoot technical issues and maintain website security.

Collaborate with designers and marketers to implement CRO-driven changes.

? Qualifications

Proven experience as a CRO Specialist, Web Developer, or in a similar role within e-commerce.

Strong proficiency in Shopify and Shopify Liquid.

Solid knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and responsive design.

Experience with A/B testing tools (e.g., Google Optimize, VWO, Optimizely).

Familiarity with Google Analytics (GA4) and heat-mapping tools like Hotjar.

Understanding of SEO best practices and website performance optimization.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

Ability to translate data insights into actionable improvements.

Excellent communication and project management skills.

???? Preferred Qualifications

Experience in the beauty, haircare, or skincare industry.

Familiarity with Shopify Plus.

Knowledge of UX/UI design principles and tools such as Figma or Adobe XD.

Experience with
 and SMS marketing integrations (e.g., Klaviyo).

Basic understanding of API integrations.

???? Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Increase in website conversion rate.

Improvement in average order value (AOV).

Reduction in cart abandonment rate.

Enhanced page load speed and overall site performance.

Growth in revenue attributed to website optimizations.

???? What We Offer

Flexible remote work environment.

Opportunity to work with a fast-growing beauty brand.

Competitive compensation based on experience.

Creative ownership and the ability to make a measurable impact.

Potential for long-term collaboration and career growth.

???? How to Apply



Interested candidates should submit:



Updated resume.

Portfolio or links to previous Shopify or e-commerce projects.

title: Sales Manager
description:
NOTE: This is a direct hiring role.

PLEASE APPLY HERE: 




 builds outbound sales teams for founder-led, bootstrapped, B2B companies ($500K to $5M ARR) in the US and Europe. We need an additional Sales Team Implementation Manager to help us scale.

  

In this role, you’ll lead and manage client sales team implementations end-to-end, while partnering closely with our founder on strategy, priorities, and continuous improvement of our outbound playbook. 



This is a high-ownership seat: part client delivery, part sales operations oversight, and a key right hand to a strategic executive.



The ideal candidate must be a strong sales leader, but also must be able to work with and alongside other strong personalities. Why? 



Your sales leadership experience will allow you to slot directly into this role, since you already know the general management principles of dialing and sales teams. However, you'll be following the 
 playbook and working with the 
 founder to adjust that playbook to the realities of the specific client.



Additionally, you'll be interacting with the founder (or founders) on the client side. If it's not already clear, bootstrapped founders tend to have very strong personalities.



What You’ll Be Doing:

 • Lead outbound sales implementations for a 
 client.

 • Translate our outbound sales playbook into practical hiring, onboarding, metrics, and performance systems for the client.

 • Directly manage offshore dialers and salespeople, maintaining accountability through scorecards and simple performance rhythms.

 • Run performance reviews with the client team, assess progress, and work with the 
 founder to adjust strategy as needed.

 • Work closely with our founder on non-client-facing founder priorities: process upgrades, internal projects, and playbook refinements.

 • Keep implementation projects organized, including timelines, deliverables, handoffs, and documentation.

 • Coordinate meetings, reporting, and other lightweight activities that keep delivery running smoothly.



We’re Looking For Someone Who Has:

 • Four-plus years of outbound B2B sales management experience, as a leader or coach.

 • Strong operational discipline: you like metrics, routines, and making performance visible.

 • Confidence running multiple workstreams without dropping details.

 • A founder-friendly mindset: proactive, structured, reliable, and comfortable with fast shifts.

 

This is a full-time, remote role. Your work hours will need to overlap with 9am to 4pm US Eastern Time. 

We rely heavily on Apple devices, applications, and services. You should have a post-2021 Mac for this job.

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
Job Summary:



 We are looking for a dependable and clear communicator to join our remote team as a Locksmith Sales Support VA. In this role, you will handle inbound customer calls, converting inquiries into job orders while addressing customer needs professionally and efficiently. 





Your key duties will include providing accurate information, offering suitable solutions, and scheduling appointments—all while maintaining a friendly, customer-centric approach. A background in locksmith services, sales, and working in a fast-paced, reactive environment is preferred.





Key Responsibilities:



-Respond to inbound calls regarding locksmith services, delivering precise and timely information to customers.

-Convert customer inquiries into sales by recommending suitable solutions and booking service appointments.

-Utilize CRM tools to log interactions, update customer details, and track lead progress.

-Follow call-handling protocols and use locksmith-specific terminology.

-Manage job orders, including pricing, scheduling, and coordinating technician dispatch.

-Communicate with professionalism and empathy, ensuring a positive customer experience.

-Collaborate with the dispatch and internal teams to resolve issues and ensure prompt service delivery.

-Ensure all customer queries are handled within defined timeframes, meeting service level agreements (SLAs).



Mandatory Skills:



-2+ years of experience in dispatch or locksmith services.

-Experience working in a reactive environment (e.g., responding to urgent, time-sensitive service requests).

-Excellent spoken English with a neutral accent.

-Proven sales experience, particularly in converting inquiries into bookings.

-Strong communication and negotiation skills, with the ability to upsell services when appropriate.

-Familiarity with CRM tools and call management software.

-Ability to remain calm and efficient in a high-call volume environment.

-Reliable internet connection and a quiet, distraction-free workspace.

-Strong attention to detail and adherence to structured processes.





Preferred Skills:



-Prior experience in a call center, dispatch, or customer support role.

-Familiarity with lead tracking or ticketing systems.

-Quick ability to learn new technical or service-related terms.

-Experience working remotely with minimal supervision.

-Knowledge of tools like Syncrorma PBX or custom CRMs (a plus, not required).





Why Join Us:



This fully remote position offers flexibility, structured support, and the chance to work in a performance-driven environment. You'll be part of a team that values clear communication, continuous improvement, and professional growth. With warm leads provided and no cold calling, your focus will be on converting calls into job orders and delivering exceptional service in an organized and supportive environment.

title: HR Generalist
description:
We're a growing behavioral health practice looking for an exceptionally sharp generalist to own our HR and legal support functions. This is a rare hybrid role — part HR manager, part legal assistant, part recruiter, part payroll administrator.



The ideal candidate is likely an attorney with strong HR knowledge, or a senior HR professional with a legal background. Either way, you need to be able to operate across a wide range of responsibilities with minimal oversight and strong attention to compliance and detail.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



RECRUITING & TALENT ACQUISITION

• Source, screen, and reach out to candidates for open roles

• Coordinate and schedule interviews between candidates and leadership

• Draft and post job listings across relevant platforms

• Manage candidate communications and keep hiring pipelines moving

• Onboard new hires and ensure a smooth first-day experience



HR ADMINISTRATION

• Maintain employee records, HR documentation, and personnel files

• Draft and update employment contracts, offer letters, and HR policies

• Handle employee relations matters with professionalism and discretion

• Support performance management processes and documentation

• Ensure HR practices align with applicable employment regulations



PAYROLL & FINANCE SUPPORT

• Run and manage payroll processing on a regular cycle

• Track hours, compensation changes, and payroll records accurately

• Liaise with accounting or finance as needed on payroll-related matters

• Flag discrepancies and ensure timely, accurate payments to staff



LEGAL SUPPORT

• Review and assist with employment-related agreements and documentation

• Research relevant labor laws, compliance requirements, and regulatory updates

• Support leadership on legal questions related to HR and operations

• Assist with credentialing, licensing, or compliance matters specific to behavioral health (a plus)



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

? Attorney or senior HR professional with legal knowledge

? Strong understanding of employment law and HR compliance

? Experience running payroll and managing financial HR records

? Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

? Highly organized with strong attention to detail

? Comfortable working independently across multiple functions

? Discreet and professional — handles sensitive information with care

? Experience in healthcare or behavioral health is a strong plus

? Familiar with US employment practices and regulations

? Proactive communicator who doesn't wait to be micromanaged





TO APPLY



Send us a short introduction covering:

1. Your background — are you an attorney, HR professional, or both?

2. Your experience with payroll systems and which tools you've used

3. Any experience supporting a healthcare or behavioral health organization

4. An example of a complex HR or legal situation you helped resolve

5. Your availability and preferred working hours



Note: This role carries real responsibility across sensitive areas — legal, financial, and people operations. We're looking for someone trustworthy, sharp, and self-directed. If that's you, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Lead Generation VA
description:
Job Summary:



We are on the lookout for a motivated and results-oriented Outbound Sales VA who can take charge of lead outreach and qualification for our high-ticket sales team. This role is ideal for someone with a natural ability to build rapport quickly, identify serious buyers, and convert initial conversations into booked calls. Strong communication, persistence, and CRM discipline are essential.





Key Responsibilities:



- Engage inbound and outbound leads via phone,
, and social media messaging

- Apply defined qualification standards to determine which leads are worth booking

- Coordinate call schedules between qualified prospects and the sales team

- Run systematic follow-ups with leads who need additional touchpoints before committing

- Maintain clean, up-to-date records in the CRM after every interaction

- Counter objections calmly and keep prospects interested and moving forward

- Manage a high daily outreach volume across all assigned communication channels

- Contribute to team efforts around script development and outreach performance

- Achieve individual appointment targets on a weekly and monthly basis





Mandatory Skills:



- Experience in an appointment-setting, SDR, or outbound sales capacity

- Strong spoken and written English with a confident and professional tone

- Proven ability to handle objections and maintain consistent follow-up discipline

- Practical experience using a CRM system to track and manage leads

- Comfort operating across multiple outreach channels simultaneously

- Capable of working independently and managing a results-driven daily schedule

- Detail-oriented, reliable, and accountable for personal performance metrics





Preferred Skills:



- Experience specifically in high-ticket sales environments

- Background in service industries such as coaching, consulting, or agency work

- Knowledge of outreach and automation platforms used in sales prospecting

- Ability to work naturally from scripts without sounding scripted

- Awareness of buyer psychology and what motivates high-value prospects to commit

- Track record of strong show rates and consistent appointment quality





Why Join Us:



This is a role built for someone who is hungry, professional, and ready to make their mark in a high-performance sales environment. You will be part of a team that invests in your success and gives you the structure you need to excel. If you are ready to bring your skills to a role with real earning and growth potential, we encourage you to apply.

This role is essential in ensuring smooth day-to-day operations by managing scheduling, insurance verification, patient communication, and administrative tasks. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, customer-focused, and comfortable working in a fast-paced healthcare environment.



Key Responsibilities



Patient Scheduling & Coordination

Manage provider calendars and optimize daily schedules

Send appointment reminders and follow-ups



Insurance Verification & Billing Support

Communicate coverage details to patients

Assist with prior authorizations and basic billing inquiries



Communication Management



Answer incoming phone calls professionally and promptly

Respond to patient messages via phone,
, and text

Handle general inquiries about services, pricing, and availability

Route clinical questions to appropriate medical staff



Administrative Support



Maintain accurate patient records in EMR/CRM systems

Assist with intake forms and documentation

Track leads and follow up with potential patients

Support daily operational tasks as needed

Qualifications

Previous experience as a virtual assistant or in a healthcare administrative role preferred

Familiarity with insurance verification and medical scheduling

Excellent verbal and written communication skills

Strong organizational and multitasking abilities

Proficient with scheduling software, EMR systems, and basic office tools

Ability to handle sensitive information with confidentiality (HIPAA awareness preferred)



Preferred Skills

Experience in IV therapy, med spa, or wellness clinic settings

Customer service or call center experience

eClinicalWorks EMR System knowledge

What We’re Looking For:

Detail-oriented and dependable

Friendly and patient-focused attitude

Tech-savvy and quick to learn new systems

Ability to work independently and stay organized remotely

title: Ankota Support Specialist I
description:
Ankota Support Specialist I –Home Care & Disability Services Expertise (REMOTE)



Ankota is a home care software provider that helps home care agencies

care for the elderly and disabled for primarily (but not solely) U.S.-based

companies. Among other things, the Ankota software suite supports scheduling,

billing, reporting, client wellbeing, and electronic visit verification for a variety of

services.



Job Description: We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Support

Specialist to join our support team at Ankota. You will play a crucial part in

assisting users with technical inquiries, troubleshooting issues, JIRA development

testing, and ensuring a seamless user experience with our products and services.

You will have the opportunity to develop your technical skills and grow your

career in a supportive environment.



This role requires outstanding English skills,

both written and oral, as well as excellent internet and reliable service.

Experience with home care, Zendesk, and customer service is strongly preferred.

Hours are M-F 10:00 a.m. – 6:30 p.m. EST time zone, which is 5 hours (UTC/GMT?

-5) during standard time and 4 hours (UTC/GMT -4) during the U.S. daylight?

saving time. This includes a half-hour lunch break.



Position Overview:

We are seeking a passionate and experienced Support Specialist to join our

team. This full-time, remote role is designed for someone with a background in

support and preferably also experience within the Home Care industry. You will

be provided training on our software and then you will support customers

through concerns with log-ins, billing, system use, and more. You will also

actively work to test our software and add to our documentation.



If you have hands-on experience in the home care or disability services sector,

excel in customer service, and are tech-savvy with strong analytical skills, we

want to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities:

? Provide front-line support to users by addressing inquiries and resolving

issues via
, chat, and phone

? Document and track support requests in the ticketing system, ensuring

timely follow-up and resolution

? Resolve basic issues with customers

? Assist in the identification and escalation of complex issues to senior team

members or relevant departments

? Test new developments and document the results, as well as answer

development questions

? Maintain up-to-date knowledge of company products and services to

effectively assist users

? Contribute to the creation and maintenance of support documentation,

FAQs, and training materials

? Participate in tea
etings and training sessions to continuously improve

support processes

? Maintain a calm and cheerful demeanor with customers

Qualifications:

? Customer Service Skills: An ability to build trust and strong professional

relationships with customers. Warmth and customer service are our top

non-negotiable criteria.

? Communication: Excellent oral and written communication skills. Many of

our customers are older and require exceptionally clear communication.

? Experience: At least 2 years of experience in the Customer Service

industry.

? Technical Skills: Proficiency in computer software and the ability to learn

new software quickly. JIRA testing experience is a plus.

? Problem-Solving: Strong critical thinking and troubleshooting skills to

address customer challenges.

? Work Style: Self-motivated, organized, and able to work independently in

a remote environment.

What We Offer:

? Remote Work: Work from the comfort of your home.

? Benefits: Competitive salary.

? Purpose-Driven Work: Be part of a mission to empower agencies to

deliver exceptional services to individuals in need.



Why Join Us?

This role is more than a job; it’s an opportunity to make a real impact. By helping

agencies adopt and optimize our software, you’ll be improving the lives of the

people they serve. If you have the passion, expertise, and skills, we look forward

to welcoming you to our team!

title: Real Estate VA (Listing Coordinator)
description:
Are you the detail-oriented, deadline-driven Real Estate Listing Coordinator we’ve been looking for?

We’re hiring a Remote Real Estate Listing Coordinator to support our U.S.-based real estate business. This is a work-from-home position where you’ll manage listings from onboarding to active status, ensure accuracy across platforms, and keep all listing-related tasks on track.



If you’re highly organized, thrive in a fast-paced environment, and enjoy keeping listings compliant and up to date, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities:

- Coordinate new listings from onboarding through activation and updates.

- Enter, manage, and update listings in MLS and other listing platforms.

- Collect, organize, and maintain listing documents, disclosures, and property details.

- Coordinate with agents, sellers, photographers, and vendors.

- Track listing deadlines and ensure compliance with MLS and brokerage requirements.

- Make price changes, status updates, and listing revisions as needed.

- Maintain accurate records and communicate listing updates to the team.



What We’re Looking For:

- Prior experience as a Real Estate Listing Coordinator that worked for A US Real Estate company is a MUST.

- Familiarity with MLS systems and real estate listing workflows.

- Fluent in spoken & written English (must keep up with natural conversation).

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

- Tech-savvy and comfortable working across multiple tools and platforms.

- Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision.



What You’ll Gain:

- A long-term, remote role with stable workload.

- Opportunity to work closely with a U.S.-based real estate team.

- Hands-on experience managing real estate listings end-to-end.

- Meaningful work where your accuracy and organization directly impact success.



Apply Now:

Submit your application here:

title: Virtual Executive Assistant
description:
I'm the founder of a digital growth marketing company that helps mission-driven founders scale their businesses with more ease & less overwhelm - and I'm looking for a small team of highly-skilled Executive Assistants to help take over the marketing and management tasks that make a huge difference in the lives of the people that hire us.



I'm looking for a max of 5 amazing executive assistants available for part-time (potential for full time) with a salary starting at $500 USD per month and with long term success and robust training, moving up to $700 USD per month as an emerging leader in the company.



If you have the following skill sets, I encourage you to apply:



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:

- Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in Digital Marketing, Video Editing, Social Media Management, Content Creation, and Executive Assistant Work (Administrative Tasks, Calendar &
 Management, etc)

You’re trusted to manage marketing deliverables while providing high-level executive support, keeping priorities organized, systems moving, and leadership focused on growth instead of day-to-day execution. You've done it all from managing schedules to
 & calendar management. You have a meticulous eye for detail where Prioritization and Organization are your love language



-- 1+ years of experience in Sales Funnels and Shopify

You're a professional who is passionate about helping changemakers simplify their lives by setting up systems that will allow them to operate their businesses with more ease and less overwhelm. You have experience with sales funnel and CRM software



- 1+ years of experience advertising on platforms like Instagram,
, Tik Tok, within a Marketing team consisting of Paid Acquisition, Organic Marketing, Customer Retention, & Product Marketing

You're an emerging leader who has the potential to head a team in the future that will report directly to you. Having leadership experience is a MAJOR plus



- Creating SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)

You’ll ensure each business function has detailed documentation for repeatable and scalable growth if it isn't already place. If you see gaps, you take the initiative to fill them and produce results without anyone knowing there was an issue (yea, all that and a bag of chips :-)



- Experience working at a digital/online product/platform: You’re familiar with online courses, digital products & platforms and popular tools in the business space ranging from landing page builders and
 service providers to CRMs, and course hosting platforms aren’t foreign to you (We teach tools like Shopify, Convertkit, Kajabi, Teachable, Learnworlds, Calendly, etc)



ABOUT YOU:

- “You down with SOP? Yeah you know me!”—You’re an advocate for SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) to make our systems repeatable & scalable.

- Your love language is processes & predictable, meteoric growth. We never question company progress towards the quarterly and yearly goals because you keep real-time metrics for all projects.

- You’re aware of new software and can look at current systems and identify how to automate tasks a company has been doing manually for months.

- You’re addicted to digital processes & automation in the world of social media because you love building connections in the digital space and you’ve seen how powerful it can be in business growth

- You’re driven by metrics & tracking. You know that you can’t improve something unless you measure it, so you develop ways to measure performance so your company is always predictably improving.

- Timeliness and deadlines are your jam. When we have a team call at 10:00am, you show up at 9:55am. When the deadline is Tuesday at 5:30pm, you have it done Monday.

- You overcommunicate clearly and confidently. If you agree/disagree with something, you communicate that without hesitation or overthinking. You’re no stranger to asking why we do things a certain way to ensure we’re intentional with our resources.

- You’re a leader and team player. Ego? What ego? If something needs to be done, you dive in to make sure all critical tasks are accounted and cared for.



If you’re nodding your head “Yes” to the above, proceed below to apply.



PERKS:

I'm committed to setting our staff up for success with access to trainings that will certify your skills in:

- Task & Calendar Management

- Launch/Sales Strategy Planning

- Sales Funnel Tech Setup (For E-Commerce or Service Based Businesses)

- Social Media Management

- Digital Media Marketing (Including
 and SMS Marketing)

- Lead Generation



After one week of training and assessment, you're officially certified under our internal training program, which means hitting the ground running with your new skills. Perks include:

- Part time work hours

- Work from anywhere in the world (as long as your internet signal is strong and computer is fast)

- Starting Salary at $500 USD a month ($6000 USD annual)

- Internal certification program to enhance your professional skills in your career (I have helped clients amass at least $10M from the same digital growth marketing strategies I will require you to learn)



Interested? Please reply to this post with the secret keyword "APPLES" so I know you can pay attention to detail - from there, I'll let you know next steps if you qualify.

title: AI-Enabled Direct Response Marketer — Creative Strategist
description:
Prolific Media LLC | Remote (US)

You're not a prompt engineer. You're not a media buyer. You're a direct response creative strategist who happens to use AI as your primary production layer.



Role Overview

You'll spend your days concepting, building, and iterating ad creative — static images, video hooks, advertorials, landing pages, VSLs — for DTC brands running paid social at scale. The difference is that instead of briefing a design team and waiting 5 days, you generate output yourself using AI tools (Nano Banana / Gemini for images, Sora / Kling for video, Claude for copy and strategy, Creatify for UGC-style clips). You move fast, you test constantly, and you think in terms of hooks, angles, and personas — not aesthetics for aesthetics' sake.



What you'll actually do:



Develop ad creative concepts rooted in direct response principles — not brand guidelines committees

Generate production-ready static ad images using AI image generation tools (primarily Nano Banana 2 / Higgsfield / Gemini pipeline)

Write and produce AI-generated UGC-style video ads, talking head hooks, and product demos

Build and iterate on advertorials, listicles, and landing pages that convert cold traffic

Reverse-engineer winning competitor creative and adapt it for our clients

Maintain and evolve prompt libraries, creative skill files, and production SOPs

Collaborate directly with the media buyer to close the feedback loop between creative performance data and new concepts

Run 10–20+ new creative variations per week per client — volume with intent, not volume for volume's sake



You're a fit if:



You have real direct response experience — you understand hooks, mechanisms, belief installation, and why "awareness" isn't a KPI

You've used AI image and video generation tools in production, not just played around with them

You can look at a Meta Ad Library pull and immediately identify what's working and why

You think in frameworks: AIDA, PAS, unique mechanism, problem-agitate-solve — and you can map those to visual creative, not just copy

You're comfortable with Claude, ChatGPT, or similar LLMs as daily working tools — writing prompts, building workflows, iterating on outputs

You have taste. AI gives you speed, but you still know what good looks like.

You can context-switch across 3–5 DTC clients without losing the thread on any of them



Bonus points:



Experience with Meta media buying (you understand what the buyer needs from you)

Familiarity with VSL structure and long-form sales copy

You've built or contributed to a prompt library, skill system, or creative SOP doc

You've worked in supplements, health/wellness, or high-AOV DTC

You know what a "chaos realism" UGC prompt is and why it matters

What we don't care about:



Your degree

Whether you can use Figma (though it's fine if you can)

Whether you've held the title "Creative Strategist" before — we care if you think like one

title: Senior Customer Experience Associate
description:
## About HAVN



HAVN is a science-backed apparel brand on a mission to make protecting your health as effortless as getting dressed. We design and develop EMF radiation-protective clothing that allows people to enjoy the benefits of modern technology without compromising their long-term wellbeing.



We exist at the intersection of health, innovation, and everyday wearability. From EMF-protective basics to specialized garments for sleep, recovery, and reproductive health, HAVN is building a category — and a community — around the belief that prevention is the most powerful tool we have. With over 5,300 five-star reviews and a growing presence across men's, women's, and children's lines, we are scaling quickly and looking for exceptional people to grow with us.



---



## About the Role



We’re looking for a fully remote Customer Service Representative who thrives in a fast-paced environment. In this role, you will be the voice of our brand, delivering an exceptional e-commerce experience. The ideal candidate is proactive, detail-oriented, and highly communicative. You will encourage a service mentality with a dedication to elevating the client experience.



---



## What You Will Do



- Manage a high-volume support inbox and ticket queue across all channels 
, chat, social), responding to every inquiry in a timely, clear, and on-brand manner.

- Handle all order management processes within Shopify, tracking, returns, exchanges, shipping inquiries, and fulfillment-related requests, with accuracy and attention to detail.

- Resolve complaints and escalations with a solution-oriented mindset, turning challenges into opportunities to strengthen customer loyalty.

- Coordinate with internal teams (logistics, fulfillment, operations) to address issues efficiently and maintain smooth workflows end to end.

- Maintain accurate records of all customer interactions, feedback, and resolutions in the CRM/helpdesk system to ensure data integrity and continuity.

- Develop deep product knowledge to provide confident, informed guidance to customers across the full HAVN catalog.

- Ensure all communications consistently reflect the HAVN brand voice, tone, and values across every touchpoint and platform.

- Proactively identify gaps and inefficiencies in customer service workflows and recommend process improvements to leadership.

- Support cross-selling opportunities where relevant, connecting customers with products that genuinely meet their needs.

- Track and aim to exceed individual KPIs, including response time, resolution rate, and CSAT, contributing to team performance goals.



---



## Required Experience and Qualifications



- Minimum 2–3 years of customer service experience in an e-commerce or retail environment.

- Native or C2-level English fluency — exceptional written and verbal communication is essential.

- Advanced proficiency with Shopify, including order management, refunds, exchanges, and customer data handling.

- Hands-on experience with a CRM and/or helpdesk/ticketing platform (Richpanel, Zendesk, or similar).

- Genuinely warm, empathetic, and patient communicator — someone who brings calm and care to every interaction, including during peak seasons or difficult conversations.

- Proven ability to manage a high-volume workload with accuracy, organization, and attention to detail.

- Experience managing carrier claims, lost package investigations, and 3PL-related escalations.

- Ability to follow SOPs while exercising independent judgment when situations require it.

- Comfortable operating in a fast-paced, growth-oriented environment with evolving priorities.



---



## Preferred Qualifications



- Familiarity with G-suite and/or basic data entry and reporting tools.

- Experience with
 marketing platforms or basic CRM automation (Klaviyo or similar).

- Background in apparel, wellness, or health-focused brands.

- Passion for or understanding of health, EMF awareness, or wellness is a plus.



---



## Additional Information



- Full-time availability (40 hours/week).

- Must work in Eastern Standard Time (EST), Monday–Friday.

- Reliable internet connection and ability to join virtual meetings.

title: Graphic Designer and Illustrator
description:
Job Title: Graphic Designer & Illustrator



Job Overview

We are seeking a skilled Graphic Designer and Illustrator to create visually compelling designs across print and digital formats. This role requires strong design fundamentals, illustration capability, and advanced proficiency in Adobe InDesign and Adobe Illustrator. The ideal candidate has a sharp eye for layout, typography, and color, and can translate creative concepts into polished, production-ready assets.

Key Responsibilities

• Design high-quality layouts for print and digital materials, including books, marketing assets, educational content, and branded materials  

• Create original illustrations and vector artwork to support storytelling, branding, and instructional content  

• Prepare files for print production, ensuring accuracy in bleed, trim, color profiles, and export settings  

• Collaborate with editors, content creators, and project managers to interpret creative briefs and meet project goals  

• Revise and refine designs based on feedback while maintaining brand consistency  

• Organize and manage design files, templates, and assets for efficient reuse and updates  

• Meet deadlines while managing multiple projects simultaneously  

Required Skills & Qualifications

• Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite, with advanced expertise in InDesign and Illustrator  

• Strong understanding of layout design, typography, color theory, and visual hierarchy  

• Demonstrated illustration skills (vector and/or hand-drawn styles)  

• Experience preparing files for professional printing and digital distribution  

• Ability to follow style guides while also contributing creative ideas  

• Strong attention to detail and quality control  

• Excellent time-management and communication skills  

Preferred Qualifications

• Experience designing books, educational materials, or children’s content  

• Familiarity with accessibility-friendly design practices  

• Working knowledge of Adobe Photoshop  

• Experience with multilingual layouts or text-heavy documents  

Work Style

• Self-directed and reliable  

• Comfortable working independently or as part of a collaborative team  

• Open to feedback and iterative design processes

title: Graphic Designer and Illustrator
description:
Graphic Artist & Illustrator – Job Description



Position Type: Full-Time or Part-Time

Location: Remote or On-Site (EST collaboration required)

Reports To: Creative Director



About the Role



We are seeking a talented and creative Graphic Artist & Illustrator with strong design skills and proficiency in the Adobe Creative Suite, including Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, and related tools. The ideal candidate will have experience designing for children’s books, educational materials, digital assets, and print media, and demonstrate a keen eye for detail, color, composition, and storytelling through visuals.



Key Responsibilities



Create original illustrations and graphics for children’s books, story layouts, worksheets, and marketing materials.



Design and format print-ready and digital book files using Adobe InDesign.



Develop visual assets for social media, video projects, product branding, and presentations.



Conceptualize and execute art direction based on scripts, storyboards, and creative briefs.



Collaborate with the creative team to maintain consistent brand identity and visual style across projects.



Prepare files for production, publishing platforms, and digital distribution.



Revise and refine artwork based on feedback in a timely and professional manner.



Maintain organized project files and adhere to version control and naming conventions.



Qualifications



Proven experience as a Graphic Designer, Illustrator, or Layout Artist, preferably in children’s media or publishing.



Advanced proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign.



Strong illustration skills (digital drawing, character design, playful and clean style preferred).



Ability to format and export high-quality print and digital files.



Understanding of typography, layout composition, and color theory.



Strong communication skills and ability to work collaboratively in a fast-paced creative environment.



Bonus Skills (Not Required but a Plus):



Experience with Adobe Animate, After Effects, Premiere Pro, or Canva.



Knowledge of 2D/3D animation or motion graphics.



Experience in educational content or children’s publishing.



Soft Skills



Detail-oriented with excellent time management.



Positive, creative, and solution-focused mindset.



Comfortable receiving feedback and iterating quickly.



Strong written communication and ability to clearly label and organize project files.



Work Hours & Collaboration



Must be available to communicate and collaborate during EST business hours.



Open to remote work with consistent check-ins and milestone deadlines.

title: Graphic Designer and Animator
description:
Job Title: Graphic Designer & Animator – Adobe Creative Suite Expert



Company: Twin Sisters Digital Media

Location: Remote (Must be available during EST business hours)

Position Type: Full-Time or Part-Time (Open to both)



About the Role

Twin Sisters Digital Media, a leading creator of children’s educational content, is seeking a highly creative Graphic Designer & Animator proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, After Effects, Premiere Pro, etc.). This role involves designing visuals and animations for children’s books, educational videos, social media content, and digital learning assets.



The ideal candidate is not just a designer but a visual storyteller with exceptional written communication skills, capable of collaborating and presenting ideas clearly in a digital team environment.



Key Responsibilities

- Design and layout children’s books, worksheets, and digital learning materials

- Create engaging 2D and 3D animations for video content, reels, and interactive media

- Illustrate and develop original character art and playful visual assets for kids’ content

- Design high-conversion social media graphics and animated posts

- Work closely with the creative team to maintain brand consistency and storytelling tone

- Prepare production-ready files for digital publishing and marketing

- Participate in creative brainstorming and provide input on visual concepts and animation style

- Communicate clearly and meet deadlines aligned to Eastern Standard Time



Required Skills & Qualifications

- Expert proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite: Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, After Effects, Premiere Pro (additional tools like Animate or Character Animator are a plus)

) is a plus

- Familiarity with audio synchronization and motion graphics for educational songs or stories

- Knowledge of preparing content for digital platforms and eBook publishing

- Experience in storyboarding, character development, and simple animatics



Compensation & Schedule

- Competitive rate based on experience and portfolio

title: Tekken 8 Video Editor
description:
BROAD SCOPE

We are seeking a Video Editor for our client who is a high-level competitive Tekken 8 player who regularly matches against top North American pros in ranked. You will receive one raw gameplay recording and a written brief. You will edit this into one polished YouTube highlight video (30–45 minutes).



You will select the best matches from the recording based on the brief, cut dead air and queue time, build pacing, add text overlays and basic motion graphics, and add the correct Tekken 8 stage music to every match. The raw VOD does not have music — adding the right music is a core part of this job.



CORE OBJECTIVES

- Select Matches — Review the full VOD and select matches for the final video based on the brief provided.

- Edit and Pace the Video — Cut dead air and queue time. Build pacing that holds a viewer for the full video length.

- Add Tekken 8 Stage Music — Add the correct OST track to every match based on the stage. Switch to the climax version at the correct 
nt.

- Add Overlays and Graphics — Add text overlays, lower thirds, and motion graphics as specified in the brief.



EXPANDED OBJECTIVES

Select Matches:

- Watch the full VOD and identify which matches belong in the final video based on the brief.

- Deliver a final video that fills 30–45 minutes with the strongest content from the session.



Edit and Pace the Video:

- Cut queue time, character select screens, and downtime as directed by the brief.

- Structure the video so the pacing holds a viewer’s attention from start to finish.



Add Tekken 8 Stage Music:

- Identify the stage in each match and add the matching Tekken 8 OST track.

- Switch to the climax version of the track when a player is one round from winning the game.

- Keep music transitions clean between rounds and between matches.



Add Overlays and Graphics:

- Add opponent names, character names, rank displays, or other context as specified in the brief.

- Follow any brand references or formatting provided.



REQUIREMENTS

- Understanding of the Tekken 8 competitive scene. You play or actively follow Tekken 8. You can identify stages by sight and recognize top NA players by name or tag.

- Knowledge of Tekken 8’s stage music system. You know which OST track goes with which stage and when the climax version triggers.

- Work experience editing video content. Proficient in DaVinci Resolve and/or Adobe Premiere Pro. Own workstation capable of handling 1080p/4K footage.

- Understanding of YouTube long-form pacing and retention.

- Strong communication skills in English.



TEST SAMPLE

The sample stream and brief below are what you will use to complete your application. Read the brief, skim the stream, then complete items 2 and 3 in the How to Apply section.



Stream:





The clip is raw ranked gameplay of Hidetone with multiple matches against Raigeki with no music. Dead air and queue time are included. This is intentional.



Brief:

This is a deathmatch session in Tekken 8. Hidetone is running a long set against Raigeki. The video should be a highlight reel of the best matches from the session — the ones that would make a Tekken viewer want to keep watching. Keep the test edit to 90–120 seconds. Add the correct stage music (normal and climax versions) to each match.



HOW TO APPLY

 your application to the provided
 with the subject line: "[Hidetone Video Editor Gig] Your Name"

Your application must include all three of the following. Applications missing any item or not following these exact instructions will not be reviewed.



1. Resume (PDF) and portfolio link if you have one.

Attach your resume as a PDF. Portfolio or links to past edits are optional but strongly recommended.



2. A Google Sheet analyzing the sample clip.

Watch the sample clip and read the brief. Create a Google Sheet with exactly these column headers:

- Opponent Name / Gamer Tag

- Opponent Character

- Stage

- Clip Timestamp (Start)

- Clip Timestamp (End)

- What Happens

- Why This Match Should Be in the Final Video

- Stage Music Track (Normal & Climax)

- Identify at least 3 matches. Fill in all columns. Explain in 1–2 sentences why each match belongs in the final edit. List the correct stage music track for each match.

- The first cell in your Google Sheet (A1) must contain the word “Hansei.”

- Share the link. Make sure it is set to “Anyone with the link can view.”



3. A test edit of the same sample clip.

- Edit the footage into a 90–120 second YouTube-ready highlight reel. Show your pacing, your cuts, your ability to make Tekken matches land for a viewer, and your ability to add the correct stage music (including climax transitions). 

- Upload to Google Drive or Dropbox and share the link.



Applications that do not follow every instruction above will not be considered.

title: Sales Setter — SaaS Startup (Aesthetics Industry)
description:
About the company

Flõu is a brand new SaaS platform launching in 2026, built specifically for aesthetic and beauty clinic owners in the UK. We help clinics get new clients automatically, keep them coming back, and build monthly recurring income through memberships. We are in pre-launch and actively signing up founding members right now.

This is a ground-floor opportunity to join a fast-moving startup and grow with it.

What you will be doing

Your job is simple: find the right clinic owners and get them on a call with our closer.

Day to day this means researching and identifying aesthetic and beauty clinic owners in the UK through Instagram,
, LinkedIn, and Google. Sending warm, personalised outreach messages via DM and
 introducing Flõu. Following up with leads who have registered interest on our website but have not yet booked a call. Qualifying leads by asking a few simple questions to confirm they are the right fit. Booking confirmed calls directly into the closer's calendar. Tracking all activity in Zoho CRM and updating lead statuses daily.

You will not be expected to close sales. Your job ends when a qualified call is booked.



What we are looking for



You have done outbound sales or appointment setting before, ideally for a SaaS or online business. You write English fluently and naturally your messages need to sound like a real person, not a template. You are organised, consistent, and can hit a daily outreach target without being chased. You are comfortable using CRM tools  we use Zoho. You have a reliable internet connection and are available during UK business hours, or at least have significant overlap.

Experience in the beauty, aesthetics, or wellness industry is a big bonus but not essential.



What we offer

Monthly base salary to start. Performance bonus paid per founding member confirmed structure shared at interview. Fully remote, work from anywhere. Direct access to the founder. Real opportunity to grow into a senior sales role as the platform scales.



To apply

Please do not send a generic application. Instead send us a short paragraph  5 to 8 sentences  written as if you are reaching out to a UK aesthetic clinic owner on Instagram to introduce Flõu.

title: Hiring SEO Content Master to Lead Small Team (Full-Time, Long-Term)
description:
We are a fast-growing national software company serving customers across the United States. We are now investing heavily in SEO-driven content to scale our organic traffic, generate qualified leads, and strengthen our authority in our niche.



Role Overview

We are looking for an experienced SEO Content Master to own our content strategy and lead a small team of writers and editors. Your mission is simple and measurable: plan and execute a content system that consistently grows organic traffic, rankings, and conversions for our software products. You should be both strategic and hands-on: you know how to build a content roadmap from keyword data, brief and coach writers, edit for quality and SEO, and then track performance in tools like Google Search Console and Google Analytics.



Key Responsibilities

Develop and own an SEO content strategy focused on growing qualified organic traffic for our software products (national US market).

Build and manage a content calendar for blogs, landing pages, and knowledge base content.

Perform keyword research, clustering, and mapping to topics and pages using SEO tools.

Create detailed SEO content briefs (search intent, structure, headings, internal links, FAQs, calls to action).

Lead and coach a small remote team of writers and editors: assign tasks, review drafts, enforce standards, and give feedback.

Edit and optimize content for on-page SEO (titles, meta descriptions, H1–H3, internal links, schema suggestions, image alt tags).

Continuously update and improve existing content to protect and grow rankings.

Monitor performance (traffic, rankings, click-through rate, conversions) and report progress with clear KPIs and insights.

Stay updated on Google algorithm changes and SEO and content best practices and turn them into action.



Requirements

Proven experience growing organic traffic through SEO content (please share specific results, case studies, or before and after screenshots).



Strong understanding of SEO fundamentals: keyword research, on-page optimization, search intent, internal linking, and basic technical SEO.

Excellent written English and strong editing skills; you can refine drafts into clear, engaging, conversion-focused content.

Experience leading or coordinating a small content team (writers, editors, or VA support).

Comfortable working with tools such as Google Search Console, Google Analytics, and SEO platforms such as Ahrefs or Semrush.



Data-driven mindset: you make decisions from numbers, not guesses, and you can explain what is working and what is not.

Stable internet connection and ability to work during partial US business hours for alignment and check-ins.

Nice to Have



Experience with B2B or SaaS or software content.

Familiarity with basic conversion rate optimization (improving conversions from existing traffic).

Experience with content briefs and SOP creation for scaling a content team.



What We Offer

Long-term, stable role with a growing US software company.

Competitive salary (fixed monthly, paid on time) with performance-based increases as we hit traffic and lead targets.

Clear KPIs and autonomy: we agree on targets, then you own the plan and execution.

Support from leadership that understands SEO and is committed to investing in content.



How to Apply

Please send:

A short introduction explaining why you are a strong fit for a SEO Content Master leadership role via
.

Use the subject line: SEO Content Master – [Your Name]



Two to three examples of projects where you grew organic traffic (include metrics and screenshots if possible).

A link to your LinkedIn profile and portfolio (blog posts, content hubs, landing pages, and similar work).

Your expected monthly salary in USD and your availability (hours per week and preferred schedule).

title: Sales Closer — SaaS Startup (Aesthetics Industry UK)
description:
About the company

Flõu is a SaaS platform launching in 2026 for independent aesthetic and beauty clinic owners in the UK. We solve three problems every clinic owner faces getting new clients, keeping them coming back, and building monthly membership income. We are currently signing founding members at a special introductory price before we open to the public.

This is a startup at an exciting stage. The product is proven, the audience is warm, and we need a closer who can convert qualified conversations into paying customers.



What you will be doing

You will take booked discovery calls with UK clinic owners who have already expressed interest in Flõu. On each call you will ask three key questions to understand their clinic, identify which problems Flõu solves for them specifically, present the founding member offer clearly and confidently, handle objections, and ask for the close. After a successful close you will send the Stripe payment link immediately on the call, confirm the deal in Zoho CRM, and brief the onboarding team.

You will be given a full sales script, objection handler document, and product training before your first call. You will not be starting from cold.





What we are looking for

You have closed sales on video or phone calls before, ideally for a SaaS, coaching, or digital product. You are confident, warm, and consultative  this is not a hard sell, it is a problem-solution conversation. You listen more than you talk. You handle objections calmly without being pushy. You follow a script but can adapt when the conversation requires it. You are fluent in spoken and written English. You are available for calls during UK business hours typically Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm UK time.

Previous experience selling to small business owners, clinic owners, or in the health and beauty space is highly desirable.



What we offer

 monthly base salary to start. Commission paid per founding member confirmed structure shared at interview, but this role has strong earning potential as volume grows. Fully remote. Full product training and a proven sales script provided. Direct mentorship from the founder. Real progression as Flõu scales.



To apply

Please do not send a generic application. Record a short 60 to 90 second Loom video introducing yourself and telling us about a sale you are proud of closing what the product was, what the objection was, and how you handled it. Send the Loom link with your application.Applications without a video will not be reviewed.

title: Security Operations Specialist
description:
Role Overview

American Medical Compliance is seeking a highly detail-oriented Security Operations Specialist to support our cybersecurity and regulatory compliance initiatives. In this role, you will act as the primary executor of our security and compliance controls, working directly with the CISO in a Maker-Checker framework. You will be responsible for performing critical administrative tasks, maintaining security systems, and generating audit-ready evidence to support our SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, and HIPAA compliance.



Job Details:

Schedule: Mondays to Fridays; 8 AM to 4 PM Mountain Standard Time

Work type: Full-time; Work from Home set-up

Start Date: ASAP



Key Responsibilities (Maker Functions)

• Compliance Evidence Generation

Execute and document technical controls required for SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, and HIPAA, including: 

o Access log reviews 

o Encryption verification 

o Audit trail validation 

• Jira Administration

Serve as the primary administrator for Jira: 

o Design and maintain workflows 

o Configure permission schemes 

o Manage service desk projects 

o Ensure all IT and compliance activities are properly tracked and auditable 

• User Lifecycle Management

Manage provisioning and de-provisioning of user access across systems: 

o Enforce the Principle of Least Privilege 

o Ensure compliance with HIPAA access control standards 

• Infrastructure Administration

Support cloud and on-prem environments by: 

o Performing credential rotations 

o Applying security patches 

o Monitoring system health and availability 

• Security Documentation & Audit Readiness

Maintain a centralized audit evidence repository: 

o Capture screenshots, logs, and reports 

o Ensure all activities are properly documented for external audits 

• Administrative & Security Operations Support

Perform day-to-day IT and security administrative tasks while ensuring: 

o Full traceability of actions 

o Proper documentation for CISO review and approval 



Required Qualifications

• Experience 

o At least 2+ years of experience in a Security Operations, IT Administration, or Compliance-focused role 

o Hands-on experience supporting SOC 2, ISO 27001, and/or HIPAA environments 

• Jira Expertise 

o Strong experience in Jira administration 

o Ability to build workflows, manage permissions, and configure custom fields 

• Security & Compliance Knowledge 

o Solid understanding of: 

? Data privacy and protection 

? Risk management practices 

? Security controls in healthcare or regulated environments 

• Documentation & Attention to Detail 

o Strong documentation discipline 

o Ability to produce audit-ready evidence consistently 

• Audit Support Experience 

o Experience preparing for or supporting third-party audits is highly preferred 



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience working in healthcare, BPO, or compliance-driven environments 

• Familiarity with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, or GCP) 

• Relevant certifications (e.g., Security+, ISO 27001, or similar) are a plus

title: Sales Strategist
description:
Job Description: Sales Strategist (Growth-Focused)



Overview

We are a growing digital marketing agency seeking a Sales Strategist to design, execute, and continuously improve our sales generation systems. This is a high-ownership, hands-on role that combines strategic planning with direct execution.



We are specifically looking for someone who wants to grow with the company long-term. As revenue scales and systems mature, this role is intended to evolve into a senior sales leadership position with increased compensation, authority, and responsibility.



This role is fully remote and intended for candidates based in the Philippines.



Key Responsibilities



• Develop and refine outbound sales strategies to generate consistent new business

• Define ideal customer profiles (ICPs), target industries, and buyer personas

• Design and execute outbound funnels (cold
, LinkedIn outreach, partnerships, follow-ups)

• Research and build high-quality lead lists using appropriate tools

• Create, test, and optimize messaging, scripts, and sales cadences

• Execute outreach campaigns and manage active prospect conversations

• Qualify prospects and book or conduct sales calls

• Maintain accurate CRM records and pipeline reporting

• Analyze campaign performance and continuously improve conversion rates

• Collaborate with leadership on positioning, offer refinement, and growth planning



Performance Expectations



• Consistent generation of qualified sales opportunities

• Measurable improvement in response, conversion, and close rates

• Ownership of testing, experimentation, and documented learnings

• Contribution to scalable and repeatable sales systems

• Increasing revenue contribution over time



Compensation



Base Pay:

$10 per hour



High performers will see total compensation grow significantly as deal volume increases. As the company scales, compensation structure and leadership opportunities will expand accordingly.



Qualifications

• Proven experience in outbound sales, business development, or sales strategy

• Strong written and verbal English communication skills

• Comfortable with cold outreach and handling rejection

• Ability to work independently and take full ownership of results

• Familiarity with CRM systems and sales automation tools

• Experience working with digital marketing or service-based businesses is a strong advantage



Work Arrangement

• Part-time, remote position

• Philippines-based candidates preferred

• Long-term opportunity with leadership growth potential



Why Join Root Pages?

We Value You & Your Time

Your best work happens when you feel supported, rested, and respected. We are committed to creating an environment where you can thrive both professionally and personally. Work-life balance is encouraged and protected.



Paid Time Off & Holidays

• 12 Paid Philippine Holidays

• 1 Paid Company Holiday

• 7 Paid Sick Days (Accrued)



Flexible Scheduling

Life requires flexibility. We accommodate reasonable schedule adjustments when possible. With advance notice and manager approval, we work together to support both your personal responsibilities and team performance.



Weathering Storms Together

During extreme weather events, we provide active support to ensure stability for you and your family. Your well-being remains a priority in every season.



Growth Opportunity

This role offers long-term growth potential as the company scales. High performers may advance into senior client success or operations leadership positions.



How to Apply

Please include your resume, a short paragraph explaining why you are a strong fit, an example of how you improved communication or processes in a previous role, your expected hourly rate (PHP), and the word 'Coordinator' in your subject line.

title: Sales CLOSER (Aesthetic / SKIN Industry)
description:
Sales Closer (Remote)

Skin & Aesthetics Education Brand



We’re building something very intentional in the skin space.



Not another course.

Not surface-level education.



We’re focused on raising the standard of skin professionals through advanced, results-driven education that actually changes how they work, how they think, and how they grow their businesses.



Our core program, the Online Skin Masters Course, is designed for professionals who are ready to move beyond basic treatments and step into true skin expertise.



This is where you come in.



The Role



This is a closing-focused role.



You’ll be working closely alongside our lead generation team and appointment setters, who are consistently feeding warm, pre-qualified calls into your diary.



Your role is to take those conversations and lead them properly.



You’ll be:



Speaking to booked calls each day

Running a structured, proven sales process

Leading with confidence while keeping the conversation natural

Understanding the client’s current challenges and goals

Positioning the course as a solution based on where they are

Handling objections and closing with clarity



All calls are live, and managed through our CRM system (Zoho).



How We Work



We already have lead generation in place.



We already have appointment setters booking calls.



You’re stepping into a system designed to support you in closing at a high level.



At the same time, this is not a passive role.



During quieter periods, we expect you to take ownership of your pipeline and proactively generate additional opportunities through outreach. This could include re-engaging past leads, following up conversations, or initiating new ones.



The strongest closers don’t wait. They build.



Who This Is For



You’re someone who is comfortable on calls.



You know how to build trust quickly, ask the right questions, and guide a conversation without forcing it.



You understand that closing isn’t about pressure. It’s about clarity.



You likely have experience in:



High-ticket sales or closing

Online coaching or course sales

Consultative sales environments



You’re confident asking for the sale, and you’re motivated by performance and earning potential.



Structure & Earning Potential



We’re open depending on the right person:



Hourly + commission

or

Commission-based



Alongside this, we offer strong commission and performance-based bonuses on top, rewarding consistency, quality conversations, and results.



There is serious earning potential here for the right person.



We’re not building one brand.

We’re building an ecosystem across skin, aesthetics, wellness and education.



This role has long-term opportunity for someone who wants to grow with us.



How to Apply



If this feels aligned, I’d love to hear from you.



Please send:



A short voice note introducing yourself

Your experience in sales or closing

Your expected rate or commission structure

title: M&A Associates
description:
Job description

We help Americans unlock wealth and free themselves from the corporate day-to-day grind through acquisition. We're a rapidly growing firm and we're looking for an M&A Associate to join our lean, remote team to help our clients in processing deals.



We're fast growing and you'll have ample career growth opportunities as we continue to scale.



Your Main Responsibilities:

We're looking for a M&A Associate who'll work with our client's deals to take the information we've organized for them to:

1) Deal Sourcing & Inquiry - Proactively identify potential deal listings that align with partner preferences or investment criteria.

2) NDA Management - Obtain and manage Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs) to access confidential deal information.

3) Partner
 Management - Organize and label
s, flag important messages for follow-up, and ensure no key correspondence is missed.

4) Document Management (CIM & Financials) - Once an NDA is executed, collect the Confidential Information Memorandum (CIM) and related financials from the broker.

5) Broker Communication & Relationship Management - Maintain consistent, professional communication with brokers to gather information, follow up on inquiries, and track deal status.

6) Scheduling Broker Intro Calls - Schedule introductory calls between brokers and designated tea
mbers



You MUST Have:

- Experience analyzing deals both in terms of numbers and business operations, the numbers and financials are a small, small piece of it.

You Should Have:

- 1+ year experience working in a relevant role (M&A, investment banking, accounting, private equity, etc)

- Some financial analysis exposure and want to learn more

- Some experience in presenting a deal and reviewing a deal

- A strong communication skills (verbal and written)

- A strong self-starter mindset to improve your skills and strive to be better

- Excellent analytical skills

- Intellectual curiosity and rigor



What We Offer:

- An essential role that will grow to managing a team

- The opportunity to take part in equity and profit sharing in our growing firm

- Work from anywhere

title: Customer Success Representative (Remote – Pacific Time) Not BPO/Contract!
description:
Join the WISE Team at IQ Total Source!



Hey there, superstar! 



Looking for more than just another remote customer service job? At IQ Total Source, we’re not your typical BPO or call center — we’re a people-first, fun-loving, fast-growing team delivering what we call the Wildly Insane Service Experience (WISE) every single day.



We believe great service starts with great people — and that includes YOU. 



*********Why You’ll Love Working With Us**********

At IQ Total Source, culture isn’t just a buzzword — it’s our superpower.

We work hard, laugh a lot, and lift each other up. You’ll have the freedom to be yourself, the support to grow, and a team that actually has your back.



Oh, and did we mention we like to have fun while doing it?

title: Invoicing & Billing Specialist (Restoration & Insurance) | Xactimate Preferred | Full-Time
description:
Overview:

We are a US-based restoration company seeking a detail-oriented Invoicing & Billing Virtual Assistant to support our daily billing operations, insurance documentation, and revenue tracking.



This role is critical to ensuring work completed in the field is properly documented, invoiced, and followed through for payment.



You will work closely with internal teams, project managers, and insurance workflows to ensure invoices are accurate, complete, and aligned with approved scopes.



Xactimate experience is a strong advantage, but not required. We are looking for someone who is coachable, a quick learner, and able to adapt to internal systems.



This is not an entry-level role.



Company:

CRDN – Restoration Services





CRDN is a nationally recognized US company specializing in restoration services after fire, water, and property damage. We work directly with insurance carriers and customers to deliver high-quality restoration and billing accuracy.



Location:

Remote – Philippines



Schedule:

Full-Time | US Business Hours



Position Type:

Long-Term with Growth Opportunity



About the Role:

You will be responsible for managing invoicing and billing processes tied to restoration projects.



This includes ensuring that all work completed is properly documented, invoiced, and followed through for payment.



You will work with:

• Job documentation and scopes of work

• Internal team updates and project notes

• Insurance-related billing workflows

• Invoice tracking and follow-ups



Key Responsibilities:

• Create and send invoices based on completed work

• Review job documentation to ensure accurate billing

• Track invoices and follow up on outstanding payments

• Maintain organized billing and financial records

• Communicate with internal teams regarding job status and billing readiness

• Assist with insurance-related documentation and billing requirements

• Support Accounts Receivable processes

• Ensure all invoices align with approved scopes and documentation



Important: Accuracy & Follow-Through Matter



This role requires more than just creating invoices.

You must be comfortable with:

• Reviewing documentation before billing

• Ensuring nothing is missed or under billed

• Following up consistently on unpaid invoices

• Maintaining organized and audit-ready records

• Understanding that billing accuracy directly impacts company revenue



Required Experience:

• Minimum 2–3 years experience in invoicing, billing, or accounting support

• Experience with Accounts Receivable and invoice tracking

• Strong attention to detail and organization

• Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

• Strong written English communication



Preferred Experience (Strong Advantage):

• Experience in restoration, construction, or insurance-related roles

• Familiarity with Xactimate or insurance estimating workflows

• Experience working with US-based companies



What We Are Looking For:

• Detail-oriented and process-driven

• Strong follow-up and accountability mindset

• Coachable and quick learner

• Reliable and consistent

• Comfortable working in structured workflows

• Looking for a long-term opportunity



Compensation:

• $600 – $800/month (based on experience)



Why Join Us:

• Stable US-based restoration company

• Long-term role with growth potential

• Opportunity to gain experience in insurance billing workflows

• Work directly with experienced operations team

• Be part of a growing virtual team



Application Instructions:

To be considered:

 1. Send your updated resume

 2. Include a 4–6 sentence summary of your invoicing or billing experience

 3. List any software you’ve used

 4. State how many years you’ve worked with US clients



Send to:

title: Virtual Litigation Paralegal
description:
Job Title: Remote Litigation Paralegal 



Company: Wright Gray Personal Injury Law Firm



**********Location: Remote/ Virtual - In Office Position in Manila***********



About Wright Gray:



Wright Gray Personal Injury Law Firm specializes in fighting for the rights of victims who have sustained physical or emotional damages due to the negligence of others. We are seeking to bolster our dedicated team with the appointment of a seasoned Litigation Paralegal. 



Job Description:



We are on the lookout for a highly professional, detail-oriented, virtual Litigation Paralegal. The successful candidate will have a proven track record of providing litigation support to attorneys, handling discovery, drafting documents, maintaining client communication, scheduling and coordinating hearings and medical appointments as well as managing medical record requests. 



Responsibilities:



1. Answer discovery promptly and accurately.

2. Draft discovery, demands, and other legal documents.

3. Communication with clients to update on case progress.

4. Conduct case file investigations.

5. Schedule hearings and medical appointments.

6. Proactively manage requests for medical records.

7. Perform all tasks in strict compliance with professional and legal standards for confidentiality and ethics.



Qualifications:



1. Must possess at least a vocational diploma, Bachelor’s degree in Law, or certification in Paralegal studies.

2. Minimum of 4 years of United States litigation experience required.

3. Excellent organizational skills with high-level attention to detail.

4. Strong written and verbal communication skills.

5. Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines.

6. Proficiency in using legal research software and legal communication platforms.

7. Availability to work remotely with occasional travel to our office in Manila, if needed.



Required Documentation:



1. Proof of legal right to work in the Philippines (for Manila's office position).

2. Identification verifying age (must be 18 or older).

3. Proof of relevant education/certification.

4. Proof of four years of job experience.

5. Several professional references within the legal community.



Wright Gray Personal Injury Law Firm is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.



To apply for this position, please submit your resume, cover letter, a video record of what you are the right person, and list of references to 
 encourage all who meet the qualifications to apply.



Application Deadline: September 30, 2023. 



Please note that only candidates who are selected for an interview will be contacted.

Company: Wright Gray Personal Injury Law Firm
