title: Medical Records Retrieval Specialist/Data Entry
description:
About Us:



DO NOT apply to this job if you can not follow all of the application instructions. 



We are a reputed U.S. personal injury law firm focused on representing clients in complex personal injury claims. We are currently seeking a diligent, highly motivated, and hard-working Remote Filipino Medical Records Retrieval Specialist to join our fast-paced team.





Job Description:





The Remote Medical Records Retrieval Specialist will be responsible for obtaining, tracking, organizing, an entering medical records into the case management system from various healthcare providers as part of supporting our personal injury cases. As a successful candidate, you must have excellent communication skills, be detail-oriented, and be able to manage deadlines efficiently.





Responsibilities:





1. Request medical records and bills from healthcare providers, ensuring that the necessary authorization forms are completed and in compliance with privacy regulations.



2. Maintain and update case records in our database, ensuring accuracy and standardization.



3. Provide regular status updates to the attorney regarding records requests, outstanding items, and timelines.



4. Conduct thorough analysis and review of medical records to identify important information that may be relevant to clients' cases.



5. Prepare summaries of medical records in a clear and concise manner, tailored to suit the needs of the case.





6. Respond promptly to inquiries from the legal team and clients regarding the status of medical records requests.



7. Maintain open and proactive communication with healthcare providers to facilitate timely and accurate retrieval of records.



8. Collaborate with attorneys and paralegals in the development and execution of case strategies.





Requirements:





1. Proven experience as a Medical Records Retrieval Specialist or in a similar role, preferably in a personal injury law firm setting.



2. Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.



3. Strong knowledge of medical terminology and the ability to interpret medical records accurately.



4. Understanding of HIPAA guidelines and familiarity with U.S. healthcare providers' systems.



5. Proficient in computer software applications including MS Office, particularly Word and Excel, and experience with case management software.



6. A meticulous approach to tasks, with strong attention to detail and organizational skills.



7. Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced working environment.





Benefits:



1. Competative Salary



2. Comprehensive training and opportunities for professional development.



3. Opportunity to work in a collaborative and supportive remote team environment.



4. Flexible working hours, allowing for a healthy work-life balance.





How to Apply:

title: Video Editor (DTC eCommerce)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing health and wellness brand obsessed with customer psychology and creative excellence. We don't just "make content," we build high-performance assets that drive millions in revenue. We are looking for a Video Editor who is genuinely passionate about performance, speed, and continuous improvement.



This is not a role for someone who just wants to follow a storyboard and clock out. We need a creative who looks at a hook and immediately thinks of three ways to make it more engaging, faster, and higher-converting.



Our philosophy: we prioritize 10 ads at 80% quality over 2 ads at 100%. Speed and volume win in performance marketing. If you're someone who obsesses over pixel-perfect polish at the expense of output, this isn't the right fit.



The Role

You will own the creation of high-volume, high-performance video ads, targeting 10–20 videos per week depending on length. This includes short-form for Meta/TikTok, long-form VSLs, AI avatars, B-roll edits, and voiceover-driven content.



You'll work from creative briefs and scripts provided by our creative strategists and copywriters, turning direction into polished, high-converting assets at speed. You take deep pride in ownership, turn raw footage and AI outputs into systematic creative machines, and ensure our creative output is a competitive advantage.



If you are a builder who thrives on iterating based on data rather than just "vibes," we want to talk to you.



What You Will Do

* Full-Spectrum Production: Create high-converting short-form ads (15–60s), UGC-style content, and long-form VSLs for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube.

* AI Mastery: Take full ownership of our AI tech stack, including Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, and ElevenLabs for video, and Nano-Banana for statics, to produce high-quality AI video, avatar, and voiceover outputs at scale.

* Source Fresh Creatives: Proactively find and source fresh B-roll and visual assets from across the internet. You never run dry, and you never recycle.



What We're Looking For

Experience & Skills

* 2+ years of video editing experience, with specific experience editing for DTC brands or performance marketing.

* Technical mastery: Fluency in Premiere, Final Cut, or CapCut, plus advanced proficiency in AI video tools (Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, ElevenLabs, Nano-Banana).

* Strategic thinking: Strong instincts for hooks, pacing, and storytelling in a Direct Response (DR) context.

* Resourcefulness: Proven ability to source fresh creatives, B-roll, and visual assets independently. You always have new material to work with.



Work Style

* Speed over perfection. You can move fast and deliver high volume without sacrificing the quality that matters.

* Implement feedback quickly, often same-day turnaround.

* Improvement-driven: You can demonstrate how you've personally improved a creative's performance through iteration or better editing workflows.

* Excellent English, clear written and verbal communication for seamless collaboration.

* Self-learner. You figure things out on your own. Whether it's a new tool, a new technique, or a new platform, you don't wait to be taught.

* Organized file structures and version control for rapid iteration.



Commitment

Full-time and exclusive. This role requires your full professional focus. We invest heavily in our people, training, tools, growth, and we're looking for someone who's equally invested in building something long-term with us.



Click here to apply :

title: Property Manager
description:
Job description:



Job Summary



Properties by Preston is seeking a highly organized and proactive Guest Experience Manager to oversee the end-to-end guest journey across an assigned portfolio of properties. This role is responsible for ensuring a seamless, high-quality experience from booking through checkout, while maintaining operational excellence within your designated properties.



The ideal candidate takes full ownership of their assigned properties, communicates effectively with both guests and internal teams, and ensures every stay meets our brand standards. You will play a critical role in driving guest satisfaction, managing day-to-day operations, and protecting the reputation of the properties under your management.

Ensure all assigned properties are guest-ready, well-maintained, and meet company standards at all times

Oversee and optimize property listings across short-term rental platforms for your assigned portfolio, ensuring accuracy, pricing, and availability are up to date

Collaborate with internal and remote teams to ensure tasks are executed efficiently and according to company standards

Delegate tasks effectively while maintaining accountability and operational oversight

Maintain a strong, real-time understanding of everything happening within your assigned portfolio



Qualifications



Strong communication and customer service skills

Experience in hospitality, property management, or short-term rentals preferred

Problem-solver with a proactive mindset and strong sense of ownership

Comfortable working with remote teams and coordinating multiple stakeholders



Additional Requirements

Long-term

Monthly compensation

$800 – $1,400 USD

Hours

40 hrs/week

Start

Immediate

This role is 100% organic SEO. No paid ads, no social media, no content writing only. If your experience is primarily in Google Ads or
 Ads, do not apply. We need someone who lives and breathes Google rankings.

ABOUT THE ROLE

We are a US-based digital marketing agency serving high-ticket clients in the yacht/marine and real estate industries. Our clients need to dominate Google — locally and organically. We need a proven SEO specialist who can build authority, earn rankings, and show results through data. Not someone who talks about SEO. Someone who does it.

WHAT YOU'LL OWN

LINK BUILDING & AUTHORITY

—

Guest posting — identify relevant niche sites, pitch editors, place articles with contextual backlinks for US clients

—

Press releases — write and distribute to wire services (PR Newswire, EIN Presswire, etc.) for brand mentions and authority links

—

Digital PR — earn editorial backlinks through outreach to journalists, bloggers, and niche publications

—

HARO / Qwoted — respond to journalist queries consistently to earn high-authority media backlinks

—

Niche edits — outreach to existing content owners to insert client links into already-indexed pages

—

Citation building — build and maintain consistent NAP citations across all major directories for local clients

ON-PAGE & TECHNICAL SEO

—

Full site audits — crawlability, Core Web Vitals, site speed, indexation issues, and technical fixes

—

On-page optimization — title tags, meta descriptions, headers, schema markup, and internal linking

—

Topical authority — build content clusters and internal linking structures that signal expertise to Google

LOCAL SEO

—

Google Business Profile optimization — categories, services, posts, photos, Q&A, and review strategy

—

Map pack rankings — full local SEO strategy to get clients ranking in the Google 3-pack for target keywords

AI SEO & REPORTING

—

AI SEO — optimize content and site structure for AI Overviews, SGE visibility, featured snippets, and entity-based search

—

Keyword research — identify ranking opportunities and brief content for maximum organic impact

—

Weekly reporting — Google Search Console and GA4 tracking with clear KPIs, ranking movement, and action items

—

Competitor analysis — reverse engineer top-ranking competitors and build a plan to outrank them

REQUIREMENTS — DO NOT APPLY WITHOUT THESE

—

Minimum 3 years hands-on SEO experience with documented ranking improvements — not just audits, actual results

—

Proven backlink building experience including guest posts, press releases, digital PR, and niche edits — you must describe your exact process

—

Deep knowledge of Google Search Console, GA4, Ahrefs or SEMrush, and Screaming Frog or similar crawl tools

—

Local SEO experience — you have ranked businesses in Google Maps and know GMB inside out

—

Strong written English — you will communicate directly with US-based clients

—

Reliable internet, consistent availability during US business hours, and a professional work setup

NICE TO HAVE

—

Experience with AI SEO — understanding of SGE, AI Overviews, and entity-based SEO shifts in Google

—

Niche experience in marine, luxury, real estate, or high-ticket service industries

—

Familiarity with GoHighLevel CRM or WordPress

—

Active HARO or Qwoted account with a track record of successful placements

—

Experience with structured data, schema markup, and local business optimization

HOW TO APPLY — READ THIS CAREFULLY

Your application will be ignored if it does not include the following:



1. A specific website or client you did SEO for — what their ranking was before, what it was after, and the timeframe. Numbers only, no vague claims.



Generic applications will not be reviewed. We are looking for one specialist, not a team. If you are that person, your application will speak for itself.

title: Real Estate VA (GoHighLevel Expert + Acquisitions Specialist)
description:
Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term Opportunity



We are a growing U.S.-based real estate investment company expanding nationwide, and we’re looking for a high-level Virtual Assistant who can wear two important hats:



GoHighLevel (GHL) Expert – to build, optimize, and maintain our CRM workflows

Acquisitions Specialist – to speak with motivated sellers, run comps, and help lock up deals



If you’re someone who takes initiative, thrives under pressure, and doesn’t wait to be told what to do, this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Doing

???? GHL / Automation Side:

Build and optimize workflows inside GoHighLevel (GHL)

Create and manage pipelines, triggers, and automations

Set up SMS/email follow-up sequences

Troubleshoot and maintain CRM systems

Improve lead conversion through automation and tracking



???? Acquisitions / Sales Side:

Speak with motivated sellers (inbound + outbound)

Build rapport and handle objections confidently

Run basic property comps (we will train if needed)

Present offers and negotiate deals

Accurately update CRM notes and pipeline stages



Who We’re Looking For:

? Strong GHL experience (this is NOT optional)

? Excellent spoken English (clear, confident, conversational)

? Sales mindset – comfortable talking to strangers and closing deals

? Experience in real estate (wholesaling or similar) is a BIG plus

? Thick-skinned, coachable, and open to feedback

? Resourceful – you figure things out, not wait for instructions

? Organized and detail-oriented





Our Company



We are a real estate investment company focused on:



Wholesaling

Novation deals

Creative deal structures depending on the seller’s situation



We work in multiple markets across the U.S. and are scaling quickly.



Compensation

Base pay (depending on experience)

PLUS performance bonuses per deal



Why Join Us?

Long-term, stable role

Direct impact on deals and company growth

Performance-based incentives

Fast-paced and growth-oriented environment





How to Apply



Please include:



A short intro about your experience with GoHighLevel

Your experience talking to sellers or handling sales calls

A voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself

The word “Closer” in your application subject line (to ensure you read everything)



If you’re someone who takes action, embraces challenges, and wants to grow with a serious real estate team, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Pre-Litigation Paralegal
description:
**Location:** Remote 

 

**Employment Type:** Full-time  

**Compensation:** USD 1,675.00 - 1,750.00 per month, depending on experience and performance  

**Operating Framework:** EOS (Entrepreneurial Operating System) 



## About Lakeview Law



Lakeview Law is a U.S.-based personal injury law firm focused on disciplined execution, strong case outcomes, and operational excellence. The firm operates under EOS, emphasizing accountability, measurable performance, and consistent case movement. 



Lakeview Law is transitioning from its legacy firm, Wright Gray, and is building a fast, nimble offshore operations team in the Philippines to support that transition and ongoing pre-litigation case management.



## The Opportunity



Lakeview Law is hiring three offshore Pre-Litigation Case Managers based in the Philippines.



This team will:

- Help migrate and organize files from the legacy Wright Gray Clio system into the Lakeview Law Clio system.

- Manage an assigned portfolio of personal injury pre-litigation files.

- Support disciplined daily file movement and help maintain a strong settlement pipeline.



This is a production role for candidates who are organized, responsive, and able to move files every day without letting matters stall. 



## What You Will Do



- Manage an assigned portfolio of active pre-litigation cases in Clio.

- Track status, next steps, and responsible party on every file.

- Ensure no assigned file goes more than 14 days without meaningful activity.

- Request, chase, and organize medical records and bills.

- Monitor treatment progress and identify gaps in care.

- Compile and organize documents for demand packages, including records, bills, and supporting documentation.

- Assist with client communication by drafting updates and logging all contact in Clio.

- Transfer and clean up case data from the Wright Gray Clio system into the Lakeview Law Clio system, ensuring accuracy and complete documentation.

- Keep Clio updated daily with notes, tasks, workflows, and statuses.

 What Success Looks Like



- No stalled or forgotten files. 

- Faster case progression through consistent follow-up and organized execution. 

- Clean, organized electronic files that attorneys and in-office staff can rely on.

- Timely, documented follow-ups with providers, adjusters, and clients. 



## Required Qualifications



- Must have hands-on Clio experience.- Must be able to talk about program usage and demonstrate during interview how you used it while we share our screen. (DO NOT APPLY IF YOU HAVEN'T USED CLIO)

- Must have 3 years of plaintiff personal injury experience.

- Strong written English and professional communication skills. 

- Strong organizational skills and the ability to manage a high-volume docket.

- Reliable internet, quiet workspace, and ability to work hours aligned with U.S. operations.



## Preferred Qualifications



- U.S. personal injury law firm experience. (MANDATORY AND MUST PROVIDE NAME OF FIRM AND ATTORNEY YOU WORKED FOR)

- Experience with medical records, billing, and demand package preparation. 

- Experience with data migration or transferring cases between systems. 

- Familiarity with EOS-style accountability and scorecard environments. 



## How to Apply



Please send: ONLY IF YOU MEET ALL QUALIFICATIONS - Send resume to 
 and 



- Resume in PDF format.

- A brief cover note explaining Clio experience and prior personal injury case management work.

- A short description of how a large file load is kept moving without missing deadlines.

- A short video introduction

title: Ecommerce Administrative Assistant (Operations + Notion + Shopify) — Full-Time
description:
We are a category-leading women’s eCommerce brand on a mission to create premium, affordable, and 100% waterproof jewelry that enhances our customers’ everyday lives. We’ve served over 1,000,000 customers worldwide in more than 145 countries!



We’re hiring one or more sharp, proactive Administrative Assistants to support operations and execution across the business.



This is not a “basic VA role.” If you need reminders, struggle with details, or prefer slow-paced work, this role will not be a fit.



We are looking for someone who is:



• fast, organized, and detail-obsessed

• proactive (you spot issues before being asked)

• fluent in Notion (databases + task systems + SOPs)

• fluent in Shopify (orders + products + inventory fields)

• able to work reliably with Dubai time (Gulf Standard Time, UTC+4)



Working Hours (Dubai Time Requirement)



This is a full-time role with consistent daily coverage. To be considered, you must have consistent availability in Dubai time (UTC+4). Required working hours: 8 am – 4 pm Dubai time (UTC+4), Monday–Friday. Please do not apply if you cannot reliably cover these hours.



What You’ll Own (Core Responsibilities)



1) Operations Execution + Coordination



• Maintain internal task systems in Notion (databases, assignees, due dates, SOPs)

• Support daily operations tracking (orders, stock, shipments, urgent issues)

• Create structure: checklists, templates, and systems to keep execution clean



2) Shopify Admin Support



• Process and monitor orders, returns, and exchanges

• Update product listings and key Shopify admin fields accurately

• Maintain operational accuracy across inventory / pricing / product details (basic Shopify fluency is required — this is not optional)



3) Admin & Team Support



• Scheduling, calendar coordination, meeting agendas, notes, follow-ups

• Document management, data entry, reporting, and structured file organization

• Ensure tasks don’t slip through cracks (high ownership required)

• You will be expected to spot problems, propose solutions, and keep execution moving without needing constant direction



Additional Support Areas (As Needed)



This is primarily an operations + admin role. If you have additional skill, you may also support:



• light marketing coordination (uploading, scheduling, simple assists)

• invoice tracking / basic bookkeeping support

• research projects (suppliers, competitor scans, simple analysis)



Requirements (Must-Haves)



• 2+ years of experience as an admin assistant, operations assistant, or eCommerce VA

• Strong Notion fluency (databases, templates, task systems, SOP organization)

• Strong Shopify fluency (orders, products, admin navigation, accuracy)

• Extremely strong attention to detail

• Excellent English communication (written + verbal)

• Able to work full-time and maintain Dubai time coverage



Bonus if you have:



• Richpanel or other helpdesk tools

• eCommerce fulfillment coordination experience

• spreadsheet reporting experience



If you’re a high performer, this role can become a long-term, career-defining growth path inside our company.



Competitive pay based on experience.



How to Apply



Please complete this application carefully (we will not review low-effort submissions):

title: Freelance / Part-Time Video Editor
description:
I'm looking for a video editor to help with my personal content — short-form videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok) and vlogs about startup life, growth marketing, and travel across Asia.



Example video: 



What you'll be doing:



Editing short-form vertical videos (30s–90s) from raw clips I provide

Editing longer vlog-style content (5–15 min) for YouTube

Adding captions, text overlays, transitions, and light motion graphics

Syncing music and sound design

Color correcting handheld/phone footage

Delivering final cuts in platform-ready formats

Turning around edits within 24–48 hours



What I'm looking for:



Experience editing short-form social content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

Proficiency in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, CapCut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

Strong sense of pacing — you know how to keep viewers watching

Familiarity with trending formats, hooks, and caption styles

Reliable communication over Slack or

Bonus: experience with After Effects or motion graphics

Bonus: interest in startups, tech, or travel content



How it works:



I film everything and send you the raw clips via Google Drive or 

I'll provide a brief or creative direction for each video

You handle the full edit — cuts, captions, music, pacing, export

We'll iterate as needed but I want someone who can nail it in 1–2 rounds



To apply, send me:

2–3 samples of short-form edits you've done (Reels/TikTok style)

Your hourly or per-video rate

Your typical turnaround time

Tools you use



This is a part-time role to start with potential to go full-time if we work well together.

title: Advance Real Estate Video Editor | E | V3
description:
Hello, We are currently looking for an experienced real estate video editor to start working with us ASAP as we head into a busy season. Our workflow is fast-paced and volume-based. The edits themselves are not overly complicated, but speed, consistency, and following instructions are critical.



About 90% of our real estate videos are very simple, please see link: youtu.be/3Blj3NBfThE

The remaining 10% of the videos we will require may be a bit more advanced: 
/p/DWGqWtVERtd/



For 90% of the videos, we really just need someone who knows how to *DO A SPEED RAMP + MOTION BLUR EFFECT*



We will require you to be able to use MotionVFX for the text animations shown in the instagram link (we will provide an account for MotionVFX)



During peak season (summer), we produce 25–30 listings per week (Monday–Sunday).

On some days, we may shoot 6–7 listings, and other days 2–3 listings.

Because videos are filmed in order, edits are streamlined. Our current editor averages 40-60 minutes per listing. The instagram sample video provided, we need you to be able to edit those within 2-3 hours.



You may work around 25-30 hours a week or possibly more when we get busier during the season .



Our turnaround expectations are:

-50% of edits: required within 8–12 hours

-50% of edits: required within 24–36 hours



A few more notes for you to read:

-Fast response to revisions is essential

-Weekend availability is required

-Must be okay using Hubstaff for time tracking (used for data and workflow planning, not micromanagement)



Starting rate: $8 CAD/hour



Please send me a message here to apply



A few things I would like for you to answer when you reply to this job posting

-In 2–3 sentences, explain why you want this position and why you’re a strong fit.

-When can you start?

-Are you currently working full-time or part-time?

-Share 3 interesting facts about yourself.

-Attach your Resume & Portfolio.

-Please provide a 20-30 second trial edit similar to the Instagram link I attached.

-Google Drive (Raw Files) - 
/drive/folders/1qSgA4SDI88AFulNxxnwd3AJh4NaVo51B?usp=drive_link



***For the trial edit, we really just need to see that you can do the text animations + speed warp and motion blurs***



Applicants who do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



If you are selected, we will reach out to schedule a quick interview call.



Looking forward to hearing from you,

title: Flight & Miles Brokerage Travel Specialist (Virtual Assistant) – Full-Time Remote
description:
Flight & Miles Brokerage Travel Specialist (Virtual Assistant) – Full-Time Remote



We are looking for a highly detail-oriented Travel Specialist with experience in flight booking, airline loyalty programs, and miles redemption. This role involves handling complex bookings using points and miles with high accuracy.



- Search, analyze, and book flights using airline miles and loyalty programs

- Compare availability across multiple airline programs

- Identify best routes and redemption options, including partner airlines

- Recognize peak vs. off-peak award pricing

- Handle ticket issuance, changes, cancellations, and refunds

- Verify passenger details with zero-error tolerance

- Optimize travel based on miles efficiency and availability

title: Graphic Designer
description:
PART-TIME GRAPHIC DESIGNER (REMOTE)

Organization: Azimu Group

Duration: February – May 2026

Hours: 25 hours per week

Compensation: $500/month





About Azimu Group

Azimu Group is a strategy, research, and design consultancy committed to advancing equity and community-centered solutions across the public, nonprofit, and private sectors. We partner with organizations working to build more just and responsive systems through data, storytelling, design, and capacity-building.





Role Overview

Azimu Group is seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Part-Time Graphic Designer to support a range of visual design needs across multiple equity-focused projects. This is an excellent opportunity for an emerging or early-career designer to gain meaningful, real-world experience creating visual assets for social impact initiatives.

The Designer will work remotely on a flexible schedule, with one required weekly 1-hour check-in with a supervisor during the first two months of engagement.





Key Responsibilities

- Design graphics for social media platforms, websites, and digital campaigns

- Support branding initiatives, including logo concept development and visual identity updates

- Produce presentation decks, print materials, and design collateral

- Assist with UI/UX elements for web and digital products

- Contribute to video editing tasks for short-form content

- Apply and adhere to existing brand guidelines (colors, typography, and layout) while adapting them across diverse projects

- Participate in periodic design reviews and creative brainstorming sessions

- Manage assigned tasks independently, meeting established deadlines







Qualifications

We welcome applications from students and early-career designers who are actively building their skills and portfolios. Prior professional experience is not required.



- Familiarity with design tools such as Canva, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop, Figma, or InDesign

- Demonstrated ability to work independently and meet deadlines

- Strong attention to detail and a genuine willingness to learn

- Interest in equity-centered design, community impact, or social justice work

- Access to a personal laptop (software access may be provided as needed)







Portfolio Requirement

Applicants are encouraged to submit a portfolio or design samples that showcase any of the following (student work is welcome):

- Logo designs

- Social media templates

- Website or app mockups

= Presentation designs or print layouts







How to Apply:

Please submit the following materials to 

- Resume

- Portfolio link or 3–5 design samples

- Cover letter describing your interest in the role and Azimu Group’s mission

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
WANTED: The World’s Most Relentless Sales Development Representative

Global | Remote | Healthcare & Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM)



Note: DO NOT apply via OnlineJobs.ph. Kindly send your resume to 
 with the subject: “Your Name - Sales Development Representative”. Any application that does not follow these instructions will be automatically filtered out.



If you don’t love the grind, the scoreboard, and the win, do not apply.

We help independent healthcare practices (cardiology, nephrology, primary care, etc.) add predictable recurring revenue through remote patient monitoring — without adding more work to their already burnt-out staff.

Doctors are overwhelmed. Staff are drowning. Reimbursements are shrinking.

Our solution gives them lifesaving revenue and better care for their sickest patients. Your mission as our Sales Development Representative (SDR):

Turn cold contacts into hot, qualified, ready-to-buy opportunities — consistently, predictably, and at volume.

If you’re the kind of person who gets a dopamine hit from booking a qualified meeting, loves hearing “yes” more than you hate hearing “no,” and wants to be the engine of pipeline growth, keep reading.

If you just want a chill hourly gig and hate metrics... this will feel like punishment. Close this tab.



Why This Role Actually Matters

We are demand constrained, not delivery constrained.

When we get in front of the right practices, we win — and we keep them. But someone has to:

• Cut through the noise.

• Get past gatekeepers.

• Start real conversations with senior decision-makers at healthcare practices.

• Set high-intent, show-up-ready appointments for our Sales team.

That “someone” is you.

You’re not a “junior telemarketer.”

You’re a front-line revenue creator in a highly regulated, high-impact, high-ticket environment.



What You’ll Do (High-Impact Responsibilities) This is what your scoreboard will look like:

1. Own Outreach Like an Athlete Owns Training

• Hit and exceed daily activity targets:

Minimum 50+ cold calls per day.

Minimum 35+ targeted
s per day.

2. Turn Cold Prospects Into Qualified Opportunities

• Speak to practice administrators, physician owners, and clinic leaders about

their staffing overload and revenue pain.

3. Handle Objections Like a Pro

• You will be trained — and expected — to turn these into conversations, not dead

ends.

4. Feed the Revenue Machine with Data G Feedback

• Log everything cleanly in HubSpot and Track: calls, connects, show rates,

conversion rates, and reasons for “no.”

5. Hit ?uotas — Then Break Them

• Consistently hit monthly meeting/qualified opportunity quotas.

You will not be “just setting meetings.”

You will be creating pipeline that turns into accounts and real-world clinical impact. 



What Sucks About This Job (On Purpose)

We’re going to be brutally honest:

• You will face rejection. A lot. Healthcare gatekeepers are pros. You’ll hear “not

interested,” “busy,” and voi
 more than you hear “yes.” If that crushes you,

this isn’t your game.

• High volume is non-negotiable. 50 calls and 35
s per day is the floor, not the

ceiling. “I’m more of a thinker than a doer” does not work here.

• You will be measured. Your activity, connects, meetings, show rates, and

opportunity quality will be tracked. If that stresses you out, we’ll stress each other

out.

• You must learn the healthcare world. This isn’t selling software to startups. You’ll

need to understand RPM, CPT codes at a basic level, and the pressure providers are

under.

• We move fast. Scripts, messaging, and targeting will evolve. If you cling to “the way

we’ve always done it,” you’ll be left behind.

If any of this makes you think, “That sounds intense, I just want something easy,” we are not for you.

If it makes you think, “Perfect, that’s where I outwork and outperform everyone else,” keep going.



What’s Amazing About This Job

Now the upside.

• You’re selling something genuinely valuable. This isn’t a gimmick. When we win a

practice, they get real incremental revenue and their sickest patients get better monitoring.

• Global-first, remote-first. You can work from anywhere with strong overlap to U.S. Eastern time. We care about output and attitude, not where your chair is.

• Above-market pay for true A-players.

o We benchmark compensation and aim to pay at least 10?ove the high-

water mark for top SDRs in your region.

o In emerging markets, that level of comp is life-changing — and we treat it

that way.

• Real coaching G growth. You’ll work closely with a team that knows the numbers and the craft. If you want to grow into senior SDR, AE, or sales leadership, this is a real launchpad.

• Mission + money. You get to earn great income while working on something that improves patient lives and helps struggling practices survive.



Who You Are (Non-Negotiables)

• Experience selling into healthcare is a MUST. You’ve sold to practices, hospitals,

or healthcare orgs before. You understand that world is different.

• Elite communicator — clear, confident, and human on the phone and in writing.

• Active listener. You don’t bulldoze; you hear what they’re actually saying and redirect wisely.

• Sales athlete. You love the game — the dials, the script tweaks, the scoreboard, the improvement.

• Resilient. High volume + rejection doesn’t drain you; it sharpens you.

• Organized and on top of your follow-ups, call notes, and tasks — not digging

through chaos every morning.

• Comfortable with sales tools and CRM (HubSpot) — or confident you can get up to speed quickly.

• A genuine team player: competitive, but not toxic; collaborative, not needy.

If you’ve never sold into healthcare and have no interest in learning that world, this role is

not for you.



How to Apply

We filter hard at the top of the funnel. If you can’t follow instructions here, you won’t make it in the role.

1.
 Subject Line (Exact Wording) Your subject line must be:

"I actually read the instructions."



2. Attach Your Resume (Correct Format Only)

• Attach your resume as a PDF.

• File name must be:

[lastname].[firstname].sdr.cv.pdf

Example: doe.jane.sdr.cv.pdf



3. Animal Question (In the
 Body)

Answer this in 3–5 sentences:

If you were an animal, what animal would you be and why — specifically as a Sales Development Representative?

We’re looking at how you think and communicate, not a “right” answer.



4. English Proficiency Link

Include a link to an English proficiency test result (Duolingo, IELTS, TOEFL, or similar).



5. Role-Specific Mini Task (Non-Negotiable)

In the same
, include:

• One sample cold
 (150 words max) you would send to:

A practice administrator at a cardiology clinic who is overwhelmed with staff workload and worried about declining reimbursements.

• One 3–4 bullet call opener you would use on a cold call to the same person. Plain text in the
 is fine. No design necessary. We care about clarity, relevance, and punch.



6. Send a 2-minute video on a time when you showed Perseverance in your life and/or career



7. Where to Send It

Send everything above to:





Do not reply via OnlineJobs.ph. Please submit your application to 
 that do not follow these instructions will be automatically filtered out.



What Happens Next (Including the Paid Trial)

1. We’ll review submissions that follow the instructions exactly.

2. If you look like a fit, we’ll invite you to a short interview focused on real conversations and scenarios, not generic “tell me about yourself” fluff.

3. Top candidates will be invited to a paid trial project, which may include:

o Running a small outbound sprint to a defined target list, o Using a script and messaging we co-create,

o Reporting your numbers and learnings.

This paid trial is the real evaluation, not your resume.

If you crush it, we’ll talk offer, ramp plan, and how you’re going to help us fill the pipeline

with high-value healthcare accounts.

Final CTA



If you’re:

• The kind of SDR who loves the grind, the game, and the win,

• Hungry to earn above-market pay for above-market performance,

• Excited to sell something that actually improves lives in the real world...

Then follow the instructions to the letter, send your application, and show us you’re the World’s Most Relentless Sales Development Representative.

title: AI Agent Specialist
description:
About Us



We're a fast-moving, heart-led brand that helps women regulate their nervous systems, heal triggers, and return to their truth.



Our business is transformational and built with soul. We blend structure with spirituality. Systems with sacredness. This is more than a job — it's a mission.



We are a "culture first, achievement second" company. That means who you are matters as much as what you can do. We build with people who are aligned, intentional, and genuinely care about the work they put into the world.



---



Who We're Looking For:



We're looking for a detail-obsessed AI specialist who lives and breathes large language models — someone who gets genuinely excited about squeezing every last drop of performance out of a well-crafted prompt.



You'll be working directly with us to improve, refine, and expand an existing custom GPT, then mirror and adapt that same experience to run on Claude AI. This isn't a "set it and forget it" role — we're co-creating something together, and we want a partner who cares as much about the outcome as we do.



If you're the kind of person who tests obsessively, communicates with care, and takes pride in craft — you'll fit right in here.



---



What You'll Do



- Look at our company as a whole and assist us and integrating AI into our Team and processes to help us free up time creativity and space to support our customer more

- Audit & improve our existing custom GPT — identify gaps, inconsistencies, and opportunities to sharpen its performance

- Translate & rebuild the GPT's behavior, tone, and logic to operate natively and effectively within the Claude AI ecosystem

- Align outputs to our company voice and the specific goals of this role — every response should feel intentional and on-brand

- Rigorously self-test before delivering anything to us — we expect you to surface problems before we do

- Collaborate closely with our team to iterate, refine, and push toward the best possible product for our customers



---



What We're Looking For:



- Cares about user safety & experience

- Deep, hands-on fluency with both OpenAI (GPT), Anthropic (Claude), and AI password/email authentication platforms — not just familiarity, genuine expertise

- Strong understanding of prompt architecture, system instructions, persona design, and output conditioning

- An eye for quality — you know what "good" looks like and you won't ship something you're not proud of

- Clear communicator who can explain their decisions and invite feedback

- Self-directed and proactive — you bring ideas, not just execution



Bonus Points:



- Experience building AI tools for customer-facing applications

- Familiarity with tools like the OpenAI Playground, Anthropic Console, or similar environments

- Background in coaching, personal development, or adjacent spaces — you understand the depth of the work we do



---



How We Work



We believe the best products are built together. We want someone who's invested in the outcome, asks good questions, and helps us think beyond what we originally imagined.



If that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you.



HOW TO APPLY:



Please include the following or your application will not be reviewed:



1. A brief intro — who you are and what excites you most in AI right now

2. 2–3 examples of Custom GPTs, Claude assistants, AI agents, or automations you have actually built (links, screenshots, or descriptions)

3. Your answer to: "Walk me through how you would test a custom GPT or AI agent before it goes live to real users."

4. Which tools you use most confidently and which you'd want to learn



Thank you!

title: Data Entry Analyst (With Accounting or Auditing Skills)
description:
PLEASE FILL OUT THIS LINK TO START AN APPLICATION: 
/applyjob-noncaller-1



About Us:

With over 100 years of combined industry experience, the Community Minerals team specializes in the purchase of mineral or royalty rights all over the US. We have earned a stellar reputation with hundreds of satisfied customers and an “A” Rating with the Better Business Bureau. With our proven track record, we continue to serve mineral owners in several states with transparency, accountability, and a personalized experience to meet individual needs.



JOB SUMMARY:

The Post Close Data Entry Analyst is responsible for entering, analyzing, and managing data within the organization's databases. This role involves not only ensuring the accuracy and integrity of the data entered but also interpreting and analyzing data to support decision-making processes. The analyst works closely with various departments to ensure data consistency and quality across the organization.



JOB DESCRIPTION:

- Accurately input and update data into the company's databases and systems.

- Maintain and manage data records, ensuring they are current and accurate.

- Analyze data to identify trends, patterns, and insights.

- Conduct regular audits to ensure data accuracy and integrity.

- Identify and correct data entry errors and inconsistencies.

- Communicate effectively with tea
mbers and stakeholders to resolve data discrepancies.

- Maintain detailed records of data entry and analysis processes.

- Document data management procedures and standards.

- Identify opportunities to improve data entry and analysis processes.

- Implement best practices for data management and analysis.

- Create and manage template creation of revenue statements that are not delivered in the standard format.



EDUCATION:

A degree in data science, computer science, information technology, business administration, or a related field is preferred.



EXPERIENCE:

- At least 1 year experience in data entry, data analysis, or a related role.

- Proven experience in data entry, data analysis, or a related role.

- Familiarity with data entry software, databases, and analytical tools.



TECHNICAL SKILLS:

Knowledge in Excel, Google Sheets, and Microsoft Office.



SOFT SKILLS:

Strong attention to detail and accuracy.

Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.

Good organizational and time management skills.

Strong communication skills, both written and verbal.

Ability to handle confidential information with integrity.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.



What’s in it for you:



Competitive Compensation: Earn $3.09/hr. to $3.18/hr. paid in U.S. Dollars, commensurate with your skills and experience.



Work your way: Embrace the convenience of remote work from your chosen workspace.



Flexible Healthcare Bonus (Philippines): A healthcare bonus you control. Use it for HMO coverage, life insurance, or set it aside as an emergency fund—whatever best supports your well-being. It’s entirely up to you.



Success Incentives: Enjoy company bonuses and performance-driven rewards.

Performance Incentives: We believe exceptional work deserves recognition. Performance incentives are awarded to individuals who demonstrate outstanding contributions, initiative, and results. It’s our way of celebrating excellence and motivating continued success.



Discretionary Bonus: At Community Minerals, exceptional work doesn’t go unnoticed. Contractors who consistently go above and beyond may be rewarded with discretionary bonuses, a token of appreciation for outstanding contributions, impactful results, and dedication to excellence. Let your work speak, and the rewards will follow!

ets the following requirements:

title: social media strategist
description:
We are looking for a heavy-hitting Social Media Strategist who doesn’t just "manage" accounts but dominates them. You aren't just a scheduler; you are a visual designer, a trend-spotter, and a growth hacker. If you don't know the difference between a Pinterest Pin and a TikTok hook, this isn't for you.



The Role: What You’ll Be Doing

High-Conversion Carousels: Design and write high-value Instagram/LinkedIn carousels that stop the scroll and encourage "saves."



Story Mastery: Execute daily Stories that feel authentic, use engagement stickers effectively, and drive community interaction (not just static flyers).



TikTok Specialist: Identify trends before they peak, script/edit engaging short-form video, and understand the TikTok SEO ecosystem.



Pinterest Growth: Create "Fresh Pins" that drive long-term traffic, utilizing keyword-rich descriptions and aesthetic layouts.



Multi-Platform Strategy: Tailor content specifically for each platform’s unique algorithm and audience behavior.



Technical Skills Required

Design: Proficiency in Canva, Figma, or Adobe Creative Suite (must produce high-end visual assets).



Video Editing: Expert-level mobile editing (CapCut, InShot) or desktop software.



Copywriting: Ability to write punchy captions and text-heavy carousels that provide genuine value.



Analytics: Knowing how to read the data to pivot strategy, not just reporting likes.



The "Must-Haves"

A strong background in social media growth with a proven track record.



An eye for modern, clean, and engaging aesthetics.



The ability to work independently and meet tight deadlines.



How to Apply

Contact us with your portfolio ONLY. > Note: If you do not have a portfolio showcasing high-quality carousels, TikToks, and Pins, do not apply. We are looking for specialized expertise and a proven track record. No portfolio = No response.

title: Route Mapping & Property Research Virtual Assistant
description:
We are a UK cleaning company looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help us build targeted residential walking routes for door hanger distribution.



You will use Google Maps, Google My Maps, Zoopla, and spreadsheets to identify high-value residential houses in the UK based on strict criteria.



Your Responsibilities:



Research UK residential areas using Google Maps and Zoopla

Identify houses worth £300,000+

Confirm properties have 3+ bedrooms

Exclude bungalows, flats, apartments, and inaccessible gated communities

Use Google My Maps to create tight circular walking routes

Add and organize 100–130 qualifying houses per route

Label areas, polygons, and route markers correctly

Update spreadsheets with route name, area, and number of houses mapped

Follow our SOP exactly without skipping checks



Requirements:



Strong experience with Google Maps and Google My Maps

Good research skills and attention to detail

Able to verify properties carefully before adding them

Comfortable using spreadsheets

Able to follow detailed instructions

Bonus if you have experience with Zoopla, Rightmove, UK property research, or route planning



Work Type:

Project-based / part-time



To Apply:

Start your application with the words: ROUTE MAP UK

Then answer these 4 questions:



What experience do you have with Google Maps, My Maps, or route planning?

Have you ever researched property data using Zoopla, Rightmove, or similar websites?

How do you make sure you do not include wrong houses by mistake?

Can you send a short sample or screenshot of similar research work you have done?

title: MOTM: Junior Bookkeeper – Real Estate & Franchise Clients
description:
Job Description – Bookkeeper

Job Title: Junior Bookkeeper – Real Estate & Franchise Clients

Location: Remote

Hours: Full-time; 40 hours with at least 6 hours each day overlapping with Eastern Timezone

Compensation: Starting pay: $8/hour (hourly contractor role)

Pay model: Moves to a weekly salary after a successful 90-day review

Annual bonus included (standard)

Apply here: 
 



About Us

At Money on the Mend, our mission is to bring clarity, order, and confidence to entrepreneurs—especially real estate investors and franchise operators—by delivering streamlined bookkeeping, proactive systems, and financial insight.



We live by our values:

Clarity Over Complexity – Simplify financials so clients can see their business story clearly.

Stewardship – Treat every dollar—ours and our clients’—as a tool for legacy and wise decision-making.

Efficiency & Automation – Refuse to do anything twice; we build systems that scale.

Empathy in Action – Serve with patience and practicality, shaped by real-world experience.

Team First – Build sustainable rhythms and shared success.

Freedom through Focus – Create margin for clients, our team, and our families.

We’re not just reconciling accounts—we’re providing clarity and peace of mind so clients can scale properties, open new locations, and make confident financial decisions.



Responsibilities

As a bookkeeper with Money on the Mend, you will be responsible for:

Managing day-to-day bookkeeping for real estate investors and franchise/service-based businesses.

Reconciling bank and credit card accounts.

Handling accounts payable/receivable, payroll support, and sales tax filings as assigned.

Building and maintaining a clean chart of accounts.

Producing accurate monthly financial reports (delivered by the 10th).

Supporting client onboarding with account connections in QBO, Keeper, Airtable, and client portals.

Collaborating with the manager and team through Slack, Airtable, and Keeper.

Ensuring compliance with deadlines and bookkeeping best practices.

Participating in cleanups, catch-up work, and diagnostics when needed.

Handling Intercompany Loans

Managing multiple entities (up to 12)

Tracking team KPI's

Attending weekly Level 10 tea
etings 

Time tracking 

Clear communication



Qualifications

We’re looking for someone with:

At least one to three years of U.S.-based professional bookkeeping experience.

Two years working with all types of real estate investors or property management (preferred).

Proficiency in QuickBooks Online, Keeper, Airtable, Slack, and Google Workspace.

Strong knowledge of GAAP and best bookkeeping practices.

Preferred: QBO ProAdvisor certification.

Preferred: Intuit Enterprise Suite

Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills.

Strong communication and client-facing ability.

Traits we value: proactive, solutions-oriented, team player, systems thinker.



Work Style & Culture Fit

Comfortable working independently while collaborating closely with a manager.

Able to manage multiple clients, entities, and deadlines.

Values accuracy, clarity, and proactive communication.

Aligns with our belief: financial empowerment comes from clarity, not confusion.



Why Work With Us

Flexible remote work.

Growth opportunities with a lean, tech-forward firm.

Chance to help entrepreneurs, investors, and franchise operators grow wealth and operate confidently.



Our Policy on AI Tools

We recognize that AI and translation tools are widely used by virtual assistants and remote professionals. We believe in being clear about what is acceptable and what is not for this role and interview process:

? Allowed & Encouraged

Drafting, brainstorming, or improving written communication 
s, SOPs, checklists, documentation).

Checking grammar, spelling, or tone for clarity.

Speeding up repetitive tasks or improving efficiency.

Using captions or transcription tools to follow meetings.

?? Limited / Not a Fit

Relying on translation tools for all real-time communication in English. This role requires strong listening comprehension and verbal English without constant translation.

Submitting AI-generated work without editing or adding your own input.

Hiding the use of AI when asked about your process.

???? What to Expect in Hiring

Written and verbal responses will be analyzed for AI-only content.

Interviews will assess live comprehension (your ability to follow spoken English in real time).

Supportive tools are fine—but we need to know you can communicate clearly and independently when required.



How to Apply

Please submit:

title: Operations Manager (Property Management + AI/Automation Focus)
description:
Job Title: Operations Manager (Property Management + AI/Automation Focus)

Location: Remote

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Time

Compensation: $18–$25/hour (depending on experience)





About the Company



This company is a fast-growing, forward-thinking property management company managing over 100 short-term rental properties across multiple markets. The team focuses on delivering exceptional guest experiences while continuously improving internal systems and processes.



As the company scales, they are investing in smarter operations by leveraging automation, AI tools, and streamlined workflows to build a highly efficient, high-performing team.



This is an opportunity to join a growing company at a pivotal stage and play a key role in shaping the future of their operations.



About the Role



The company is looking for an experienced Operations Manager with a strong background in short-term rental (STR) or property management operations.



This role is ideal for someone who is both:

- Operationally strong (can manage day-to-day complexities, guest and owner issues), and

- Forward-thinking (interested in improving systems, automating workflows, and leveraging AI tools)



You will support daily operations while also helping the company optimize and scale by reducing manual work and improving team efficiency.



Key Responsibilities



Operations & Issue Management



- Handle escalated guest and property issues with strong judgment and professionalism

- Coordinate with vendors, property owners, and internal tea
mbers

- Make real-time decisions that balance guest satisfaction, owner relationships, and business outcomes

- Step into complex situations (e.g., maintenance issues, guest complaints) and resolve them effectively



Team Support & Oversight



- Support and collaborate with existing VAs handling guest communication and operations

- Provide guidance and help reduce unnecessary escalations to leadership

- Potential to take on more leadership responsibilities as the company grows



Process Improvement & Systems Thinking



- Identify inefficiencies in current workflows and recommend improvements

- Help standardize and document processes

- Continuously look for ways to improve operational performance



Automation & AI Enablement



- Identify repetitive/manual tasks and opportunities for automation

- Build or support workflow automation using modern tools (AI, cloud-based systems, etc.)

- Contribute to creating a more “lean but powerful” operations team



Qualifications



Required:

- 5+ years experience in property management or short-term rental operations

- Familiarity with AI tools, automation platforms, or system-building

- Experience improving processes or workflows

- Strong understanding of day-to-day operations in a property management company

- Excellent written and spoken English communication skills

- Proven ability to problem-solve independently and make sound decisions

- Experience handling guest issues, vendor coordination, and owner communication



What We’re Looking For

- Strong critical thinker and problem solver

- Able to handle nuanced, judgment-based decisions

- Proactive and resourceful (doesn’t rely on constant direction)

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, evolving environment

- Interested in technology and the future of operations



Growth Opportunity

This role offers significant opportunity for growth. The right candidate will become a key operational partner and help shape how the company scales.



As the company grows, this position may evolve into a more senior leadership role with increased responsibility and impact.



To apply:

Kindly fill out the application form:





Kindly send us a message with the word 'Success!'. Thank you!

title: Sales & Account Executive (Recruitment Industry)
description:
About the role



EmergeTech is seeking a high-caliber Sales Development & Account Executive to drive our next phase of global growth. This is a "full-desk" hybrid role designed for a hunter who loves the thrill of the win and a strategist who excels at nurturing long-term partnerships.



As a digital enablement partner, we pride ourselves on "Delivery Excellence." You will be the heartbeat of this commitment owning the entire lifecycle from the first cold touchpoint to the final signature, and then scaling that relationship into a high-growth recruitment partnership. You aren't just a salesperson; you are a strategic advisor responsible for the success of our "No-Hire No-Fee" guarantee.



Key responsibilities:



Execute cold outreach campaigns 
, LinkedIn, Phone) to engage C-suite and VP-level stakeholders.

Lead discovery calls and presentations to pitch EmergeTech’s value proposition, managing the funnel from first contact to contract signature.

Manage the follow-up process with persistence and grit, navigating negotiations until the service agreement is finalized.

Serve as the primary Point of Contact (POC) once a contract is signed, moving the account from a sales prospect to an active recruitment partnership.

Lead initial "Brief" sessions, conducting consultation calls alongside in-house Industry SMEs to qualify technical requirements.

Oversee the systematic headhunting and vetting process, ensuring the delivery tea
ets our 48–72 hour turnaround for qualified shortlists.

Ensure all candidates presented have cleared our rigorous 3-stage vetting process, including technical challenges and psychometric testing.

Identify opportunities to scale partnerships by offering bespoke solutions for temporary staffing, executive search, or SOW projects.

Synchronize efforts across international offices (London, Frankfurt, New York, etc.) to provide "true global reach" for your accounts.

Manage the offer process and provide "After-Offer Care," including monthly check-ins for the first six months to ensure long-term placement success.

Continually identify and solve complex business challenges to grow EmergeTech’s footprint within the client’s global organization.



Requirements:



3-5+ years of experience in Sales Development, Account Management, or Client Relations within a recruitment agency or RPO environment.

Proven track record of running cold outreach campaigns AND managing the subsequent recruitment delivery.

Strong understanding of the technology landscape (Cloud, Cybersecurity, AI, ERP) to effectively consult with technical stakeholders.

Exceptional relationship-building skills and high fluency in English to manage senior stakeholders globally.

Ability to identify "niche" business challenges and propose tailor-made service solutions while managing multiple recruitment streams simultaneously.



Why EmergeTech?



Independent Contractor Flexibility: This is an independent contractor arrangement, offering you the autonomy to manage your workflow while being part of a high-growth global team.

Performance-Driven Earning: Benefit from a competitive base pay combined with an uncapped commission structure your earning potential is directly tied to your results.

title: E-commerce Brand Manager
description:
Urgent Hiring — Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. The selection process may take up to 4 weeks, but early applicants are strongly encouraged.



Ready to Lead and Scale Our E-Commerce Operations?



At Hadley Designs, we believe learning should be enjoyable, engaging, and screen-free. Millions of parents and educators trust our beautifully designed, developmentally aligned educational tools to help children grow and thrive. As a fast-growing, family-founded brand, we are on a mission to make learning meaningful for families around the world.



We are looking for an E-Commerce Business Manager to join our team and help scale our online sales. If you are a results-driven operator with a passion for building scalable e-commerce systems, optimizing performance, and driving growth through data-backed strategies, this is a unique opportunity to make an impact.



About Hadley Designs

Hadley Designs is redefining early education with creativity, heart, and purpose. Every product we create is hand-drawn and teacher-designed, crafted with care to build confidence and connection. Our screen-free tools empower families and teachers to make learning fun and meaningful, nurturing curiosity and creativity in children.



Our Mission

We design screen-free products that parents trust to help their children grow, learn, and reach their full potential. Our beautifully crafted, developmentally sound tools replace distractions with connection, curiosity, and real learning.



Our Vision

We aim to build the most trusted children’s brand in the world, present in millions of homes, reshaping how families learn, connect, and grow. Our products will be so widely used and passed down that generations of children will grow up learning from them and choose them again for their own families.



Role Overview

As the E-Commerce Business Manager, you will own the full P&L of Hadley Designs’ e-commerce operations, with a focus on growing our Amazon business and expanding our multi-channel online presence. You will be responsible for driving revenue growth, optimizing product positioning, managing pricing, and leading promotional strategies across multiple online platforms. This is a high-impact role where your strategic and operational expertise will be critical to scaling the business and ensuring the long-term success of our e-commerce channels.



Key Responsibilities

-End-to-End E-Commerce Ownership: Manage all aspects of the e-commerce business, including revenue growth, margin optimization, pricing, advertising, and inventory management.

-Performance Optimization: Continuously optimize product listings, content, pricing strategies, and promotional plans to maximize conversion rates, sales, and profitability.

-New Product and Category Growth: Identify new product opportunities and market expansion avenues, and collaborate with internal teams to bring them to market successfully.

-Inventory and Demand Planning: Develop and execute plans to manage product demand, inventory levels, and risk mitigation, ensuring smooth and cost-effective operations.

-Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with Product Operations, Supply Chain, and Design teams to ensure product availability and accurate messaging across channels.

-Data-Driven Strategy: Use data to guide decision-making, refine strategies, and improve key performance metrics across e-commerce platforms.



How Success is Measured

-Strong growth in online sales and profitability across multiple platforms, especially Amazon.

-Clear and predictable performance improvements through optimized strategies in pricing, promotions, and product listings.

-Consistent execution of marketing and sales strategies to expand market share.

-Efficient inventory management that balances growth with cost control.

-Cross-functional alignment that contributes to operational efficiency and scalability.



Requirements

Who You Are

You are a growth-oriented, highly analytical e-commerce operator who thrives on taking ownership and driving measurable outcomes. You have experience working with e-commerce platforms like Amazon and are excited to scale a high-growth business within a collaborative and performance-driven environment.



You Have:



-5+ years of experience managing e-commerce operations, preferably with Amazon Seller Central or similar platforms.

-A proven track record of growing revenue, improving profitability, and optimizing sales across e-commerce platforms.

-Strong analytical skills and the ability to use data to make decisions and improve performance.

-Experience in managing product positioning, pricing strategies, and marketing campaigns.

-A collaborative, results-driven mindset and a passion for continuous improvement.

-Ability to manage both strategic and tactical elements of e-commerce operations.



Benefits

Why You’ll Love Working Here

-Impact: Your work will directly influence how families experience learning through the Hadley Designs brand.

-Culture: Join a passionate, mission-driven team that values trust, creativity, and collaboration.

-Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of a remote-first role with flexible working hours.

-Benefits:

Remote-first work environment

Paid time off and holidays

Access to learning resources and professional development

Free access to Hadley Designs products

Regular interaction with leadership, including the CEO and CMO

Stability from a decade as a family-founded, mission-driven brand



Apply Today

If you’re ready to help shape the future of learning in a growing company, we’d love to hear from you. Apply now to join the Hadley Designs team as our E-Commerce Business Manager and help us create a lasting impact on families, educators, and children worldwide.



P.S. If you don’t hear from us within 4 weeks of your application, please consider that we’ve d
 to move forward with other candidates. However, we truly appreciate your interest in Hadley Designs!



To formally apply here :

We already have some systems in place, your role is to help condense, improve, and maintain them at a high level. As well as being the point of contact for agents if things break or they want custom things added/taken out. 



?



Responsibilities:

 • Build and manage GoHighLevel pipelines, based on lead type (Final Expense, Term, IUL, etc.)

 • Create and optimize workflows (SMS,
, tagging, follow-ups)

 • Implement and maintain tagging logic across campaigns

 • Connect and manage 
 automations (webhooks, routing, integrations)

 • Assist with dialer integrations (TrackDrive, GHL LC Phone, WAVV, etc.)

 • Help implement AI-driven SMS workflows (appointment setting, lead engagement)

 • Troubleshoot automation issues and optimize system performance

 • Organize and maintain a scalable system structure across multiple subaccounts



?

title: Researcher / Admin
description:
About the Role



We are hiring a highly driven, detail-oriented Researcher / Admin to help support our operations and research team. This is a hands-on role for someone who works with urgency, takes ownership, and holds themselves to a high standard.



We are looking for someone who is accurate, fast, organized, and not afraid of hard work. The right person should be coachable but also strong-minded, able to receive direct feedback, improve quickly, and stay focused on hitting goals. This role requires someone who cares about getting things right, can think critically, and knows how to tell the difference between real information and bad information.



This is not a low-pressure role. We want someone with a strong work ethic who can move quickly, handle repetition without losing focus, and maintain high standards even under pressure. We are looking for someone proactive, reliable, and serious about growth within the company.



What You’ll Do



- Conduct research related to the entertainment industry

- Verify information for accuracy and determine what is credible and what is not

- Support admin and operational tasks tied to data quality and internal workflows

- Review information carefully and catch errors before they become bigger problems

- Maintain a high level of accuracy while working quickly

- Follow systems and processes while also noticing when something could be improved

- Assist with updating, organizing, and maintaining internal data

- Work alongside internal tools and AI systems as part of the workflow

- Help improve output by being consistent, thorough, and dependable

- Take feedback seriously and apply it quickly

- Contribute to a culture of high standards, urgency, and accountability



Who We’re Looking For



- Extremely detail-oriented and accurate

- Strong researcher who knows how to verify facts and assess source credibility

- Fast worker with a strong sense of urgency

- Highly organized and dependable

- Comfortable with direct feedback and able to improve quickly

- Strong work ethic and willing to put in the effort needed to get the job done

- Able to handle repetitive work without letting quality slip

- Self-motivated and does not need constant hand-holding

- Process-oriented but also able to think critically

- Serious, accountable, and focused on results

- Comfortable working outside normal hours or on weekends when needed



Preferred Background



- Experience in research, admin, operations support, or data entry and verification

- Strong online research skills

- Experience verifying information across multiple sources

- Entertainment industry knowledge is a plus

- Experience working with internal systems, databases, or AI tools is a plus

- Experience in fast-paced environments with high standards is a plus



What Success Looks Like in This Role



- Work is completed quickly and accurately

- Errors are caught before they create larger problems

- Information is verified carefully, not guessed

- Feedback is applied quickly and performance improves over time

- Tasks are handled with urgency, ownership, and consistency

- The person becomes someone the team can rely on completely



Candidate Profile



- Move fast without sacrificing quality

- Care about accuracy and getting the details right

- Are comfortable being held to a high standard

- Can take direct feedback without getting defensive

- Have a strong work ethic and do not make excuses

- Notice problems and take initiative

- Want to grow within a company that values performance

title: Supply Chain Manager
description:
IMPORTANT: In addition to applying for the job on this website, you must also submit your application by completing the form at the link below. Only applicants filling out the form will be considered. 







A B O U T  T R I P E A K C P G  C O N S U L T I N G

TriPeak CPG Consulting is a Fractional COO and outsourced operations firm serving founder-led Consumer Packaged

Goods brands across Food & Beverage, Supplements, and Consumer Products. Our clients are typically omni-channel

brands in the $2M–$20M revenue range, operating through co-manufacturers and 3PL partners. We work alongside

founders to streamline supply chain operations, reduce costs, and scale efficiently - without the overhead of a full-time

executive hire.

We are seeking an experienced Supply Chain Manager to support our Fractional COO and growing client portfolio on a

full-time basis who will provide high-quality client support.



R O L E  O V E R V I E W

This is a high-impact, hands-on role supporting multiple CPG clients simultaneously. You will work directly with the

Fractional COO to manage day-to-day supply chain operations, manage co-manufacturer relationships, and ensure

seamless fulfillment across retail, wholesale, and e-commerce channels. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-moving,

entrepreneurial environment and brings both strategic perspective and operational execution skills. Attention to detail is

critical for success in the role, as is being able to strategize the best course of action across multiple client priorities.



K E Y  R E S P O N S I B I L I T I E S

• Demand planning and forecasting across omni-channel sales to support inventory and procurement decisions

• Source, evaluate, and manage co-manufacturers and co-packers to support client inventory requirements

• Manage 3PL partner relationships, monitor KPIs, and resolve fulfillment issues proactively

• Oversee inbound and outbound freight — small parcel, LTL, and FTL — to minimize cost and transit time

• Support retailer and marketplace compliance including GS1 barcode setup and SPS Commerce EDI integration

• Set up and integrate clients within Cin7 Core (DEAR) including external integrations

• Coordinate operational workflows across Shopify, QuickBooks Online, and Cin7 Core inventory systems

• Manage data accuracy and timeliness in Cin7 Core ensuring that the system remains up to date at all times

• Assist with S&OP processes, cost optimization initiatives, and vendor negotiations on behalf of clients

• Identify supply chain risks and develop contingency plans appropriate for lean, growth-stage CPG brands



C H A N N E L  &  F R E I G H T  E X P E R I E N C E  R E Q U I R E D

• Retail & Wholesale • Small Parcel Carriers

• Amazon FBA • LTL Freight

• TikTok Shop (FBT) • FTL Freight

• Walmart WFS • International / Cross-Border (a plus)



T O O L S  &  S Y S T E M S  P R O F I C I E N C Y

• Cin7 Core (Inventory / ERP) • QuickBooks Online (QBO)

• Shopify (D2C & B2B) • Microsoft Office & Google Workspace

• SPS Commerce (EDI) • AI Tools: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini

• GS1 (Barcode / Item Setup)



Q U A L I F I C A T I O N S

• 5+ years of supply chain experience within the U.S. CPG industry (food, beverage, supplements, or consumer

products preferred)

• Fluent English communication — written and verbal — is required

• Availability during US business hours; fully remote position

• Proven ability to manage multiple client accounts or cross-functional projects simultaneously

• Strong communication and management skills with co-manufacturers, 3PLs, and freight carriers

• Familiarity with omni-channel compliance requirements across retail and marketplace platforms

• Comfortable working independently in a lean, fast-paced fractional/consulting environment
