title: TikTok Video Editor (UK Market)
description:
We are looking for a TikTok Video Editor to join our team and support our fast-growing fashion business. This role is ideal for someone who understands the UK TikTok market, loves short-form content, and has strong editing skills in women’s fashion and menswear.



The editor will be responsible for editing up to 40 TikTok short videos per day, so we need someone who is efficient, creative, and highly familiar with what makes videos go viral on TikTok.



Key Responsibilities



1. Edit up to 40 TikTok short videos daily



2. Create engaging, fast-paced, and high-converting TikTok content



3. Understand and use UK TikTok viral music, sounds, and current trends



4. Edit fashion videos for both women’s fashion and menswear



5. Add strong hooks, captions, transitions, and effects to improve video performance



6. Follow content directions while also bringing creative ideas to improve results



7. Ensure videos are aligned with TikTok trends and audience preferences in the UK market



Requirements



1. Strong experience in TikTok short video editing



2. Good understanding of UK TikTok trends, viral formats, and trending music



3. Experience editing fashion content, especially women’s fashion and menswear



4. Able to work quickly and handle a high daily video volume



5. Strong sense of pacing, hooks, and what drives engagement on TikTok



6. Responsible, efficient, and detail-oriented



7. Able to communicate well and deliver work on time



Pay



$2–$4 per hour

Performance-based bonus available



Application Requirement

Before joining the interview, all applicants must first send:



1. their video portfolio, or links/files of the TikTok videos they have edited or posted



2. Applications without portfolio examples will not be considered.



3. If you are passionate about TikTok, fashion, and viral short-form content, we would love to hear from you.



Please send to
: 
 and subject: ph.video editor

title: TikTok Shop Affiliate Growth Manager
description:
Role Summary

We are hiring an Affiliate Manager (Manager level) to manage and grow our UK TikTok creator network across fashion & lifestyle brands (including women’s and men’s products). You will handle creator communication, weekly creator meetings, product selection support, and performance tracking to drive GMV growth.



English must be very good. Must have the experience in TikTok creators management.



Key Responsibilities



Manage relationships with UK TikTok creators (female and male creators): weekly check-ins/meetings and daily communication.



Help creators grow GMV, including:



Recommending high-potential products and content angles



Supporting posting consistency and performance improvement



Sharing campaign updates, commission changes, and key product priorities



Support product selection across women’s + men’s fashion and related lifestyle categories based on conversion potential, demand, and trend signals.



Track and report creator performance and growth metrics (GMV, video volume, CTR, CVR, sample-to-post rate, top products/creators).



Maintain creator tracking sheets/CRM and ensure data accuracy with weekly updates.



Coordinate internally with operations/content teams to ensure creators receive the right links, commissions, assets, and support.



Identify problems early (low posting, low GMV, product mismatch) and propose actionable solutions.



Build and execute a structured weekly creator growth plan.



Requirements



Fluent English (written + spoken) — confident hosting meetings and communicating professionally with UK creators.



Strong interest in fashion & lifestyle (women’s and men’s trends, styling, product positioning).



Minimum 1 year of e-commerce experience, preferably TikTok Shop; 



Strong product sense: can evaluate products and select “winners” using both data and market understanding.



Excellent communication, interpersonal skills, and stakeholder management.



Organized, data-driven, and consistent with follow-ups and reporting.



Nice to Have



Experience managing creators/affiliates/KOLs/MCNs.



Familiarity with TikTok Shop affiliate links, commission strategy, and campaign operations.



Working Hours



Remote role (Philippines preferred).



6–8 hours/day, with flexibility during the onboarding period.



Compensation



Hourly pay + bonus opportunities based on performance up to $250-$500



Salary review after 6 months based on KPI achievement.

title: TikTok Affiliate Assistant (Part-Time)
description:
Role Summary

 We are hiring an Affiliate Assistant to support our TikTok Shop affiliate operations. The key focus of this role is to identify and recruit creators, onboard them to our agency, provide product links, and track creator performance to help creators and brands grow GMV. Our portfolio includes both women’s and men’s brands, and you will work with both female and male creators.



---

Key Responsibilities

Creator Outreach & Onboarding

- Identify potential TikTok creators daily (UK focus) across fashion & lifestyle categories.

- Send outreach messages, introduce the collaboration, and onboard creators to our agency process.

- Maintain a creator contact list/CRM and follow up consistently to convert leads into active creators.



Affiliate Link & Product Support

- Share product links with creators and guide them on which products are high-potential.

- Support basic product selection: understand product features, target audience, and why an item may convert well.

- Coordinate with internal teams/brands to get updated links, commission changes, and priority products.



Creator Management & Content Coordination

- Communicate with creators to encourage posting and maintain posting consistency.

- Track creators’ videos and performance (posted videos, views/engagement, GMV/sales where available).

- Support creators by sharing quick recommendations (best products, best angles, campaign updates).



Performance Tracking

- Track and update creator performance data weekly (and daily when needed).

- Prepare simple reports: active creators, posted videos, best-performing products/creators, gaps and next actions.

- Flag issues early (creators not posting, low performance, wrong product matching) and propose next steps.



Collaboration with Brands

- Work with brand teams to identify creator needs and recruit more creators to promote the brand.

- Support sampling/requests and ensure creators receive the correct information to start posting.



---

Requirements

- Basic to good English communication skills (written and spoken) — comfortable messaging creators and joining simple calls when needed.

- Minimum 2 years of e-commerce experience preferred (TikTok Shop or Amazon is a plus).

- Strong interest in fashion & lifestyle (women’s and men’s products).

- Good communication and interpersonal skills — confident speaking with creators and building relationships.

- Highly organized and detail-oriented (tracking sheets, follow-ups, link management).

- Strong and stable internet connection (required).

- Able to work independently, learn fast, and handle multiple tasks daily.

Nice to Have

- Experience with TikTok Shop affiliate/creator outreach, MCN/agency work, or influencer marketing.

title: Real Estate Lead Research and Marketing Assistant
description:
About Us:

Jack McCann Multifamily Advisors is a boutique multifamily advisory team operating under Lyon Stahl Investment Real Estate in Southern California. We work exclusively with apartment building owners and investors to help them buy, sell, and optimize their properties. We're a fast-growing team building something different in the brokerage space and we need a sharp, reliable operator behind the scenes to help us scale.



About the Role:

This is a research-heavy operations role. You will spend the majority of your time finding, organizing, and inputting data on real estate owners, properties, and market activity. You will also assist with preparing marketing materials for property listings. If you are detail-oriented, fast, and take ownership of your work without being micromanaged, this role is a great fit.



What You'll Be Doing:

Research and Prospecting: We will provide you with lists of property owners and targets. Your job is to research each one, find relevant contact information and property details, organize everything into a clean spreadsheet, and then input that data accurately into our CRM (HubSpot).

Market Research: Track active listings, pending sales, and closed transactions across our target markets and maintain a running spreadsheet updated on a regular basis.

Offering Memorandums and BOVs: Once trained, you will assemble offering memorandums and broker opinion of value documents using templates and property information we provide. Attention to detail and clean formatting are critical here.

Administrative Support: Light tasks including booking travel, scheduling, and other operational support as needed.



What We're Looking For:

- Strong English communication skills, written and verbal

- Extremely detail-oriented with clean, organized data entry

- Comfortable learning new software quickly (HubSpot, Google Sheets, CoStar a plus)

- Self-directed and reliable, you complete tasks on time without constant follow up

- Prior experience in real estate research or CRE is a plus but not required

- Available during Pacific Standard Time business hours (Or not so long as you get the necessary work completed)

title: Agentic AI Expert — Remote, Contract

STAFFOS — an AI services agency building agentic AI systems for clients. We design, deploy, and manage autonomous AI agent installations that handle real business workflows.



Both businesses run on agentic AI infrastructure, not chatbots. We're looking for someone who builds in this space daily.



The Role

* Can work with OpenRouter, Anthropic API, or similar LLM routing layers

* Can work independently, communicate async, and ship fast



Details

* Type: Contract / project-based to start, with potential for ongoing work

* Location: Remote, worldwide

* Pay: Competitive, based on experience



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



Send your application to: 



Your
 subject line must be exactly: "Agent Builder — [Your Name]"



In your
, include:

Applications that don't follow these three instructions will not be reviewed.

// What You’ll Be Doing



You will own the full sales cycle:

- Calling qualified prospects already in our CRM or sourcing your own leads

- Running booked and self-scheduled meetings via Zoom (as needed)

- Conducting structured discovery conversations

- Presenting services, pricing, and territory options

- Handling objections with confidence

- Negotiating and finalizing agreements

- Handing off closed deals to onboarding and fulfillment



Additional responsibilities include:

- Managing and updating pipeline stages in HubSpot

- Calling unworked and follow-up leads in the queue

- Collaborating with sales team to increase show-up rates

- Reporting weekly numbers and deal progress



// Role Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- Proven experience closing warm B2B leads

- Strong phone presence and comfort calling prospects directly

- Excellent discovery skills and active listening

- Ability to control the call without sounding pushy

- Confidence running full discovery ? offer ? objection ? close

- Organized, reliable, and process-driven with strong CRM discipline

- Data-focused mindset (show-up rate, close rate, revenue tracked)

- Ability to commit to consistent weekly availability



[!] This is not cold calling strangers. Every contact is warm, pre-educated, and entered by Setters, Webinars, or our Research team [!]



// Bonus Points (We Can Train These)

- Experience selling to home service companies

- HubSpot or similar CRM familiarity

- Prior remote sales or BDR roles

- Understanding of property management relationships



You don’t need to know our industry — but you must already know how to close.



// Must Submit to Be Considered

- We don’t accept guesses — only performance. Please provide:

- Past 6–12 months closing metrics, including:

--- Show-up rate

--- Close rate

--- Average deal size

--- Total revenue closed

--- Industry sold into

--- 3–5 recorded closing calls (highly preferred)

- Short Loom or video introduction

- Brief outline of your closing method or call flow



// What You Get

- High volume of warm, qualified opportunities

- Proven scripts, call flows, and presentation frameworks

- Continuous training, coaching, and leadership development

- Fast-moving team with significant growth potential

- Flexible remote work with performance-based earnings



// Do Not Apply If You Are

- Trying to “get into closing” without a track record

- Easily discouraged or unwilling to make outbound calls

- Avoidant of CRM usage or data updates

- Dependent on high-pressure sales tactics

- Uncomfortable being measured on performance



// PAY RATE:

- Pay: PHP80K-120K/month DOE + Commission

- Commission: Paid per signed contract [uncapped]

- Earning Potential: High-performers hit PHP200,000+ per month

- Commission is uncapped — show us you can close and you’ll write your own paycheck.



// How to Apply

- Send the following:

- Résumé

- Verified sales statistics

- Loom or video introduction (strongly recommended)

- Call recordings (if available)



**APPLY HERE:

title: FULL STACK MARKETER
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We're a multi-business operator looking for a sharp, execution-focused marketer who embraces AI tools as a core part of their workflow. You'll work directly alongside the business owner to move fast on marketing tasks, using AI to do the heavy lifting, then stepping in with your expertise to polish, refine, and publish.



This is not a strategy-only role. We need someone who gets things done, someone who can go from brief to published without needing their hand held every step of the way.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

• Content & Copy — Write and edit marketing copy across
, social, ads, landing pages, AI-assisted, human-polished

• Website Edits — Make front-end updates in CSS and visual builders (Bricks for WordPress, Elementor, or similar)

•
 Marketing — Set up and manage campaigns, sequences, and automations in tools like ActiveCampaign, Mailchimp, etc.

• Social Media — Schedule and publish content, manage accounts, monitor performance

• Paid Ads Support — Assist with ad copy, creative briefs, and basic campaign setup on Meta and Google

• SEO Tasks — On-page SEO updates, metadata, basic keyword research using AI-powered tools

• Funnels & Landing Pages — Build and edit sales funnels, opt-in pages, and thank-you pages

• Graphic Design Support — Create or edit visual assets using Canva, Adobe Express, or similar tools

• Analytics & Reporting — Pull basic performance reports and flag what's working and what isn't

• AI Workflow Execution — Use tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, and others to accelerate output across all of the above



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

? Genuinely excited about AI tools and uses them daily

? Solid written English — for copy,
s, and comms

? Comfortable editing websites (CSS + visual builders like Bricks/Elementor)

? Experience across multiple marketing channels — not just one

? Self-starter who can take a task and run with it

? Detail-oriented — you notice when something looks off

? Reliable, communicates proactively, meets deadlines

? Bonus: experience with WordPress, funnels, or paid ads



TOOLS YOU'LL LIKELY USE

Claude / ChatGPT · Midjourney / DALL·E · WordPress + Bricks · Elementor · CSS · Canva · ActiveCampaign / Mailchimp · Meta Ads Manager · Google Analytics · Notion / Trello · Zapier / Make · Ahrefs / SEMrush



TO APPLY

Send us a short introduction telling us:

1. Which AI tools you use regularly and how you use them

2. An example of a marketing task you completed mostly using AI

3. Links to any websites, funnels, or content you've worked on

4. Your experience with WordPress or visual page builders

title: Customer Service Representative (Remote)
description:
About Us



Let’s See Italy is a Rome-based tour operator dedicated to delivering unforgettable travel experiences across Italy. We specialize in high-quality, immersive tours that showcase the culture, history, and beauty of Italy. Our team is passionate about hospitality, customer satisfaction, and creating seamless travel experiences for our guests.



Role Overview

We are seeking a Customer Service Representative to join our remote team. This role is essential in ensuring our customers receive exceptional support before, during, and after their tours. You will be the primary point of contact for clients, handling inquiries, resolving issues, and maintaining the high standards of service our brand is known for.



Key Responsibilities

- Respond to customer inquiries via
, chat, and phone in a timely and professional manner

- Assist customers with bookings, changes, cancellations, and general tour information

- Provide personalized recommendations and support to enhance the customer experience

- Resolve customer concerns efficiently while maintaining a positive tone - Coordinate with internal teams (operations, guides, logistics) to ensure smooth service delivery

- Maintain accurate records of customer interactions and transactions

- Uphold the company’s high standards of hospitality and service excellence



Requirements

- Fluent/native-level English (written and spoken) is required

- Proven experience in customer service, preferably in hospitality, travel, or tourism

- Strong communication and problem-solving skills

- Ability to work independently in a remote environment

- Comfortable handling high volumes of customer interactions

- Flexible availability to work shifts within 8:00 AM – 12:00 AM CET

- Tech-savvy and comfortable using customer service platforms, booking systems, and communication tools



Preferred Qualifications

- Experience in the travel or tour industry

- Familiarity with Italy as a destination (Rome knowledge is a plus)

- Additional languages are a bonus What We Offer

- Fully remote position with flexible scheduling

- Opportunity to work with a passionate, international team

- Involvement in a fast-growing travel company

- Competitive compensation based on experience

title: Senior Full Stack Developer (Laravel + React) - AI-Powered Development
description:
About the Role:

We are looking for a senior, high-output Full Stack Developer who leverages AI coding tools to build at exceptional speed. You will work on the Archimedes project using Laravel and React, and you are expected to produce large volumes of production-quality code daily using AI-assisted development (vibe coding).



This is NOT a traditional development role. We need someone who has fully embraced AI-powered coding workflows — using tools like Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Claude, ChatGPT, or similar — to write hundreds to thousands of lines of clean, working code per day. If you are not already using AI tools daily in your development workflow, this role is not for you.



Responsibilities:

- Build and ship features at high velocity using AI-assisted coding tools (Cursor, Copilot, Claude, etc.)

- Develop full-stack web applications using Laravel (backend) and React (frontend)

- Produce large volumes of clean, tested, production-ready code daily

- Use AI tools strategically: generate boilerplate, scaffold components, write tests, refactor code, debug issues

- Build and optimize RESTful APIs with Laravel, including auth, validation, and complex business logic

- Develop responsive, performant React interfaces with modern state management

- Design database schemas, write optimized queries, and manage migrations

- Review AI-generated code critically — you must understand what you ship, not just prompt and paste

- Participate in code reviews and maintain code quality despite high output speed



Required Skills:

- 6+ years of professional full-stack development experience

- Expert-level Laravel (routing, Eloquent ORM, middleware, queues, events, testing)

- Expert-level React (hooks, context, state management, component architecture)

- MANDATORY: Daily, proficient use of AI coding tools (Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, ChatGPT, or equivalent). You must demonstrate how you use these tools in your workflow

- Proven ability to produce high-volume, high-quality code output consistently

- Strong understanding of PHP 8+ and modern JavaScript/TypeScript (ES6+)

- Solid knowledge of relational databases (MySQL or PostgreSQL) and query optimization

- Strong software engineering fundamentals: algorithms, data structures, system architecture

- Clean code practices: SOLID principles, design patterns, refactoring

- Experience with Git, CI/CD pipelines, and automated testing



What We Mean by "Vibe Coding":

- You use AI tools as a force multiplier, not a crutch

- You can prompt effectively to generate complex, working code blocks

- You review and refine AI output with your senior engineering judgment

- You use AI for: scaffolding, boilerplate, test generation, refactoring, documentation

- You combine AI speed with human quality control

- Your daily output is 3-5x what a traditional developer produces



Nice to Have:

- Experience with Docker and containerized development environments

- Knowledge of Redis, queue systems (Laravel Horizon), and caching strategies

- TypeScript experience in React projects

- Cloud services familiarity (AWS, GCP, or Azure)



Requirements:

- Minimum 6 years of full-stack development experience

- English level: B2 or higher (daily communication in English)

- Available to overlap with CET timezone (at least 4 hours/day)

- Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

- Must currently use AI coding tools in daily work (we will verify this)



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary: $1,000 - $1,500/month

- Full-time remote position

- Long-term engagement with growth opportunities

- International team working on cutting-edge AI-powered workflows

- Access to premium AI tools (Cursor Pro, Claude Pro, etc.)



HOW TO APPLY:

Step 1: Complete our technical assessment at 

Step 2: Submit your application here on OnlineJobs.ph

Step 3: In your application, describe your AI coding workflow:

- Which AI tools do you use daily?

- How many lines of code do you typically produce per day?

- Share an example of a project you built using AI tools



Applications without a completed assessment will NOT be considered.

Applications without AI workflow description will NOT be considered.

title: High-Volume Healthcare Recruiter
description:
(ABA – RBT & BCBA Hiring)



We are a new ABA (Applied Behavior Analysis) company providing therapy services to children with autism. Our mission is serious, and so is our recruiting.



We are hiring a full-time recruiter who thrives in high-volume, fast-paced environments and is comfortable owning hiring results in a competitive market.



This is not a passive or administrative recruiting role. This is a production-driven role.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:



-Recruiting and scheduling interviews for RBTs (Registered Behavior Technicians) and BCBAs

-High-volume sourcing and outreach (LinkedIn, job boards, cold messaging, referrals)

-Managing candidate pipelines daily

-Reducing interview no-shows and offer drop-offs

-Tracking and reporting weekly recruiting KPIs

-Following up persistently with candidates

-Owning outcomes — not just activity



The Reality of This Role:



-Candidates will cancel.

-Interviews will reschedule.

-Offers will sometimes fall through.

-The market is competitive.



We need someone who does not get discouraged by churn and who responds by increasing activity and refining the approach.



If you prefer slow, strategic, highly structured recruiting environments, this is likely not the right role.



What We’re Looking For



-3+ years recruiting experience (high-volume preferred)

-Experience with healthcare, staffing, or entry-level recruiting is a plus

-Comfortable with cold outreach and phone screening

-Strong spoken English and clear communication

-Emotionally steady and solution-oriented

-KPI-driven mindset (you track activity and conversion)



Comfortable working U.S. business hours

title: Recruiter - ABA
description:
Job Description



We are a growing ABA (Applied Behavior Analysis) agency in the U.S. focused on delivering high-quality, ethical behavioral therapy services to children and families. We are building a strong, dependable team and are looking for a dedicated, detail-oriented Recruiter to own and manage our hiring process from start to finish.



This role is critical to our growth. We are not looking for someone who simply posts ads and forwards resumes. We want a recruiter who understands follow-up, screening, organization, and accountability, and who can consistently move candidates through the pipeline.



Key Responsibilities



Recruit and source candidates for RBTs, BCBAs, and other clinical and support roles (primarily U.S.-based)



Post, manage, and optimize job listings across multiple job platforms



Review resumes and conduct initial candidate screenings



Schedule and coordinate interviews with management



Maintain accurate and organized candidate tracking (spreadsheets, ATS, or CRM)



Consistently follow up with candidates to reduce drop-off



Communicate candidate status updates clearly and regularly



Ensure hiring steps are followed correctly and on time



Help refine recruiting processes, workflows, and hiring systems



Track recruiting metrics and report progress when requested



Required Qualifications



Proven experience as a recruiter or talent acquisition specialist



Strong written and spoken English communication skills



Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail



Ability to manage multiple open roles simultaneously



Comfortable using spreadsheets, ATS platforms, or CRMs



Strong follow-up habits and time management skills



Reliable internet connection and ability to work independently



Willingness to overlap with U.S. business hours when needed



Preferred / Bonus Qualifications



Experience recruiting for ABA agencies or healthcare roles



Experience hiring RBTs and/or BCBAs



Familiarity with U.S. hiring standards and expectations



Experience building or improving recruiting systems and SOPs



Long-term mindset and interest in growing with the company



What We Offer



Full-time, remote, long-term position



Competitive compensation based on experience



Clear expectations and structured workflows



Direct communication with leadership



Opportunity to grow into a senior recruiting or operations role



Application Instructions



Applicants should include:



A brief summary of relevant recruiting experience



Examples of roles successfully filled



Availability and preferred working hours



Only candidates with relevant recruiting experience will be considered.

title: AI automation / Python developer
description:
You are my Executive Job Research & Monitoring Assistant for the next 6 months.

Your responsibility is to track senior leadership roles (CMO / CDO / VP Marketing & Digital) across my target countries, filter them using simple AI assistance, and send me one structured weekly digest with the top opportunities.



No coding. No advanced automation.

Use only simple tools. LinkedIn alerts, job boards,
 filters, and ChatGPT/Notion for summarizing.



GOAL

– Reduce my search time to zero

– Identify only high-value senior positions

– Flag urgent “must apply” roles

– Provide one clean weekly summary



TARGET ROLES

– CMO / Chief Marketing Officer

– CDO / Chief Digital Officer

– VP Marketing / VP Digital / VP Growth

– Global or Regional Head of Digital / Marketing / Omnichannel



TARGET COUNTRIES

France, Netherlands, Belgium, Switzerland, Italy, Spain, Luxembourg, UAE.



TARGET SECTORS (priority)

Pharma, healthcare, life sciences, insurance, luxury, beauty, B2B SaaS, global consumer.



YOUR TOOLS (simple, no technical setup)



LinkedIn Alerts

Set up job alerts for each target country + titles above.

Check them daily (5–10 minutes).



Job Boards 
 alerts)

– Indeed

– Glassdoor

– Stepstone

– Welcome to the Jungle (FR)

– Bayt (UAE)

Activate job alerts.

All job alert
s should go into one Gmail folder using a filter.



AI Support

Use ChatGPT to help you quickly summarize and classify roles or Python to automate 

Example.

Copy/paste the job description and ask.

“Score this job from 0 to 100 for Kevin’s profile (CMO/CDO/VP) and list 3 reasons why.”

This prevents mistakes and saves you time.



Tracking tool (No Google Sheet. Use Notion)

Create a simple Notion board with columns.

– Country

– Company

– Job Title

– Link

– Quick AI Fit Score (0–100)

– Category (Must Apply / Good / Optional)

– Notes (1–2 bullets)



This takes 10 seconds per role.



Weekly Digest (every Friday)

Send me one
 with.



A. Short summary (5 lines max).

– number of new jobs found

– highlights

– any sector trends you noticed



B. “Must Apply” section (top priority)

Include.

– Company

– Title

– Country

– Link

– AI fit score

– 2 reasons why it’s a fit



C. “Good Opportunities” section

Same structure but for secondary roles.



D. “Other Interesting” section (optional)



Urgent Alerts

If you see a very strong role, send it immediately.

Subject. “URGENT – Role to Review”



Use a simple rule.

If AI Fit Score >= 85 ? send immediately.



YOUR PRIORITY

Your job is NOT to list everything.

Your job is to filter aggressively so I only see the strongest, most senior roles.



TIME COMMITMENT

– Daily scanning. 10–15 minutes

– Friday digest. 20 minutes

– That’s it. No development, no coding, no technical setup.

title: Senior Executive Assistant – Remote (Philippines)

Long-term collaboration. Immediate start.

s), including adapting tone and content for executive communication

s, CVs, applications, presentations) using Word and AI tools

title: Recruitment and Marketing Coordinator - Virtual Assistant
description:
We are looking for a Student Recruitment and Marketing Coordinator VA to conduct sales and marketing Outbound Calls. title: Sales Closer – Car Rental & Leasing Business
description:
About Sin City Rides



Sin City Rides is a Las Vegas-based car rental company helping Uber, Lyft, DoorDash, Amazon, and other delivery drivers get reliable vehicles on the road — fast. We provide affordable weekly rentals with unlimited mileage, maintenance included, and no credit checks.



As we continue to expand, we’re looking for driven and persuasive Sales Representatives / Sales Closers to help connect more drivers with vehicles and ensure our fleet stays active on the road.



Position Overview



The Sales Representative / Sales Closer will be responsible for generating new leads, closing deals, and ensuring drivers are successfully onboarded and driving. This position requires consistent daily outreach — both organic and inorganic — through platforms like Instagram,
, and other social channels.



You’ll be the voice and face of Sin City Rides, helping potential clients overcome obstacles, understand our rental options, and join our driver network.



Key Responsibilities



Conduct 50 offers or outreach interactions per day through social media (Instagram,
, and other platforms).



Handle inbound and outbound leads to convert prospects into active car rentals.



Present rental options, pricing, and benefits clearly and persuasively.



Collect and verify required client information (driver’s license, background check, insurance, etc.).



Identify client pain points and provide solutions (e.g., flexible rentals, no credit check, unlimited miles).



Maintain accurate client records and follow up promptly with leads.



Collaborate with the operations team to ensure clients are approved, assigned vehicles, and ready to drive.



Maintain consistent communication with professionalism and enthusiasm.



Requirements



Proven experience in sales closing, car rental, automotive, or B2C sales roles.



Confident communicator with strong persuasion and negotiation skills.



Social media savvy — comfortable engaging with prospects on Instagram,
, and other platforms.



Organized, proactive, and goal-oriented — able to manage 50+ daily outreach tasks.



Familiarity with rideshare and delivery industries (Uber, Lyft, DoorDash, Amazon, etc.) preferred.



Tech-proficient (Google Workspace, CRM systems, spreadsheets).



Self-starter with the ability to work independently and hit performance targets.



Compensation



Competitive pay with commission and performance-based bonuses.



Long-term growth potential in a rapidly expanding company.



How to Apply



To apply, please send the following to ???? 



Subject line: Sales Representative / Sales Closer Application – [Your Name]



Your application must include:



Resume



Cover Letter – explain your sales background and why you’re a great fit for Sin City Rides.



1-Minute Introduction Video – introduce yourself and explain how you can bring value to our company.

title: Sales Closer – Car Rental & Leasing Business
description:
About Sin City Rides LV

Sin City Rides LV is a Las Vegas-based car rental company offering a range of vehicles from economy to luxury. We cater to personal users, long-term lessees, and gig economy drivers such as those working with Uber, Lyft, and DoorDash. With flexible terms, no credit checks, and a commitment to premium customer service, we simplify and streamline the rental experience.



As part of our continued growth, we are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Sales Closer to join our remote team. This role plays a critical part in converting qualified leads into finalized rental or lease agreements and supporting our expanding operations.



Position Overview

The Sales Closer will be responsible for handling warm, qualified leads and guiding them through the final stages of our rental or leasing process. This role requires excellent communication skills, strong sales experience, and a results-driven mindset. The ideal candidate is professional, persuasive, and committed to delivering a seamless client experience.



Key Responsibilities

1. Convert pre-qualified leads into successful rental or lease agreements by following up promptly and closing sales effectively.

2. Engage with clients via phone,
, text, and messaging platforms to understand their vehicle needs and provide appropriate solutions.

3. Confidently handle client objections and clearly explain the terms, programs, and benefits.

4. Guide clients through all required documentation, ensuring completeness and accuracy.

5. Maintain accurate records of client interactions, bookings, and performance metrics.

6. Collaborate with the Lead Generation and Operations teams to optimize the sales process and improve lead quality.

7. Provide feedback for continuous process improvement.



Qualifications

Proven experience in sales, particularly in rental, auto leasing, real estate, or other service-based industries.

Demonstrated ability to close deals and meet or exceed sales targets.

Strong interpersonal and negotiation skills.

Ability to work independently and maintain professionalism in a remote environment.

Familiarity with CRM tools and sales tracking platforms is an advantage.

Social media content creation experience is a plus, but not required.



Compensation and Benefits

Commission-based compensation per successful rental or lease agreement

Flexible, remote work environment

Opportunity to grow within a fast-expanding and dynamic rental business

Performance-based incentives and advancement opportunities



How to Apply

Interested applicants should send the following to 
 with the subject line:

"Sales Closer Application – Sin City Rides LV"

1. An updated resume

2, A short video introduction (1–2 minutes), briefly describing your sales experience and why you’re interested in the role

title: WordPress, SEO, Keyword Specialist
description:

title: Amazon PPC Specialist
description:
We are a leading UK paint brand looking for a detail-oriented Amazon PPC Specialist to join our media team. This is a critical role designed to support our global operations across Amazon and various retail media platforms.



You won't just be pushing buttons; you will be the guardian of our advertising account health. While you will work under the guidance of our Senior Media Buyer, you will be the primary engine behind the daily execution, ensuring our campaigns are lean, targeted, and performing at peak efficiency.



Key Responsibilities

Your day-to-day will involve the "technical heavy lifting" required to maintain a multi-marketplace presence:

Campaign Hygiene: Perform daily and weekly account checks to ensure all systems are "go" and budgets are pacing correctly.

Execution: Update targeting, manage bid adjustments, and implement negative keyword harvesting based on performance data.

Bulk Operations: Manage large-scale changes via Excel uploads and the Amazon Ads console.

Reporting: Download, clean, and synthesize data into actionable reports for the senior team.

Campaign Build-outs: Create and launch new campaigns following the structures provided by the Senior Media Buyer.



About You

We are looking for someone who finds satisfaction in the details. You are more than comfortable using excel and the amazon ads console. You understand that in PPC, a small mistake can lead to a massive waste of budget.



Technical Requirements:

Amazon Ads Console Mastery: You are a "power user" who knows where every setting lives.

Excel Power User: You are comfortable with VLOOKUPs, Pivot Tables, and data manipulation. You understand how to use bulk files to save time.

Analytical Mindset: You can spot a trend in a search term report before it becomes a problem.

Process-Oriented: You enjoy following a checklist to ensure nothing is missed, but you are smart enough to flag when a process needs improvement.

Experience: Proven experience managing Amazon PPC (SP, SB, SD).Experience with multi-marketplace accounts is a significant plus.



Additional Technical Nice to Have:

 - Comfortable with using Data dive, Helium10, and Seller Board

 - Office 365 and PowerPoint (Teams etc.)

 - Managed accounts with a large number of campaigns



Process:

The process involves an initial introductory call with the Media Buyer, then a 2nd interview with a case study task. 



Hours:

The role is remote, part time, within 9 am to 4 PM UK Time

title: Growth Marketing Contractor
description:
Growth Marketing Contractor  

 



About TA Plus 



TA Plus (TA+) is a digital platform designed to empower older adults to live purposeful, connected, and engaged lives. As part of Transforming Age, we bring together technology, community services, and partnerships to support older adults and their families as they explore activities, housing, and care options. 



 



About the Role 



We are seeking an experienced Growth Marketing Contractor to help drive user acquisition, engagement, and brand presence for TA+. This role combines digital marketing, social media, campaign strategy, and analytics. The ideal candidate has hands-on experience building growth programs from the ground up and is comfortable operating independently in a fast-moving environment. 



The primary goal of this role is to develop and execute a growth strategy that accelerates TA+ toward reaching 10,000 active users and 20?ily Active Users. 





Responsibilities 



Growth Strategy & Campaign Development 



Develop and implement a user acquisition strategy targeting older adults and ARC personas (family caregivers, adult children, and care advocates) 



Identify high-potential channels, partnerships, and communities to drive awareness and engagement 



Create messaging frameworks and campaign plans aligned to TA+’s mission and user needs 



Design and execute digital marketing campaigns (organic, social,
, referral, or paid ads) 



 



Social Media & Content Creation 



Establish TA+ social media presence across recommended platforms 



Create content strategies and manage consistent posting 



Produce or supervise creation of posts, graphics, videos, and engagement content 



Build a sustainable content calendar and brand voice guidelines 



 



Analytics & Performance Optimization 



Set up and manage Google Analytics 4, including events and funnels 



Track KPIs related to acquisition, activation, engagement, and retention 



Analyze performance and provide actionable recommendations 



Run A/B tests and optimize messaging, landing pages, and user flows 



Create weekly performance reports with insights and optimizations 



 



Marketing Operations & Enablement 



Build reusable templates, workflows, and reporting tools 



Develop flyers, posters, and collateral for online and in-person outreach 



Support cross-functional initiatives related to user onboarding and product experience 



 



Qualifications 



5+ years experience in digital marketing, growth marketing, or performance marketing 



Proven experience driving user acquisition for a digital platform or SaaS product 



Strong skills in GA4, campaign analytics, content creation, and social media strategy 



Experience creating marketing materials (using Canva, Adobe, or similar tools) 



Ability to work independently and produce measurable results 



Experience with senior audiences or caregiver communities is a plus 



 



Success in This Role Looks Like 



Clear growth strategy with prioritized channels 



Established social media presence and content engine 



Improved funnel conversion and engagement 



Demonstrated increase in users and daily activity 



Sustainable marketing workflows the internal team can maintain long-term

title: Full-Time Video Editor | Supplement Brand scaling fast
description:
We’re building a fast-scaling DTC brand in the health supplement space, with aggressive growth plans over the coming months. Our focus is simple: high-performance creative, rapid testing, and scaling what works.



You’ll be working directly with the founders and a senior creative team with deep experience in performance marketing. This is an opportunity to get in early, contribute directly to growth, and earn a key role as the team expands.



Top performers will benefit from performance-based bonuses and growing earning potential as we scale.



The Role



We’re looking for a Video Editor who can consistently produce high-performing Meta ads (30–120s). This is a long-term remote role with strong growth potential as we scale creative output and build a larger team.



What You’ll Do

Edit high-converting ads for Meta & Google (30–120s)

Craft strong hooks, pacing, captions, and transitions

Work with UGC, b-roll, and AI-generated content (Heygen, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana, VEO3)

Test multiple formats: UGC-style, TikTok ads, AI visuals, and VSLs

Analyze performance metrics (hook rate, hold rate, CVR) and iterate quickly

Collaborate closely with the Creative Manager and team

Source raw footage and voiceovers to execute concepts

Continuously experiment with new angles, trends, and storytelling styles



 What You Need

Experience editing performance-driven Meta ads (UGC/direct response)

A proven portfolio of short-form direct response ads

Strong creative instincts and ability to deliver high output (15+ concepts/week)

Understanding of marketing psychology, hooks, and buyer behavior

A growth mindset — comfortable testing, failing, and improving fast



Important

We do not accept fake or borrowed portfolios. Every applicant will complete a short practical test to verify skill level. We value transparency and want to work with editors who genuinely know their craft.



What You’ll Get

Performance-based bonuses from month 2 tied directly to results. the better your creatives perform, the more you earn. We reward output that drives real revenue, not just activity.

The opportunity to grow beyond just editing, into creative strategy, concept development, and performance analysis

The chance to take ownership as we scale, including mentoring new editors and stepping into senior or lead roles

Exposure to high-level performance marketing systems, testing frameworks, and scaling strategies

A team culture built around speed, iteration, and constant improvement — where your work directly impacts revenue



Compensation will be discussed based on your level of experience, skill, and overall performance.



How to Apply



?Important: Only applications submitted through the form will be considered.

title: Post Production Specialist
description:

mbers to maintain workflow efficiency.

title: Remote Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler

Strong understanding of structural systems, especially for multi-level and heavy storage buildings.

Excellent attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

title: Commercial Property Operations Coordinator
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE, YOU MUST SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND VIDEO INTRODUCTION.****** 



Commercial Property Operations Coordinator



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Pacific Time, with a 1-hour break

Salary: $1100 per month



Job Overview:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly organized Commercial Property Operations Coordinator to support a commercial real estate portfolio of retail and office properties by overseeing maintenance tracking, vendor coordination, compliance monitoring, lease administration support, and day-to-day operational follow-ups. This role works closely with the onshore property management team to ensure tasks are properly tracked, vendors are consistently followed up with, timelines are met, and nothing falls through the cracks during high-volume periods. Spanish-speaking ability is required to effectively communicate with Spanish-speaking vendors.



Key Responsibilities:



* Maintenance & Work Order Tracking

Maintain a master log of maintenance and repair items across commercial properties

Track work orders from scheduling through completion and invoicing

Follow up with vendors and onsite staff to confirm timelines and status

Flag delays, non-responses, or repeat issues for escalation

Maintain clear status categories (requested, scheduled, in progress, completed, invoiced)



* Vendor Coordination & Follow-Up

Send bid requests and RFPs using approved templates

Track incoming proposals and follow up on outstanding bids

Coordinate vendor scheduling and access after vendor selection

Collect close-out documentation (photos, completion confirmation, invoices)

Assist with vendor onboarding documentation (W-9s, COIs, licenses)



* Administrative & Compliance Support

Answer office phone

Track routine inspections, testing, and compliance items (fire/life safety, elevator, backflow, etc.)

Assist with COI tracking for tenants and vendors

Support documentation requests from tenants, vendors, lenders, and internal team

title: Google Ads & SEO Specialist — US Digital Marketing Agency
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We are a US-based digital marketing agency specializing in the yacht/marine and real estate industries. Our clients are high-ticket businesses that expect measurable results — not vanity metrics. We need a skilled specialist who can own Google Ads campaigns and SEO strategy end-to-end and is comfortable being held accountable to performance data.

WHAT YOU'LL DO

—

Build, manage, and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, Performance Max) for US-based clients

—

Conduct keyword research, on-page SEO, and technical audits for client websites

—

Track and report performance via Google Analytics 4 and Google Search Console

—

Write or optimize title tags, meta descriptions, headers, and page copy for search

—

Build local SEO presence — GMB optimization, citation building, review strategy

—

Provide weekly performance summaries with clear KPIs and recommendations

REQUIREMENTS — DO NOT APPLY WITHOUT THESE

—

Minimum 2 years managing Google Ads accounts with documented results (ROAS, conversions, CPA improvements)

—

Hands-on SEO experience — not just theoretical knowledge

—

Proficiency in Google Search Console, GA4, Google Keyword Planner, and SEMrush or Ahrefs

—

Strong written English — you will communicate with US clients

—

Reliable internet and a consistent work setup

NICE TO HAVE

—

Experience in marine, luxury, or real estate industries

—

Familiarity with GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM

—

Google Ads or Analytics certification

—

Basic understanding of landing page conversion optimization

HOW TO APPLY

In your application, include: (1) a short description of a campaign or SEO project you managed and the specific result you achieved — numbers only, no vague claims. (2) Tools you use daily. Applications without this will not be reviewed.

title: Google Specialist — High-Ticket B2B | US Market
description:
Who this is for

We are a US-based digital marketing agency managing campaigns for high-ticket B2B clients. Average client deal sizes start at $120,000. We need a specialist who has managed Google Ads and SEO where a single lead is worth $50,000+ to the client. If you have not done this at that level, do not apply.

This starts as one account. Perform well and you will be running 3–5 accounts within 90 days. We are growing fast and we need someone we can plug into every new client immediately.



What you will be doing

Google Ads:



-Audit, rebuild, and manage campaigns from scratch on every new account

-Exact and phrase match only — no broad match without 60 days of data to justify it

-Write qualifying ad copy with price signals and intent filters built into the headline

-Weekly search term reviews — adding negatives continuously, not once at setup

-Full conversion tracking setup — every form, call, download, and booking attributed correctly

-Google Display retargeting matched to each client's sales cycle length

-Report cost per qualified lead by campaign every month — not impressions, not CTR



SEO:



-Build keyword cluster architectures by product, use case, industry, and location

-Deliver full page briefs for each target — keyword, URL slug, H1, meta title, meta description, content outline, internal links

-Bottom-funnel commercial intent first, always

-Monthly rank tracking in Google Search Console from day pages go live

-Technical SEO audits — crawlability, page speed, schema, indexing issues flagged with specific fixes

-Competitor gap analysis on every new account

-Ranking=Traffic Traffic=Leads Leads=Satisfied Client





Requirements



-Minimum 3 years managing Google Ads for B2B clients specifically — not ecommerce, not consumer

-Proven SEO results you personally executed — rankings, traffic, or leads with before and after proof

-Current Google Ads certification if applicable

-GA4 proficiency — setup from scratch, not just reading reports

-Fluent written and spoken English





What you must submit — incomplete applications will not be opened



-SEO case study — one real example with keyword targets, pages built, Search Console screenshots, and the outcome.

-Successful Google Ad campaign that shows growth, leads, reporting, etc. 



You must deliver a monthly performance report for every account you manage. The report must be clean, professional, and written in plain English that a business owner can read without a marketing background. It must cover qualified leads generated, cost per qualified lead by campaign, keyword ranking movement, what was optimized that month, and the specific actions planned for the following month. No vanity metrics. No fluff. This report goes directly to our clients under the SK Marketing Solutions brand — it reflects on us, not just on you. If you cannot produce this consistently every month without being chased, this role is not for you.



Thanks a lot! 

Spencer Kinnett

Founder SK Marketing Solutions

title: Experienced Social Media Manager
description:
Job Overview



We are looking for a Social Media Manager who has a marketing background who will take ownership of client social media accounts from strategy through execution. This person will manage content calendars, coordinate approvals, create and schedule posts across platforms, monitor engagement, and track performance for multiple clients. The role should emphasize recurring execution work like reels, posts, pins, audience engagement, content collection, captions, keyword optimization, and performance analysis — which mirrors the way your current social plans are structured for client accounts.



Key Responsibilities:



- Manage multiple client social media accounts across platforms such as
, Instagram, Pinterest, YouTube, LinkedIn, and Youtube.

- Build and maintain monthly content calendars for each client account.

- Create, schedule, and publish social media content including reels, static posts, stories, shorts, and pins.

- Coordinate with clients and internal tea
mbers to collect job photos, videos, testimonials, and brand assets needed for content creation. This is especially important because your current plans already include recurring content collection and caption writing as a core part of execution.

- Write captions, optimize hooks, and adapt content for each platform.

- Monitor comments, messages, and engagement activity, and escalate when needed.

- Repurpose content across platforms to maximize output from a single content theme. For example, your existing plans already reuse
 content for Instagram and turn videos into YouTube Shorts and Pinterest assets.

- Perform basic social performance reviews and identify top-performing content, weak points, and opportunities for improvement.

- Stay current with platform trends, algorithm changes, and content opportunities.

- Ensure all client posts align with brand voice, tone, and approval requirements.

- Work closely with design, video, content, and account teams to keep deliverables moving on time.



Qualifications:



- 2–5+ years of experience managing social media accounts for clients, brands, or multiple businesses.

- Strong experience creating and executing content plans for
, Instagram, Pinterest, YouTube Shorts, and similar channels. Your existing client plans show these are core recurring platforms for execution.

- Experience building and managing content calendars across several client accounts at once.

- Ability to write strong captions, hooks, and post copy tailored to different industries and audiences.

Experience scheduling posts and managing publishing workflows through tools such as Meta Business Suite or Go High Level.

- Strong understanding of organic growth strategies, engagement building, and audience behavior.

- Experience analyzing social performance metrics such as reach, engagement, follower growth, clicks, and top-performing content.

- Ability to take raw client assets and turn them into organized, platform-specific content plans.

- Comfortable coordinating with clients for approvals, content collection, and feedback.

- Highly organized and able to manage deadlines across multiple accounts.



Nice to have: basic knowledge of paid boosting, SEO-informed content planning, and short-form video strategy.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys managing client accounts directly, building social media calendars, coordinating creative assets, and making sure content is consistently published, optimized, and performing across multiple brands.



If you are what we're looking for, submit your resume to 



Thanks and talk to you soon!

title: Python Developer for Content Automation and AI Integration
description:
Position Title: Python Developer for Content Automation and AI Integration

Location: Remote (Philippines Preferred)

Employment Type: Freelance Contract



Position Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled Python Developer to automate the end-to-end content creation, formatting, and publishing workflows. The ideal candidate will integrate advanced tools like Canva API, AI-powered solutions for voiceovers, and video generation to optimize social media and marketing campaigns. This role requires expertise in extracting and processing large amounts of data, automating design workflows, and scaling content delivery.



Key Responsibilities

1. Content Extraction and Formatting

Automate the extraction of text data from a 300+ page dictionary-style PDF document.

Format the extracted data into Excel/CSV files with two columns: Term and Definition.

Handle complex formatting issues like multi-line definitions or inconsistencies.

2. Canva and Content Automation

Utilize Canva’s API to populate pre-designed templates dynamically with text and visuals.

Automate bulk content generation based on an editorial calendar, ensuring brand consistency.

Optimize templates to allow automated publishing of posts on social media platforms using predefined schedules.

3. Scheduling and Publishing Automation

Integrate with social media APIs (Instagram,
, TikTok, YouTube) to schedule and publish posts automatically based on provided timelines.

Ensure that all content aligns with platform-specific requirements, captions, and formats.

4. Voiceover and Video Creation

Use tools like ElevenLabs, Descript, or Resemble AI to generate voiceovers from extracted text.

Automate video creation with tools like Pictory, Runway, or Canva Video API, combining voiceovers with AI-generated visuals.

Develop workflows to align visuals with specific text or audio narrations.

5. Illustration Generation via AI

Leverage AI tools such as Stable Diffusion, DALL-E, or MidJourney to batch-generate illustrations for terms and concepts.

Automate the integration of these visuals into videos, templates, or presentations.

6. Optimization and Scalability

Build efficient, scalable pipelines to handle high-frequency posting and content automation.

Integrate tools like Google Sheets API to manage dynamic data inputs for workflows.

Ensure workflows are future-proof, supporting additional platforms and campaigns.

Mandatory Skills & Tools

Programming & Automation

Python (proficient)

Libraries for PDF parsing: PyPDF2, pdfplumber, PyMuPDF.

Tools for data manipulation: pandas, openpyxl, regex for pattern extraction.

AI and Content Tools

Voice Cloning: ElevenLabs, Descript, or Resemble AI.

AI Illustration: Stable Diffusion, DALL-E, or MidJourney.

Video Creation: Canva API, Pictory, or Runway.

Text Automation: OpenAI GPT for caption/tag generation.

API Integration

Canva API for design automation.

Social media APIs (Instagram,
, TikTok, YouTube).

Google Sheets API for data management.

Deliverables and Timelines

Phase 1 (Weeks 1–2):

Extract terms and definitions from PDF and export to Excel.

Create initial automation workflows for Canva template population.

Prototype voice cloning and AI-generated visuals.

Phase 2 (Weeks 3–4):

Automate video creation with voiceovers and AI visuals.

Integrate with social media APIs to automate post scheduling.

Deliver a batch of 10 sample videos for review.

Phase 3 (Ongoing):

Optimize and scale pipelines for efficiency.

Provide detailed documentation for scripts and workflows.



How to Apply

Send your CV and a brief cover letter. Include examples of previous automation projects and specify your experience with tools and APIs listed above.

title: Project Manager - Amazon Marketing Agency
description:
Project Manager – Amazon Marketing Agency (Remote)



Full-Time | Remote | Competitive Salary + PTO



About Us:



At The Amazon Whisperer, we’re not your average agency. We’re a high-growth Amazon marketing agency focused on driving profitable sales growth for our clients through SEO, PPC, listing optimization, and catalog management. We work fast, think strategically, and support one another like a true team. Now, we’re looking for a detail-oriented and driven Project Manager to help lead and organize our growing internal team.



About the Role:



As our Project Manager, you’ll play a pivotal role in ensuring smooth day-to-day operations across up to 10 tea
mbers. You’ll oversee project timelines, assign tasks, and keep everyone accountable using Asana and Slack. You’ll also be the support system for your team ensuring they have what they need, jumping in to assist where necessary, and tracking performance through tools like Hubstaff and reporting spreadsheets.



What You’ll Do:



- Assign and track tasks in Asana to ensure deadlines are met

- Lead weekly team calls and provide performance updates to the COO

- Monitor team productivity and efficiency using Hubstaff

- Communicate with tea
mbers via Slack to provide daily support

- Identify team skill gaps and help develop training plans

- Update project and performance reporting spreadsheets

- Act as the operational backbone, ensuring nothing slips through the cracks



What You’ll Need:



- 2+ years Amazon experience (catalog management, SEO, etc.)

- Experience in a fast-paced agency environment

- Strong organizational and communication skills

- Fast and reliable internet connection

- Ability to type 55+ words per minute

- Comfortable using Google Sheets/Excel

- Fluent in English (written and spoken)



Company Culture:



At The Amazon Whisperer, we highly value transparency, communication, and trust. title: Amazon Graphic Design Specialist
description:
Graphic Design Specialist – Amazon Marketing Agency (Remote)



Full-Time | Remote | Competitive Salary + PTO



About Us:



The Amazon Whisperer is a fast-growing, full-service Amazon marketing agency that delivers profitable sales growth for consumer brands. We specialize in Amazon SEO, PPC, listing optimization, catalog management, and compelling, conversion-focused creative design is at the heart of what we do. We’re looking for a Graphic Design Specialist to help bring our clients’ listings to life through world-class images and storefronts that drive traffic and convert sales.



The Role:



The Graphic Design Specialist is responsible for producing Amazon-optimized creative assets, including main images, listing graphics, A+ content, premium A+ content, brand stories, and storefronts. You’ll work closely with our Design Lead to adapt proven templates to different products, ensuring copy, callouts, and visuals are tailored to the right customer profile. You’ll also respond to edit requests from the Project Manager and Brand Managers, ensuring existing creative assets are always accurate and optimized.



This is a fast-paced, high-volume design role where you’ll be producing 140–160 images per month, supporting a wide range of Amazon brands and product categories. Tasks will be assigned in Asana, and you’ll be expected to deliver them on time and with minimal revisions needed.



Responsibilities:



- Work with the Design Lead and Project Manager to complete creative deliverables in Asana

- Adapt image templates to new products while maintaining brand tone and strategy

- Optimize main images to improve click-through rate and visibility

- Design infographics and lifestyle images that target specific customer profiles

- Ensure listing images require minimal edits after upload

- Check for accurate language, spelling, and benefit callouts

- Design and upload A+ Content, Brand Stories, and Storefronts

- Support Premium A+ builds when needed

- Respond to feedback and revision requests from Brand and Project Managers

- Maintain consistency with brand guidelines and internal creative standards



Requirements:



- Minimum 1 year experience working with Amazon listing design

- Minimum 3 years of experience using Photoshop or similar design software

- Highly creative mindset with a strong eye for layout and consumer psychology

- Fast, reliable computer with dual monitors, 16GB+ RAM, and ample storage

- Fast internet connection to handle large file uploads/downloads

- Extremely organized and reliable, able to manage multiple active projects

- Strong English communication skills, written and verbal

- Ability to type 55+ words per minute

- Comfortable using Google Drive, Asana, and other collaboration tools

- Familiar with AI tools such as ChatGPT, MidJourney, Sora, Adobe Firefly, Gamma, etc.



Company Culture:



At The Amazon Whisperer, we highly value transparency, communication, and trust. This is not just another job, it’s a place where your ideas are valued, hard work is rewarded, and growth opportunities are everywhere. We’re building a team that operates like a unit: supportive, proactive, and relentlessly focused on client success. title: Lead Qualification Assistant – Amazon Research
description:
Lead Qualification Assistant – Amazon Research (Remote)

Flexible Working Hours | Remote 



About Us:

The Amazon Whisperer is a fast-growing eCommerce marketing agency helping consumer brands scale profitably on Amazon and other marketplaces. We work with a large volume of brands and rely on clean, accurate data to identify high-potential opportunities.



We’re looking for a detail-oriented Lead Qualification Assistant to help us manually qualify a large list of Amazon seller leads. This is a straightforward, repeatable task and is ideal for someone who is comfortable with spreadsheets, basic research, and working independently.



The Role:

This role is focused entirely on manual lead qualification using a provided spreadsheet and clear instructions.

You will be working through tens of thousands of leads, one by one, and gathering basic data to help us determine whether a brand is worth contacting.

This is not a strategic role and does not require advanced Amazon knowledge — just accuracy, consistency, and reliability.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Open a provided link to a brand’s Amazon store or product listing

Confirm the brand has active products listed on Amazon

Open Helium 10 and:

Check the estimated monthly revenue of products on the first page

Enter required data into a spreadsheet:

Monthly revenue estimate

Confirmation of active products

Any basic notes (if applicable)

Move on to the next lead and repeat the process

Clear SOPs and examples will be provided.





Requirements:

Comfortable working with Google Sheets

Basic familiarity with Amazon product listings

Willingness to follow a repetitive, process-driven task

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Reliable internet connection

Ability to work independently without constant supervision

Prior experience with Helium 10 is a plus (but not required — guide will be provided)





Pay & Hours:

Flexible hours

Long-term work available due to the large volume of leads

Performance-based continuation (consistent accuracy = ongoing work)



Who This Role Is Best For: 

Entry-level virtual assistants

Anyone looking for simple, stable, process-based work

Detail-oriented individuals who prefer clear instructions and minimal ambiguity

Those comfortable doing repetitive tasks efficiently





How to Apply (Important):

To apply, please respond with all of the following:

Your resume (PDF or Google Drive link)

Your
 address where we can contact you

Typing test result (screenshot or link) showing:

At least 40 WPM

High accuracy

 or 
)

ntum.

title: Amazon SEO / Cataloging Specialist
description:
SEO Cataloging Specialist – Amazon Marketing Agency (Remote)



Full-Time | Remote | Competitive Salary + PTO



About Us:



The Amazon Whisperer is a fast-growing, full-service Amazon marketing agency that delivers profitable sales growth for consumer brands. We specialize in Amazon SEO, PPC, listing optimization, and catalog management, and we do it with systems, strategy, and speed. We’re looking for a highly organized and analytical SEO Cataloging Specialist to join our team and help power the backend of our clients’ Amazon success.



The Role:



The SEO Cataloging Specialist plays a critical dual role in our agency, driving traffic through SEO and keeping our clients’ Amazon catalogs healthy and optimized. You’ll be responsible for conducting in-depth keyword research, writing listing copy, updating keyword lists, and harvesting terms from PPC to enhance organic rankings. On the cataloging side, you’ll manage suppressed listings, submit reimbursements, upload images, and resolve backend issues with Amazon Seller Support.



This is a hands-on, detail-oriented role for someone who loves data, knows their way around the Amazon backend, and thrives in a fast-paced, remote environment.



Responsibilities:



- Conduct Amazon SEO research and build keyword strategies using tools like Helium 10, Data Dive, and Jungle Scout

- Update and maintain Master Keyword Lists (MKLs)

- Write Amazon listing copy including titles, bullets, descriptions, and backend search terms

- Harvest high-performing keywords from PPC campaigns to integrate into organic strategy

- Track and report on organic keyword ranking performance

- Troubleshoot suppressed listings, stranded inventory, and other catalog issues

- Submit FBA reimbursement claims and follow up as needed

- Manage catalog backend tasks such as uploading images, scheduling promotions, and opening cases with Amazon Seller Support

- Maintain accurate data in tracking sheets and ensure catalog compliance across accounts



Requirements:



- Minimum 2 years of Amazon experience working in catalog management and SEO optimization

- Proficiency with Helium 10, Data Dive, Jungle Scout, and other keyword tools

- Strong copywriting skills and ability to write SEO-friendly listing content

- Fluent English (both written and spoken)

- Extremely organized, reliable, and comfortable working in a fast paced environment

- Ability to type 55+ words per minute

- Fast and reliable internet connection

- Comfort using Google Sheets, Excel, and AI tools like ChatGPT



Company Culture:



At The Amazon Whisperer, we highly value transparency, communication, and trust. This is not just another job, it’s a place where your ideas are valued, hard work is rewarded, and growth opportunities are everywhere. We’re building a team that operates like a unit. Supportive, proactive, and relentlessly focused on client success. If you’re looking for a long-term remote role where you can grow your skills and career, you’re in the right place.



What You’ll Get:



- Competitive pay

- 100% remote work

- Room to grow into roles like Project Manager, SEO Lead, and beyond

- A collaborative and growth-minded team environment



Apply today and be part of a company that’s scaling fast and doing things differently in the Amazon space. We’re not looking for average. We’re looking for exceptional.

title: E-commerce Operations Lead
description:
Ikigai Cases is hiring for an Ecommerce Operations Lead

Location: Remote

Compensation: $1800 per month + performance-based bonuses



About the Company

Ikigai Cases (
) is a family-owned e-commerce business selling premiu
tal pill cases. Founded in December 2021, the business has been operated by two brothers from Washington, DC since then. After four years, the company has grown to selling thousands of pill cases every month and double-digit tea
mbers, including a thriving remote team.



Our mission is simple: to make exceptional pill cases and provide exceptional customer service. We uphold this commitment by managing our fulfillment operations in-house and offering white-glove service to our customers.



We are looking to hire an E-commerce Operations Lead (Ecommerce Operations Manager) to join our growing remote team.



5 Core Responsibilities

1. Launch Execution: Plan and execute all sales, product launches, color launches, and promotional 
nts, ensuring offers, timing, assets, and systems go live correctly.



2. Cross-Functional Launch Coordination: Coordinate all teams involved in launches (Marketing,
, Creative, Website, Ops, CX, Fulfillment), managing timelines and dependencies to ensure aligned execution.



3. Website & Systems Setup for Launches: Set up and configure all website, Shopify, and related systems required for launches, including products, collections, discounts, carts, and launch-specific site changes.



4. Launch QA & System Hygiene: Own pre-launch QA and post-launch cleanup, ensuring accuracy across offers and flows and maintaining clean, current systems with no leftover artifacts.



5. Launch Process Improvement: Improve launch workflows, templates, and safeguards to support increasing launch volume and complexity with reduced risk.



Why You Should Take This Role

-You’ll be working at a brand that is obsessed with their customers and has built a loyal following. Just read a few of their reviews: 
/pages/reviews

-You’ll be working at a company that has scaled up extremely quickly - while focusing on the operational side of the business. Now that the operations are stabilized with key roles in place, we are focused on investing in growth.

-You’ll be working with people who have extreme levels of competitive fire in their bellies - people who will run through walls to make sure the company succeeds.

-You’ll be working hand-in-hand with the founders of the company - building the systems and growth strategy together.

-You’ll be working at a company with a robust product development roadmap that includes new colors / products releasing monthly



Required Experience & Skills Experience

-3+ years working directly on an e-commerce brand, with hands-on responsibility for executing sales, product launches, or promotional 
nts (not just website maintenance).

-Proven experience owning launches end-to-end, including setup, coordination, QA, and post-launch cleanup across teams and systems.

-Strong project management experience in e-commerce, coordinating multiple stakeholders to deliver time-sensitive launches.

-Working proficiency with Shopify admin for launch setup (products, collections, discounts, carts, and site changes; no coding required).

-Clear written communication and high attention to detail in revenue-critical work.

-Experience working with Notion or similar project management tools

-Must be based outside the United States.



Preferred Experiences (Nice To Have’s)

-Experience running A/B tests using platforms such as Intelligems.

-Experience using page builders (Replo preferred) in addition to Shopify Theme Editor



Communication & English Proficiency

-Strong written and verbal English skills.

-Ability to communicate effectively with internal teams and external partners via
.

-Ability to receive and provide constructive feedback.



Compensation Details

-Compensation: $1800 per month + performance-based bonuses

-Work Hours: 50 hours per week, Monday to Friday Business Hours, EST

-Paid Holidays: 10 paid holidays per year

-PTO: 1 week earned for every 6 months worked at the company



To Apply

Fill out the application form here: 
/jobs/c993b7cc-298c-4817-b
bd5842



This application includes a number of questions in order to ensure we hire an outstanding candidate for this position, so please be advised in advance that it will take time to complete.



Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. Qualified candidates will be contacted for interviews. Applications on OnlineJobs.ph, DMs, and messages sent via
 will not be reviewed.

title: Long-Form Video Editor Full Time
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a highly skilled Long-Form YouTube Editor to join our team and create high-quality trading education content. This is not basic editing — we want someone who can bring concepts to life through clean visuals, strong storytelling, and advanced motion graphics.



You’ll be editing in-depth trading videos that break down strategies, concepts, and market analysis in a way that is both engaging and easy to understand. The goal is to turn complex information into visually compelling, high-retention content.



You must be able to edit at a very high level, similar to top creators in the finance and education space, with a strong focus on motion graphics, animation, and clean visual storytelling.



You’ll need to be able to edit videos like this:







Responsibilities



Edit long-form YouTube videos (8–20 minutes) focused on trading education

Use advanced motion graphics and animation to simplify and explain trading concepts

Create engaging intros (30–60 seconds) using the strongest hooks, visuals, and key 
nts

Design clean, high-quality on-screen visuals (charts, diagrams, overlays, annotations)

Maintain a consistent, premium visual style across all content

Structure videos for maximum retention, pacing, and clarity

Communicate clearly, take feedback well, and deliver edits on time



Requirements



Expert-level video editing skills (Premiere Pro / Final Cut / After Effects)

Strong motion graphics and animation ability (this is essential)

Experience editing educational or finance-related content is a big plus

Deep understanding of pacing, storytelling, and viewer retention

Ability to turn complex topics into simple, engaging visuals

Strong attention to detail in sound design, color grading, and overall polish

Responsibilities

s regarding services and refund requests
