title: Appointment Setter (Warm Leads) — CLEAR AMERICAN ACCENT REQUIRED — Help Seniors Get the Care They Deserve
description:
Feel great about your work every day and sharpen your professional edge. You’ll be the high-performing voice that helps seniors and their families secure the in-home care they need. This isn't just answering questions—it’s about conversion, empathy, and closing for the next step.



WHY THIS ROLE MATTERS



We’re a marketing agency focused on the home care industry, operating for 6 years and growing fast. You aren't just a support agent; you are the bridge between a family in crisis and the help they need. You’ll turn warm inquiries into scheduled consultations. If you have a closer’s mindset and a helper’s heart, you will thrive here.



COMPENSATION AND GROWTH



- Base: $650/month

- Bonus: +$15 per qualified appointment you book

- Recent performance: The last person in this role earned $1,445 in a month. We’re actively adding new clients, which means more opportunities for you to hit your targets.

- Additional commission opportunities and performance bonuses for hitting KPIs.



SALES VS. CUSTOMER SERVICE



This is a sales-focused role. While customer service is often reactive and involves waiting for the phone to ring to solve a problem, this role is proactive. You are guiding a prospect through a decision-making process. You aren't just providing information; you are selling the value of a consultation and moving the lead from interested to committed.



TRAINING AND SKILLS DEVELOPMENT



We don't expect you to be perfect on day one, but we do expect you to be a student of the game. We provide ongoing training to help you master:



- Advanced communication techniques.

- Objection handling with empathy and poise.

- CRM management and data-driven sales workflows.

- Professional development that translates to any high-level sales career.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Convert inbound calls and warm leads into booked consultations on client calendars.

- Connect, don't just talk. We don't use rigid scripts. You’ll be trained on how to have authentic, unscripted conversations that build real trust.

- Act as a high-level advisor: listen for the why behind the call and guide them to the right next step.

- Keep records tidy: update Asana and our CRM so our Ads and Client teams have clean data.

- Join regular team huddles and training sessions to keep sharpening your sales skills.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- A closer who understands that a friendly phone presence is the best sales tool.

- A self-starter who treats their schedule like a business and never misses an opportunity to follow up.

- Excellent English conversational skills; you must be able to navigate complex emotions with clarity.

- Very important: A clear, natural-sounding American accent to build immediate rapport with US seniors.

- Ambition: We want people who want to grow their income and their skills every single month.



HOW TO APPLY



Since we expect our team to be master communicators, we require a short video (2–3 minutes) instead of just a resume. In your video, please cover:

1. What truly makes you tick and motivates you to succeed?

2. What are your personal and professional goals for the next year?

3. In your own words, what is the difference between "Sales" and "Customer Service"?

4. What specifically caught your eye about this listing and why are you the perfect fit?



The video is required so we can hear your phone presence and see your energy.

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (SDR) – Commercial Cleaning
description:
You must have experienced in appointment setter/ cold calling and experience in go high level. 

We are commercial cleaning company is looking for a Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (SDR) to call lead lists into qualified walkthrough appointments for the sales team.



This is a long-term role for someone who is confident on the phone, organized in a CRM, and hungry to earn more based on performance.



Responsibilities



Daily Calling & Outreach

 • Make outbound calls to businesses from provided lead lists and CRM

 • Follow a clear script to:

 • Introduce the company and services

 • Ask qualifying questions (type of facility, size, cleaning frequency, current provider, contract timing)

 • Identify pain points with their current cleaning solution

 • Book walkthrough appointments for the sales/operations team

 • Send follow-up
s and SMS through the CRM to confirm and remind appointments

 • Handle light objections and keep conversations professional, friendly, and confident



CRM & Pipeline Management

 • Work from the CRM (e.g., GoHighLevel or similar) – no loose spreadsheets

 • Update lead status after every call (New, Contacted, Qualified, Walkthrough Set, Not Interested, etc.)

 • Add clear notes so the sales team knows what was discussed

 • Tag and mark leads that are not a fit (too small, residential only, wrong contact, etc.)

 • Schedule follow-ups for “call back later,” “renewing soon,” and other warm opportunities



Reporting & Communication

 • Attend short weekly check-ins via Zoom with the team

 • Send simple daily reports:

 • Number of calls made

 • Number of conversations

 • Number of qualified appointments booked and confirmed

 • Feedback on common objections or patterns you’re hearing

 • Suggest script or process improvements based on real conversations





Ideal Candidate

 • Strong spoken English – clear, confident, and easy to understand

 • Previous experience in:

 • B2B cold calling, and/or

 • Appointment setting, and/or

 • SDR/inside sales for service-based businesses (cleaning, home services, marketing, real estate, etc.)

 • Comfortable making 60–80 outbound calls per day

 • Able to follow a script AND adjust naturally in conversation

 • Familiar with any CRM (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.) – willing to learn a new one if needed

 • Organized and disciplined: updates notes and statuses in real time

 • Thick-skinned and positive: not afraid of “no” and keeps going





What Success Looks Like



You are successful in this role if you consistently:

 • Hit 60–80 dials per day

 • Book 12–20 qualified walkthrough appointments per month

 • Keep no-show rates low by confirming and reminding prospects

 • Maintain clean, accurate records in the CRM so the team always knows:

 • Who has been contacted

 • Who is interested

 • Who is not a fit and why





Schedule

 • 40 hours per week (can start part-time and increase if it’s a good fit)

 • Must be able to work during U.S. business hours (Eastern Time overlap) for calling windows





Compensation



This role is paid with a mix of base + performance:

 • Base Pay: $640/month

 • Bonus: $20 for each qualified appointment that actually holds (not just booked)

 • Commission: 5% of the first month’s contract value on any contract over $2,500/month that comes from your appointments



If you perform well, your earnings can grow quickly month over month.





How to Apply



Please include:

 1. A short note about your cold calling or appointment setting experience

 2. A brief audio or Loom/video sample (1–2 minutes) of you introducing yourself as if you were calling a facility manager about commercial cleaning services

 3. Your availability (hours per week and time zone)

EST time zone required

title: REMOTE OPERATIONS DIRECTOR  (GoHighLevel + Cleaning/Janitorial / Facility Operations Background Required)
description:
REMOTE OPERATIONS DIRECTOR



(Executive-Level | GoHighLevel + Automation Systems + Commercial Cleaning / Facility Operations Required)



Schedule: Monday–Thursday | 8:00 AM – 2:00 PM EST

Type: Full-Time | Long-Term

Tracking: TimeProof required during all working hours





ROLE OVERVIEW



We are hiring a Remote Operations Director to take full ownership of execution, systems, team performance, and profitability across Sales Support, Marketing Systems, and Operations.



This is an executive operations role—not a task-based VA position.



You will be responsible for:

	•	Building and enforcing structure

	•	Managing people and performance

	•	Designing and maintaining automation systems

	•	Ensuring the company operates efficiently, predictably, and profitably



You will serve as the operational bridge between:

	•	Cold Callers / SDRs

	•	Marketing

	•	Estimating

	•	Field Operations



You own outcomes, not activity.





CRITICAL REQUIREMENT (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



You must know how to personally build, implement, and troubleshoot automation systems.



This is not a “manage a developer” role.



You are expected to:

	•	Build workflows yourself

	•	Fix issues yourself

	•	Improve systems continuously





PRIOR EXECUTIVE EXPERIENCE (REQUIRED)



This role requires prior senior leadership experience, such as:

	•	Operations Director

	•	Head of Operations

	•	Senior Operations Manager

	•	Business Operations Lead

	•	COO / Deputy Operations



You must demonstrate measurable improvements in:

	•	Organization

	•	Profitability

	•	Team performance

	•	Systems efficiency

	•	Revenue or contract growth





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



1) KPI OWNERSHIP & EXECUTION

	•	Own company KPIs across:

	•	Sales

	•	Marketing

	•	Operations

	•	Run structured weekly performance meetings

	•	Identify bottlenecks and underperformance

	•	Take immediate corrective action

	•	Deliver executive KPI reports including:

	•	Metrics

	•	Gaps

	•	Root causes

	•	Action plans





2) OPERATIONS, SYSTEMS & AUTOMATION (BUILD + OWN)



You are responsible for the entire automation and systems infrastructure.



Platforms include:

	•	GoHighLevel

	•	Zapier

	•	Additional tools such as Make (formerly Integromat) or n8n (strongly preferred)





You will:



BUILD (Hands-On)

	•	Design and build automation workflows from scratch

	•	Create multi-step logic including:

	•	Filters

	•	Paths

	•	Conditions

	•	Webhooks

	•	Build lead routing, tagging, and assignment systems

	•	Build follow-up automation 
, SMS, tasking)

	•	Build deduplication logic before CRM entry





MANAGE & OPTIMIZE

	•	Maintain and improve all workflows

	•	Monitor for failures, delays, and data issues

	•	Optimize for:

	•	Speed

	•	Accuracy

	•	Cost efficiency

	•	Eliminate manual work wherever possible





SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE

	•	Design scalable systems that support:

	•	High-volume lead flow

	•	Multi-location operations

	•	Multiple service lines (cleaning + staffing)

	•	Ensure all systems are:

	•	Documented

	•	Reliable

	•	Easy for the team to follow





TROUBLESHOOTING (CRITICAL)

	•	Identify and fix:

	•	Broken automations

	•	Missing leads

	•	Duplicate data

	•	Sync issues

	•	Implement backup logic and fail-safes





3) TEAM MANAGEMENT & ACCOUNTABILITY

	•	Oversee remote team execution (4–10+ tea
mbers)

	•	Assign tasks and enforce deadlines

	•	Verify completion and output quality

	•	Run daily and weekly check-ins

	•	Maintain performance tracking and documentation



You are not the follow-up person you ensure follow-up happens.





4) PROPOSAL COORDINATION & SUBMISSION



(Not Full Estimating)

	•	Coordinate with estimators to ensure proposals are:

	•	Accurate

	•	Complete

	•	On-time

	•	Professionally packaged

	•	Review:

	•	Scope

	•	Pricing summaries

	•	Compliance documents

	•	Manage:

	•	RFPs

	•	Bid submissions

	•	Vendor portals

	•	Maintain organized records:

	•	COIs

	•	Safety documents

	•	Contracts



5) MARKETING & LEAD FOLLOW-THROUGH

	•	Own all lead follow-up systems inside GHL

	•	Ensure:

	•	No lead is missed

	•	No pipeline is stagnant

	•	Monitor:

	•	Speed to lead

	•	Follow-up compliance

	•	Conversion rates

	•	Ensure all inbound and outbound systems are connected and functioning





6) ADMINISTRATIVE, COMPLIANCE & FINANCIAL SUPPORT

	•	Maintain vendor registrations and compliance deadlines

	•	Track invoicing, payments, and cost summaries

	•	Ensure all submissions are accurate and on time





REQUIRED EXPERIENCE & SKILLS

	•	Advanced experience with GoHighLevel

	•	Strong hands-on experience with Zapier (multi-step workflows, paths, webhooks)

	•	Experience building automation systems (not just using templates)

	•	Experience with Make or n8n (preferred)

	•	Experience with CRM + automation integration across multiple tools

	•	Commercial cleaning, janitorial, facility services, or construction admin background

	•	Proven remote team leadership

	•	Strong organizational and execution skills

	•	Executive-level communication





NOT A FIT IF

	•	You have only used Zapier for basic automations

	•	You cannot build workflows from scratch

	•	You rely fully on developers for technical setup

	•	You do not understand webhooks or data flow

	•	You prefer task-based work vs ownership





FIRST 90-DAY PERFORMANCE METRICS

	•	Fully built and documented automation systems (GHL + Zapier + integrations)

	•	Zero critical lead loss or automation failure

	•	Weekly KPI reporting across all departments

	•	Minimum 5 active proposals submitted weekly

	•	Measurable improvement in:

	•	Lead response time

	•	Pipeline movement

	•	Conversion rates

	•	Documented system improvements and efficiencies





REQUIRED APPLICATION SUBMISSIONS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



1) VIDEO (5–10 MINUTES)



Explain:

	•	Your executive operations experience

	•	How you improved systems and profitability

	•	How you manage teams and accountability





2) 30–60–90 DAY PLAN



Provide:

	•	How you will organize operations

	•	How you will improve systems and automation

	•	How you will measure success





3) PROOF OF RESULTS

	•	Metrics, case studies, or screenshots showing impact





4) AUTOMATION SYSTEM BREAKDOWN (MANDATORY)



Show a real system you built:



Include:

	•	Lead flow (source ? processing ? CRM ? follow-up)

	•	Tools used

	•	Logic structure

	•	How you handled:

	•	Duplicates

	•	Errors

	•	Delays



If you cannot show this, do not apply.



COMPENSATION & GROWTH

	•	Competitive monthly compensation

	•	Performance-based bonuses tied to KPIs

	•	Growth path toward Senior Operations / COO-level leadership







FINAL POSITIONING

-Familiarity with
 groups and organic engagement strategies

Bonus (Preferred, Not Required)

I

mportant

title: Customer Service Rep (Back Office & Social Media)
description:
JOB TITLE: Customer Service Rep (Back Office & Social Media)



SHIFT: 9 AM - 5 PM EST (10:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippine Time)

TYPE: Full-Time (40 Hours/Week)

PAY: $300 USD (Month 1 Probation) - Pay increases based on performance.



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are a US-based digital marketing agency looking for a smart, organized Tea
mber to join us long-term.



This is NOT a typical call center job. This is a dynamic hybrid role where you will handle tasks for our internal agency AND act as the dedicated representative for one of our main clients (a US-based roofing company).



Your role will be a mix of:



Phone Support & Operations (Coordinating with homeowners/suppliers for our roofing client)



Back Office Admin (Tracking inventory and calculating job profits)



Social Media Management (Handling content, writing video scripts, and scheduling for our agency and clients)



We are looking for someone who is "Good with People," "Good with Numbers," and "Social Media Savvy."



WHAT YOU WILL DO



-- ROOFING CLIENT: OPERATIONS, SUPPORT & PROFIT TRACKING

You will manage the full project lifecycle. This includes handling inbound/outbound calls to schedule homeowner installations, coordinating with suppliers to ensure materials arrive on time, and managing inventory. You will also "guard the profit" by using Google Sheets to track job expenses and compare actual costs against original quotes to catch any over-spending.



-- SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGEMENT (INTERNAL & CLIENTS)

You will handle social media admin tasks for our agency and our clients. This includes researching and collecting social media post ideas, writing and generating engaging scripts for short-form videos and reels, and managing the actual posting and scheduling of content across platforms.



REQUIREMENTS



EXCELLENT ENGLISH: You must have a clear, neutral speaking voice. You will be speaking to US homeowners, so confidence is key.



MATH & LOGIC SKILLS: You must be comfortable with numbers. You will be calculating profit margins and tracking inventory. If you hate math, this is not the job for you.



SOCIAL MEDIA SAVVY: You must be comfortable navigating social media platforms, brainstorming content ideas, generating scripts for reels, and using scheduling tools.



CONSTRUCTION KNOWLEDGE (PREFERRED): Experience in roofing, construction, or working for a US contractor is a huge plus.



TECH SETUP: Fast internet (Fiber preferred), a high-quality noise-canceling headset, and a 100% QUIET WORKSPACE.



HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY)



WE WILL NOT REVIEW APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A VOICE RECORDING.



STEP 1

Record a voice clip (1-2 mins) acting out the script below. Please use 
 (preferred) or Google Drive. Read it naturally—do not sound robotic.



STEP 2

Send a message with the Subject Line: "Agency CSR & Admin Application"



STEP 3

Include the link to your recording and answer these 6 questions:



A) Can you work the Graveyard Shift (10 PM - 6 AM PH Time)?

B) Is the starting probationary pay of $300 USD okay for you?

C) Do you have experience tracking expenses or calculating profit margins?

D) Are you comfortable finding content ideas, generating scripts for short videos/reels, and scheduling posts?

E) What CRM systems are you knowledgeable in or have used before?

F) What other software tools are you comfortable using (e.g., Google Sheets, Excel, scheduling apps, etc.)?



RECORDING SCRIPT

(Imagine you are calling a customer, Mrs. Johnson, to schedule her roof replacement)



"Hi, is this Mrs. Johnson? This is [Your Name] from Roofing Brother. I'm calling to give you some great news -- we are ready to get your new roof installed!



We have you on the schedule for next Tuesday, the 12th. Does that still work for you?



Perfect. Now, just so you know, the materials and the dumpster will arrive one day early, on Monday afternoon. We will need you to please keep the driveway clear of cars so the truck can drop off the shingles.



The crew will arrive at 7 AM on Tuesday. It will be a bit noisy in the morning, so I just wanted to warn you ahead of time.



I will
 you a confirmation of these dates right now. Do you have any other questions for me before the crew arrives? You're very welcome, Mrs. Johnson!"

title: Urgent Financial Analyst with General Admin Experience (Cebu Based Preferred)
description:
We are urgently seeking a highly analytical and detail-oriented Financial Analyst to support our CEO and Finance/Accounting Team. This role will work closely with our current Financial Analyst and assist in driving financial insights, forecasting, reporting, and strategic analysis across the organization.



This is a work from home position ideal for a finance professional with strong modeling skills and experience supporting senior leadership.



Key Responsibilities

* Evaluate overall financial performance, including key drivers and KPIs

* Build, maintain, and enhance financial and sales models for budgeting, forecasting, and performance measurement

* Assist in establishing and maintaining financial dashboards for senior management and business partners

* Develop weekly, monthly, and quarterly productivity and realization reports across active engagements

* Manage and analyze the firm’s revenue pipeline (prospective, current, and won engagements) across multiple practice lines

* Conduct ad hoc financial analysis and provide actionable recommendations to address emerging business challenges

* Support the development and maintenance of 3-statement financial models for forecasting, M&A activities, and strategic investments



Qualifications & Experience

* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or related field

* 5+ years of experience in financial analysis, FP&A, corporate finance, or related role

* Strong experience with financial modeling, including 3-statement models

* Experience with budgeting, forecasting, and KPI tracking

* Advanced proficiency in Excel (required); experience with financial planning tools is a plus

* Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills

* Excellent written and verbal communication skills

* Windows - based setup is highly required for this position.

* Ability to work independently in a remote environment and collaborate with cross-functional teams



Preferred Experience

* Experience supporting executive leadership

* Exposure to M&A analysis and strategic investment modeling

* Experience working with professional services firms or multi-practice organizations



If you're interested in applying, please send your application along with the requirements listed below:



Resume, screenshot of computer specifications, screenshot of internet speed test, and video recording where you introduce yourself and elaborate on your experiences. Thanks!

title: Video Editor for High-End Branding Product Videos - Experience with AI
description:
About Us:



We are a rapidly growing marketing agency from Germany, recognized as a market leader in our field. Our team is young, motivated, and passionate about producing outstanding content. We specialize in creating high-quality, aesthetic product videos for online shops and Amazon product pages. These are not simple UGC e-commerce clips, but branding-oriented videos that elevate the perception of a product and make it stand out.



As we continue to expand, we're looking for Remote Video Editors to join our team for a long-term commitment.





Job Description:



We are seeking a talented and experienced Video Editor with a strong sense for aesthetics and branding. You will be provided with all the raw material and a detailed video script for each project.



Additionally, you should be capable of generating shots with AI tools and, when necessary, further enhancing or compositing them in After Effects (e.g. adding motion graphics, text overlays, visual polish).



The role is entirely remote, requiring a high-speed internet connection due to the large size of the projects (avg. 100GB) for efficient uploads and downloads.





Training:



To ensure you're set up for success, we provide an extensive course on editing product videos, created by our team. Watching and learning from this course marks the beginning of our collaboration.





Trial Period:



The first week is a paid trial phase, where you'll go through our course and complete a test project. If the quality meets our standards, we will proceed with a permanent employment offer.



Requirements:



• Strong experience in video editing

• Very good in Premiere Pro

• Good in After Effects and Photoshop

• Experience with AI-based shot generation and video enhancement

• Strong aesthetic sense and design skills

• Good English skills

• Interested in a full-time role (40 hours/week) and looking for long-term employment (years)





How to Apply:



Please submit your application with the subject "Gold-Video-Candidate" and include videos of your previous work.





Traits We Value:

• Ability to follow clear instructions and processes

• Discipline and determination

• Eagerness to create amazing, aesthetic product videos with branding impact

• Passion for pushing creative and technical boundaries





Benefits:

• Paid time off and paid holidays

• 13th-month pay

• Annual performance-based salary bonus/increases

• Internal training with exclusive knowledge





Join Us:



If you're passionate about creating high-end, branding-focused product videos and are looking for a long-term, fulfilling career, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today to become a part of our success story!

title: Amazon Wholesale VA (with FBA Experience)
description:
We are looking for a skilled and reliable Amazon Wholesale Virtual Assistant with solid experience in FBA, product sourcing, wholesale account management, and Amazon Seller Central operations. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, proactive, and able to work independently with minimal supervision.



Responsibilities:



Conduct product research for profitable wholesale products

Contact and open accounts with brand owners, distributors, and wholesalers

Analyze products using tools such as Keepa, SellerAmp (SAS), Helium 10, etc.

Prepare and manage FBA shipments

Monitor inventory, pricing, and stock levels

Handle restock planning and replenishment

Manage Seller Central tasks (listings, uploads, case logs, etc.)

Maintain spreadsheets and reporting

Communicate professionally with suppliers and internal team



Requirements:



Proven experience as an Amazon Wholesale VA

Proficiency in Amazon FBA workflow

Strong product research and data analysis skills

Familiarity with Keepa, SAS, or similar tools

Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Stable internet connection



How to Apply:

SEND Your resume/CV

title: Amazon Wholesale VA (With Amazon FBA Experience)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Amazon Wholesale Virtual Assistant to join our growing e-commerce team. This is a long-term role for someone who is reliable, detail-oriented, and experienced in Amazon FBA wholesale operations.



Responsibilities



You will handle day-to-day Amazon FBA wholesale tasks, including:



Product & Supplier Sourcing



Search for profitable wholesale products using tools such as Keepa, SellerAmp, Helium 10, etc.

Contact and negotiate with authorized distributors & brand suppliers.

Analyze sourcing lists and product catalogs.



Product Analysis



Evaluate product viability (sales rank, competition, cost, ROI, profit margin).

Determine replenishment needs and inventory planning.



Purchasing & Logistics



Create and manage purchase orders.

Coordinate shipments to Amazon FBA warehouses.

Monitor inbound shipments and reconcile discrepancies.



Account Management



Track inventory levels and forecast restocks.

Manage listing updates if needed.

Assist with brand approvals, invoices, and account documentation.



Required Skills & Experience



Amazon Wholesale FBA experience is a MUST

Strong understanding of Keepa, SellerAmp, Helium10, InventoryLab, and other tools

Ability to analyze data and make profitable sourcing decisions

Experience communicating with suppliers

Good English communication skills

Detail-oriented, reliable, and proactive

Fast learner, self-motivated, and able to work with minimal supervision



Work Schedule & Setup



Full-time (40 hours/week)

Remote work

Long-term position with growth opportunity





How to Apply



Please submit the following:



Updated Resume

Brief voice/video introduction (optional but a plus)

Your Amazon Wholesale experience summary

Tools you are proficient with



Subject Line: Amazon Wholesale VA – Your Name

title: Video Editor
description:
I'm Sjakie Minet, Dutch Calisthenics Champion, online coach, and founder of a calisthenics app. I'm based in Bali building my brand across YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

You'll be working with my personal assistant. She films, transfers all raw footage to Google Drive, and sends you the folder. You edit, she uploads. Clean and simple.

Style reference: Matt Buttersthenics on YouTube. Watch his videos before applying — that pace, that energy, that clean style is exactly what I want. 





Weekly Deliverables

1 long form YouTube video (8–25 min) — full edit, colour grade, captions, thumbnail

3 short form reels clipped from long form — exported for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



What I Expect

Good communication with you (good English)

Fast clean cuts — no dead air

Warm vibrant colour grade — Bali aesthetic

Text overlays for key points

Thumbnails — bright, high contrast, max 4 words

Long form delivered within 5–7 days of receiving footage

Short form within 2–3 days

Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve



How To Apply:

Send me the following or your application will not be considered:



Your portfolio: links to YouTube videos or reels you have edited (required)

A short message about yourself and why you're the right fit

Mention: Matt Buttersthenics in your application so I know you actually read this



Calisthenics experience? Tell me. It will move you to the top of the list.

title: GoHighLevel VA / Marketing Automation Assistant
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We are a marketing agency specialising in lead generation, SEO, and marketing automation for tradespeople and service businesses across Australia. We use GoHighLevel as our core delivery platform across all client accounts.



We're looking for a part-time GoHighLevel VA to support funnel builds, automations, and ongoing client work. This is a long-term role with the potential to grow into full-time as the agency scales.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

- Building and editing landing pages inside GHL sub-accounts

- Setting up automation workflows (missed call text-back, review requests, lead follow-up sequences)

- Configuring pipelines, triggers, and SMS/email campaigns

- Building third-party integrations using Zapier, Make, or Pabbly Connect — connecting GHL to platforms like Google Sheets, booking systems, and CRMs

- On-page SEO tasks — meta titles, descriptions, headings, Google Business Profile updates

- General marketing admin support as needed



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

- Hands-on experience building inside GoHighLevel — not just listed as a tool, but actually used

- Familiarity with GHL workflows, triggers, pipelines, and sub-account management

- Experience with third-party integrations using Zapier, Make (Integromat), or Pabbly Connect — including connecting GHL to external platforms such as Google Sheets, CRMs, or booking systems

- Experience working for a marketing agency (preferred)

- Good written English — you'll be helping with SMS and
 copy

- Reliable, proactive, and communicates clearly

- Available during some Australian business hours (at least partial overlap for a meeting once a week minimum). 



DETAILS

Hours: Part-time, ~20 hrs/week

Rate: $600/month depending on experience

Type: Long-term, remote



HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, please include the following in your application:

1. A brief description of your GoHighLevel experience — what have you built?

2. Answer this question: How would you set up a missed call text-back automation in GoHighLevel? Walk us through the steps.

3. Answer this question: Describe a Zapier or Make integration you've built. What was the trigger, what was the action, and what problem did it solve?

4. A link to any portfolio, Loom video, or examples of GHL work (if available)

5. Your availability and which hours overlap with AEST



Applications without both test questions answered will not be reviewed.

title: Video Editor / AI Video Content Specialist
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We are a marketing agency serving tradespeople and service businesses across Australia. We produce social media content, promotional videos, and AI-generated video assets for our clients across platforms including Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.



We're looking for a creative, tech-savvy video editor who is confident using the latest AI video tools to produce high-quality short-form content, animated explainers, and AI-generated video for our growing client base. This is a part-time long-term role with room to grow.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

- Editing short-form video content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts for trade and service business clients

- Creating AI-generated video content using tools like Kling 3.0, Runway Gen 3, and similar platforms

- Producing animated explainer videos using tools like Nano Banana Pro or similar animation software

- Adding captions, transitions, motion graphics, and branded elements to video content

- Adapting raw footage and AI-generated clips into polished, platform-ready content

- Staying current with new AI video tools and suggesting improvements to our production workflow



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

- Solid video editing experience — CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar

- Hands-on experience with AI video generation tools — Kling 3.0, Runway Gen 3, Pika, or similar

- Experience with animation tools such as Nano Banana Pro, Canva video, or similar

- Strong understanding of short-form content formats and what performs on Reels, TikTok, and Shorts

- Eye for detail — clean cuts, good pacing, on-brand visuals

- Experience working for a marketing agency or producing content for multiple clients (preferred)

- Reliable, meets deadlines, and communicates clearly

- Available during Australian business hours (at least partial overlap with AEST)



DETAILS

Hours: Part-time, ~20 hrs/week

Monthly salary: $500–$650/month

Type: Long-term, remote



HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, please include the following in your application:

1. A portfolio link or showreel — we need to see your work, especially any short-form or AI-generated video

2. Answer this question: Which AI video tools have you used and what did you create with them? Be specific — list the tools and describe what you made.

3. Answer this question: How would you approach creating a 30-second Reel for a mobile mechanic business? Walk us through your process from brief to final edit.

4. Your availability and which hours overlap with AEST



Applications without a portfolio or showreel will not be reviewed.

title: Commercial Real Estate Appraisal Analyst
description:
**IMPORTANT**

To apply for this role, only use this link:





Direct messages via onlinejobs.ph are not accepted.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Location: Remote (US hours)    



Type: Full-Time



Hours: 4:00 AM – 1:00 PM CST, Monday to Friday



Salary: PHP 80,000 – PHP 110,000 (PHP 100,000 – PHP 140,000 for MAI candidacy or proven US CRE track record)



 



About Pahroo



Pahroo Appraisal and Consultancy delivers commercial real estate valuations and advisory services across US markets, with a focus on assets underlying debt and equity investments. We work across office, industrial, multifamily, self-storage, and retail. The team is small, the work is rigorous, and the standards are high.



Working Hours — Please Read Before Applying

This role operates on US Central Standard Time: 4:00 AM – 1:00 PM CST, Monday to Friday. If you are based outside the US, please confirm this works for your circumstances before applying. It is a firm requirement.



The Role



You will sit within the valuation team, producing and supporting appraisal reports across a mixed commercial portfolio. The work is analytical, deadline-driven, and detail-critical. Once onboarded, you will be expected to work with a real degree of independence, drawing on sound US market knowledge to produce defensible value conclusions.



This is not an entry-level position. We need someone who understands why a number is what it is, not just how to arrive at it.



What You Will Do



 - Conduct research using industry databases — CoStar, REIS, RCA, PwC Real Estate Investor Survey, and broker market reports — to gather and interrogate comparable market evidence

 - Analyse property-level financial data including income statements, rent rolls, reimbursement schedules, and occupancy statistics to develop well-supported value indicators

 - Prepare collateral monitoring reports for assets underlying debt and equity investments across office, industrial, multifamily, self-storage, retail, and other property types

 - Produce USPAP-compliant appraisal reports ready for lender, investor, or regulatory review

 - Identify data gaps and market anomalies; flag assumptions that materially affect value conclusions

 - Manage competing report deadlines accurately without compromising on quality

 



What We Need



Required



 - Minimum 5 years of commercial real estate appraisal or valuation experience

 - Demonstrated, hands-on experience in the US property market — no learning curve on market fundamentals

 - Proficiency in ANOW, Total, and Excel-based valuation modelling

 - Working knowledge of USPAP requirements and their practical application in report preparation

 - Bachelor’s degree in Real Estate, Finance, Economics, or a closely related field

 - Strong written English — reports require clear, accurate, and defensible reasoning

 



Advantageous



 - MAI designation (Appraisal Institute) or active candidacy

 - RICS membership — relevant for internationally-based candidates with demonstrable US market exposure

 - Familiarity with CoStar, REIS, or RCA analytics platforms

 - Experience across two or more distinct asset classes

 



What We Offer



 - Base salary PHP 80,000 – PHP 110,000 per month

 - PHP 100,000 – PHP 140,000 for candidates with MAI candidacy or a demonstrable US CRE track record across multiple asset classes — we pay up for the right experience

 - Fully remote position

 - Clear onboarding with defined expectations from day one



**IMPORTANT**

To apply for this role, only use this link: 





Direct messages via onlinejobs.ph are not accepted.

title: Outreach Operations & CRM VA
description:
We are seeking an Intermediate Tech VA to manage the day-to-day execution of our outbound ecosystem. This role is for a detail-oriented specialist who can oversee multi-channel outreach 
 + LinkedIn), ensure our technical infrastructure remains healthy, and keep our CRM data pristine.



Role Overview

* Role Type: Tech VA / Outreach Operations

* Seniority: Intermediate

* Job Type: Part-time Permanent

* Location: Asia or Latin America

* Timezone: EST, CST, or MST

* Compensation: $3 – $5/hr



Main Responsibilities / Day-to-Day

* Campaign Oversight: Monitor and manage active
 and LinkedIn outreach campaigns to ensure smooth execution.

* Inbox & Response Management: Check inboxes daily to flag replies, identify new opportunities, and escalate technical issues immediately.

* CRM Hygiene: Maintain a "source of truth" in the CRM by updating lead status, tracking conversations, and managing the sales pipeline to ensure no data is missing or outdated.

* Technical Maintenance: Support the setup and maintenance of domains, inboxes, and sending accounts; troubleshoot any campaign disruptions.

* Workflow Support: Assist in the implementation of new automations and workflows to increase outbound efficiency.

* Lead Routing: Efficiently tag, categorize, and route leads to the appropriate tea
mbers based on response type.





Essential Qualifications / Must-Haves

* Outbound Experience: Proven track record supporting lead generation systems across both
 and LinkedIn outreach.

* CRM Proficiency: A strong understanding of CRM tools and the discipline to maintain strict data hygiene.

* Technical Setup: Experience managing domains, inbox configuration, and fundamental
 deliverability protocols.

* Tool Fluency: Familiarity with automation tools and AI platforms used specifically for outbound systems.

* Operational Rigor: Strong organizational skills with an obsessive attention to detail and the ability to meet deadlines via SOPs.



Preferred Skills / Nice-to-Haves

* Troubleshooting: Advanced ability to diagnose why a campaign has stalled and implement a technical fix autonomously.

* AI Integration: Experience using AI tools to personalize outreach or categorize responses at scale.

* Process Improvement: Ability to suggest and implement small workflow tweaks that reduce manual friction.



KPIs / Success Metrics

* Data Accuracy: Maintaining a high standard of CRM hygiene with zero missing or outdated lead entries.

* Campaign Uptime: Achieving minimal disruptions or technical downtime across all sending accounts.

* Deliverability Health: Maintaining low bounce rates and high inbox placement through proactive monitoring.

* Response Efficiency: Timely tagging and routing of leads, ensuring no prospect wait-time exceeds internal benchmarks.

* Task Reliability: A high completion rate of tasks based strictly on provided SOPs and deadlines.



This covers the operational layer of your outreach, ensuring that your campaigns stay live and your CRM stays organized so you can focus on closing deals.



Hiring Process:

- Round 1: Interview with Talent Team (Skills + Experience Assessment).

- Round 2: Interview with Hiring Manager (Project Scope + Compensation Discussion).



To apply, send your resume link (accessible to all) and brief summary of experience

title: AI Image Creator (Nano Banana Pro)
description:
We are looking for a creative and reliable AI Image Creator who can produce consistent, high-quality podcast-style character images using Nano Banana Pro — either through Higgsfield or FLOW. This is a part-time role, easy to do from home, and only requires 1–3 hours of your day.

This is a long-term position for someone detail-oriented who takes pride in producing clean, consistent results every single day.

Here is exactly how the workflow works:



You will be given exact ideas and references by us

Use Nano Banana Pro on Higgsfield or FLOW to generate images

Use our provided base prompts to create or modify characters — changing backgrounds, outfits, or replacing characters while keeping the scene intact

Make the character hold the product and look into the camera where required

Create mirrored interviewer/second speaker images in podcast style

Make sure the character stays visually consistent across all images

Download all finished images and upload to Google Drive and share with us



The images you will produce include:



Podcast-style characters holding a product and facing the camera

Interviewer/second speaker images in matching podcast environments

Character images with swapped backgrounds while keeping the character identical

Mirrored versions of images where needed (using Nano Banana or 
/flip-image)



This is a straightforward, repetitive role — if you enjoy working with AI image tools and have a good eye for consistency, this is perfect for you.



REQUIREMENTS:



Hands-on experience with Nano Banana Pro (Higgsfield or FLOW) — this is non-negotiable

Strong eye for visual consistency — character must look the same across all images

Able to follow base prompts and instructions precisely

Attention to detail in framing, lighting, and character positioning

Fluent in written and spoken English

Portfolio required — must include recent AI-generated image work

Long-term commitment — we are not looking for someone who frequently moves between jobs

Reliable internet connection, able to deliver 8–12 images per day

Self-motivated and communicates proactively





HOW TO APPLY:

To be considered you must complete ALL of the following:

title: General Virtual Assistant/CSR
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing UK-based natural skin and hair care brand dedicated to providing effective and ethical solutions for women aged 40–70. Through our direct-to-customer e-commerce model, we’ve built a loyal community of customers who value our products, service, and values.



As our business continues to expand, we are looking for a dedicated Virtual Assistant to join our customer support team. You will play a key role in delivering excellent service, ensuring that every customer interaction reflects our commitment to care and quality.



The Role

1. Respond to customer enquiries via
 (Gorgias) with empathy and professionalism.

2. Manage customer engagement across social media, including comments and direct messages.

3. Create and process orders, refunds, and adjustments in Shopify.

4. Attend tea
etings via Zoom when necessary

5. Collaborate with our UK and Philippines-based teams to maintain a smooth, responsive customer experience.

Training will be provided, and you will be supported to grow your skills and confidence in line with the role.



What We’re Looking For

· Excellent written and spoken English communication skills.

· Strong interpersonal skills, with a friendly, empathetic, and professional manner.

· Good computer literacy, with experience in Shopify or Gorgias is required.

· Reliability, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently as well as part of a team.

· A proactive and adaptable approach, with a willingness to learn and contribute to a growing brand.



What We Offer

· Competitive starting salary

· Fixed rest days (Sun & Mon or Fri & Sat)

· 8-hour shift (7 hours work + 1 hour break)

· Performance-related bonuses (after 6 months).



How to Apply

If you are passionate about customer service, eager to learn, and looking for a long-term role with a supportive team, we would love to hear from you.

title: Civil Engineer / Quantity Surveyor - Commercial & Residential | Remote | UK/Ireland Projects
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering the best value property maintenance has established us as a reliable partner for residential and commercial clients nationwide. With decades of experience, including 50 years of expertise in garage conversions, we pride ourselves on impeccable craftsmanship, turning our clients' visions into reality while ensuring their properties remain in top condition.



Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented Quantity Surveyor/Office Engineer to join our dynamic team. This multifaceted role combines quantity surveying expertise with office engineering and financial administration, focusing on accurate cost estimation, project budgeting, and comprehensive project support. The successful candidate will work closely with our project managers, site teams, and clients to ensure precise cost control and seamless project delivery from concept to completion.



Key Responsibilities

Cost Estimation & Quantity Surveying



Project Estimating: Calculate materials, labor costs, and overall project budgets with precision

BOQ & BOM Preparation: Develop comprehensive Bills of Quantities and Bills of Materials for all projects

Job Pricing: Analyze construction plans and prepare detailed quantity requirements and pricing structures

Contract Analysis: Scrutinize maintenance costs, material expenses, and contracts to secure optimal deals

Tender Management: Analyze tenders and manage procurement processes for construction and design projects

Prepare accurate brickwork and blockwork quantity take-offs, including bricks, blocks, mortar, lintels, insulation, and related masonry components

Analyze brickwork labor and material rates to ensure competitive and accurate pricing

Estimating Tools: Utilize software including Simpro, JobTread, Bluebeam, PlanSwift, CostX, Measure Square, Stone Pro, and Microsoft Office to support estimating, budgeting, and project documentation.



Project Coordination & Client Management



Stakeholder Liaison: Coordinate with site managers, clients, contractors, and subcontractors to ensure smooth project execution

Reporting: Prepare comprehensive reports, analyses, contracts, budgets, and risk assessments

Strategic Advisory: Advise managers and clients on cost improvements, new strategies, and savings opportunities

Change Management: Document design changes and update budgets accordingly

Material Management: Track materials inventory and coordinate ordering when required



Financial Administration & Office Support



Invoice Management: Handle invoicing processes and perform data entry for financial documentation

Administrative Support: Assist staff accountants and handle various office and financial tasks

Client Administration: Manage administrative tasks delegated by clients with efficiency and accuracy



Required Skills & Experience

Technical Requirements



Quantity Surveying: Proven experience in cost estimation, BOQ preparation, and quantity surveying methodologies

Construction Knowledge: Strong understanding of construction processes, materials, and industry standards

Financial Acumen: Experience with budget management, financial reporting, and cost control

Contract Management: Knowledge of construction contracts, procurement, and tender analysis

Simpro Experience: Hands-on experience using Simpro for job costing, project budgeting, invoicing, and workflow management



Professional Skills



Analytical Skills: Strong problem-solving abilities with exceptional attention to detail

Software Proficiency: Competency in quantity surveying software, spreadsheet applications, and financial systems

Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills for client and contractor liaison

Organization: Outstanding organizational skills with ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

Adaptability: Flexibility to handle diverse administrative and technical tasks



What We Offer



Competitive salary package

Opportunity to work with self-builders across Ireland and the UK

Professional development and training opportunities

Collaborative and supportive remote work environment

Career growth potential within an expanding company

Involvement in diverse construction and visualization projects

Remote working flexibility with comprehensive project support systems

Experience working on international projects with diverse clients.



Application Instructions

Please complete the attached application form and submit it along with your CV:

title: Virtual Travel Consultant – Ticketing, Hotels & Holiday Packages
description:
Virtual Travel Consultant – Ticketing, Hotels & Holiday Packages



Work Mode: 100% Remote

Industry: Travel & Tourism

Employment Type: Full-time



Role Overview



This is a remote sales role, not a casual work-from-home arrangement. You are expected to independently sell and close air tickets, hotels, and holiday packages with zero hand-holding. If you need office structure to stay productive, this will expose you fast.



Key Responsibilities



Sell and manage air ticketing, hotel bookings, and holiday packages remotely

Convert online, phone, and WhatsApp inquiries into confirmed sales



Meet monthly sales targets consistently



Handle after-sales service, amendments, and payment follow-ups



Upsell add-on services (tours, transfers, insurance, visas where applicable)



Coordinate with airlines, hotels, and suppliers across time zones



Requirements (Strict – Read Carefully)



2–3+ years proven experience in ticketing, hotels, and holiday packages



Hands-on expertise with GDS systems



Demonstrated ability to close sales remotely



Reliable internet connection, laptop, and professional home setup



Strong time management and self-discipline



Target-driven mindset — remote work does not reduce expectations



What We Offer



Fixed salary (based on experience)



Performance-based commission



Long-term opportunity for consistent performers



No micromanagement — results speak



How to Apply



Send your CV to 

Subject: Virtual Travel Consultant Application

title: AI Image and Video Generation Specialist for Premium Jewellery Brand
description:
We are looking for a talented AI Image and Video Generation Specialist to join our men's fashion jewellery e-commerce brand initially on a part-time basis, moving to a full time role over time.



This is a long-term opportunity for the right person. We are starting with 2 hours per day, but there is strong potential for this role to grow as the brand expands.



We want someone highly skilled in AI content creation who can produce premium, photorealistic, product-accurate imagery and video content for a modern men's jewellery brand. You should have a strong eye for design, styling, and fashion, and be able to create content that feels aspirational, commercially strong, and aligned with our brand aesthetic.



This role is ideal for someone who is creative, proactive, detail-oriented, and confident working independently. We are looking for someone who can take ownership of the creative process, work autonomously using their own initiative, and also follow direction well when needed.



About the role



You will create high-quality AI-generated image and video content for our brand across our website, social media,
 marketing, paid ads, and product launches.



Your work will include product imagery, lifestyle visuals, campaign-style content, and creative assets that help present our men's fashion jewellery in a premium and desirable way.



Initial hours and pay



• Part-time

• 2-3 hours per day to start

• Long-term role with potential for increased hours over time

• $3-6 per hour depending on experience and quality of work, with opportunity for pay growth



What you will be doing



• Create premium AI-generated image and video content for our jewellery brand

• Produce photorealistic and product-accurate visuals that are polished, realistic, and commercially appealing

• Create lifestyle imagery, campaign visuals, product-focused content, and marketing creatives

• Understand our brand aesthetic and translate it into exceptional visual content

• Develop strong prompts and workflows to achieve consistent, high-quality results

• Refine and improve outputs to ensure they are ready to use

• Create content that feels on-brand, aspirational, and designed to appeal to customers

• Generate variations for testing across different marketing channels

• Organise prompts, files, and workflows clearly and efficiently

• Stay up to date with the latest AI image and video tools and techniques



Who we are looking for



• An AI image and video expert with strong hands-on experience

• Someone with a great sense of design, fashion, styling, and visual composition

• Someone who can create men's jewellery content that looks premium, modern, and highly desirable

• Someone who understands how to make AI visuals look realistic, high-end, and accurate to the actual product

• Someone who can work completely autonomously, manage their time well, and take initiative without needing constant oversight

• Someone who is also able to take direction, understand feedback, and apply it accurately

• Someone reliable, professional, and genuinely interested in creating excellent work



Requirements



• Strong experience with AI image and video generation tools such as Midjourney, Flux, DALL·E, Runway, Kling, or similar

• Proven ability to create photorealistic and product-accurate imagery

• Strong understanding of branding, visual storytelling, and premium e-commerce content

• Strong sense of design, styling, colour, lighting, and overall image quality

• Experience refining AI outputs using editing software where needed

• Good written English and clear communication

• Reliable internet connection

• Ability to work consistently during agreed hours



When applying, please include



• A short introduction about yourself and your relevant experience

• What AI image and video generation tools you have access to and are competent in

• What editing software you use

• Examples of similar work you have created for fashion, jewellery, product, or lifestyle brands



Why this is a great opportunity



• Long-term role with room to grow

• Flexible part-time hours to start

• Opportunity to work on a premium brand with strong visual direction

• Creative role with scope to make a real impact

• We value quality, initiative, and great work



Please only apply if you are confident in your ability to create high-quality, photorealistic, on-brand AI image and video content.



We are looking for someone exceptional and would love to find a long-term person to grow with our brand.

title: B2B Sales Representative (Remote – Philippines) – Recruitment Services
description:
Location:

Remote (Philippines only)  

Work Hours: Flexible, aligned with Australian business hours (you will be given your specific working window)



Job Type:

Longterm, 1year minimum contract (with strong possibility of extension based on performance)





About the Role

We are looking for a driven B2B Sales Representative based in the Philippines to actively sell our recruitment and staffing services to businesses in Australia and overseas. You will focus on outbound prospecting, lead generation, and closing new clients for our recruitment business.



You will work remotely from the Philippines, following clear sales processes, scripts, and tools we provide. This is a long?term role with performance?based incentives and the opportunity to grow into a senior sales or account?management position.





Key Responsibilities

- Prospect and qualify potential clients (business owners, HR managers, hiring managers) via LinkedIn,
, and cold calling.  

- Follow up with leads, schedule discovery calls, and present our recruitment services.  

- Hit monthly KPIs for calls, meetings booked, and new clients signed.  

- Manage opportunities in the CRM and keep all activity accurately recorded.  

- Provide feedback on what messaging and offers work best with prospects.  

- Work closely with the recruitment team to ensure smooth handover of new clients.





Requirements

- At least 2 years of experience in outbound B2B sales (staffing, recruitment, lead generation, or similar services preferred).  

- Excellent English communication (both spoken and written).  

- Comfortable with cold calling, LinkedIn outreach, and
 campaigns.  

- Confident closing new clients and discussing pricing/service options.  

- Ability to work independently, stay focused, and meet targets.  

- Stable internet, quiet workspace, and a laptop or PC.  

- Availability during Australian business hours (flexible, but you must be able to cover part of this window).





What We Offer

- Long?term opportunity (initial 12?month contract, with potential for renewal).  

- Clear commission / performance structure based on new clients, meetings, and targets (exact details discussed in interview).  

- Training on our recruitment services, sales process, and tools.  

- Remote work from anywhere in the Philippines.  

- Regular performance reviews and opportunities for bonuses and role growth.





How to Apply

Please apply via OnlineJobs.ph and include:  

- A short introduction explaining your sales experience and why you’re interested in this role.  

- Your expected monthly rate.

- Your availability (timezone/work hours you can commit to).  

- Any experience selling recruitment, staffing, or B2B services.



Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted for online interview.

title: Data Analyst & Reporting Specialist | Ecommerce Agency
description:
We're a London-based Shopify ecommerce growth agency with a growing team in the Philippines, looking for a Data Analyst & Reporting Specialist to own cross-channel analytics, reporting, and business intelligence across multiple client accounts.



We have dedicated specialists running Google Ads, Meta/TikTok Ads, Klaviyo, SEO, and Shopify for our clients. What we need is someone who connects all of that data into a single clear picture. You'll build the dashboards, track the numbers, spot the trends, and make sure every client and every tea
mber has the data they need to make better decisions.



This role is central to how we operate. We sell data-driven growth, and you're the person who makes sure the data is clean, accurate, and actionable.



What You'll Be Doing:



Reporting & Dashboards:

- Building and maintaining client-facing reporting dashboards in Looker Studio

- Pulling data from Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Klaviyo, Shopify, and Google Analytics into unified reports

- Creating branded Sabre Digital dashboard templates that can be scaled across clients

- Producing weekly and monthly performance reports with clear insights and recommendations

- Building internal dashboards for the team to track KPIs across all client accounts

- Automating reporting workflows wherever possible to reduce manual work



Analytics & Insights:

- Tracking cross-channel attribution and understanding how paid, organic,
, and direct traffic work together

- Analysing campaign performance data to identify winning channels, audiences, and creatives

- Spotting trends, anomalies, and opportunities that individual channel specialists might miss

- Conducting deep-dive analyses on CVR, AOV, LTV, CAC, and other ecommerce metrics

- Supporting the team with data for client strategy calls and proposals

- Benchmarking client performance against industry standards



Data Management:

- Setting up and auditing Google Analytics 4 configurations across client stores

- Managing Google Tag Manager implementations and conversion tracking

- Ensuring data accuracy across all platforms (pixel setup, UTM tracking, attribution settings)

- Building and maintaining spreadsheet models for forecasting, budgeting, and scenario planning

- Cleaning and structuring raw data exports for analysis

- Documenting data sources, definitions, and reporting methodologies



What We're Looking For:



- Minimum 2 years experience in data analytics, reporting, or business intelligence (agency or ecommerce experience strongly preferred)

- Strong experience building dashboards in Looker Studio (Google Data Studio)

- Deep understanding of Google Analytics 4 and Google Tag Manager

- Comfortable working with data from multiple ad platforms (Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads)

- Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills (pivot tables, VLOOKUP, formulas, data modelling)

- Understanding of ecommerce metrics and what drives profitable growth

- Ability to translate raw data into clear, actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders

- Detail-oriented with a focus on data accuracy

- Comfortable working independently and managing your own time

- Strong English communication (written)

- Available to work UK business hours (9am-5pm GMT)



Tools You Should Be Familiar With:



Required:

- Looker Studio (dashboard building, data blending)

- Google Analytics 4

- Google Tag Manager

- Google Ads (understanding campaign data and metrics)

- Meta Ads Manager (understanding campaign data and metrics)

- Google Sheets / Excel (advanced)

- Claude (Anthropic) or similar AI tools for data analysis and automation



Desirable:

- Shopify Analytics (understanding store data, sales reports, customer data)

- Klaviyo (understanding
/SMS performance data)

- TikTok Ads Manager

- BigQuery or SQL (for advanced data queries)

- Supermetrics, 
, or similar data connectors

- Notion (documentation, task management)

- Python or Apps Script (for data automation)

- Google AI Studio / Gemini

- Ahrefs or SEMrush (SEO data)

- Hotjar or Microsoft Clarity (behavioural analytics)

- Power BI or Tableau (alternative dashboarding)



WAGE/SALARY: PHP 40,000 - 70,000/mo (depending on experience)



About Us:



We're a lean, fast-moving agency that works with premium ecommerce brands across the UK. We have a growing team in the Philippines covering web dev, paid ads, retention, SEO, social media, UGC, and project management. Data is at the heart of everything we do. We need someone who can take the raw output from all of those channels and turn it into the intelligence that drives our clients' growth.



Important: All company tools and software are provided strictly for client work only. Misuse of company resources for personal or external projects is grounds for immediate termination.



To Apply:



Please share examples of dashboards you've built (Looker Studio preferred), including the data sources used and how the dashboards informed decision-making. Tell us about your experience with GA4 and GTM setup, and which ecommerce platforms you've worked with. Bonus if you can show how you've used AI tools to speed up your analytics workflow.

title: Senior Creative Designer / Art Director
description:
About Us



We're a small growing creative agency working with CPG brands. We handle their entire creative production: branding, print and digital campaigns, e-commerce visuals, social media assets, AI-powered content, and more.



We work as an embedded creative team, delivering high-quality work through a streamlined Kanban workflow with fast turnarounds.



We're currently 2 (myself and a graphic designer) and looking to grow the team. Preference for CET-compatible timezones.



The Role



We are looking for a Senior Creative Designer with strong art direction skills. You will focus on creative execution: designing, producing, and polishing high-quality assets across branding, print, digital, and AI-powered workflows.



We need someone with 5 to 10 years of experience in graphic design, art direction, or creative production. You take ownership of your work, check every detail, and deliver assets that are ready to go live without supervision.



You will receive briefs from the team lead or directly from clients if proven communication ability, and focus on producing excellent creative work. Communication happens internally via Discord and Linear.



What You Will Do



Brand Identity & Print Design: Create and refine logos, brand identities, and visual systems. Design retail advertising (posters, POS, flyers, business cards), product catalogs, lookbooks, and packaging layouts. You must be comfortable preparing print-ready files following printer requirements (bleeds, trim marks, color standards). Build 360 web campaigns for product launches and brand activations, with strong knowledge of common web ratios and standards.



Digital & Campaign Design: Design ad creatives, social media assets,
 templates, e-commerce product pages, and banner kits. Ensure all visuals are on-brand, properly sized, and conversion-focused.



AI Visual Production: Use AI-powered tools to generate product lifestyle scenes, virtual try-ons, UGC-style content, product video sequences, and high-volume creative variations. Write effective prompts and work with generative image and video models (Runway, Kling, Flux, Nano Banana, Vemo, Seedance, etc.). Experience with Freepik Space for AI campaign production (outfit generation, scene building, content creation) is a big plus. If you haven't used this specific tool, you must be the type of person who learns new tools on a regular basis. This is a fast-paced, constantly evolving industry.



Quality Control: This is one of the most important parts of the job. You proofread every single text. You verify every dimension. You check every alignment. You make sure the deliverable matches the brief exactly. You re-check your own work multiple times before anything goes out. If you are not naturally obsessive about details, this role is not for you.



Required Skills



- Expert-level Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, and InDesign. Figma is used for teamwork and presentations but no special experience is required.

- Hands-on experience with AI image/video generation. Strong prompting skills. Familiarity with generative models and AI creative workflows.

- Strong eye for composition, typography, color, and layout. Knowledge of photography principles. Natural affinity with fashion, lifestyle, and consumer brand aesthetics.

- Obsessive about accuracy. Typos, misaligned elements, and wrong dimensions are unacceptable to you.

- Professional English (written).



Nice to Have



Experience working with fashion, footwear, or CPG brands. Portfolio showing retail advertising, campaign visuals, or AI-generated brand content. Experience with UGC content creation or AI campaign production pipelines (e.g. Freepik Space). Motion design or short-form video editing skills. Knowledge of no-code website builders such as Framer or Webflow.



What We Provide



All software licenses: Adobe Creative Cloud, Figma, AI tools, and platform subscriptions. You work on your own computer. This is a long-term, stable position with a growing agency. You will work directly with the founder and creative director, who has 20+ years of experience in art direction for global brands.



SSS, PhilHealth, and Pag-IBIG contributions covered. 13th month pay included.



How to Apply



Send your portfolio link and a short message explaining why this role is a good fit for you. Include examples of AI-generated visuals or campaign work if you have them. We value quality of work over length of CV.

title: AI SCRIPTING VA (YOUTUBE CONTENT)
description:
JOB POST — AI SCRIPTING VA (YOUTUBE CONTENT)



Title:

AI Script Assistant (VA) for YouTube — Research + Script Creation (Using AI Tools)



Overview:



We are building multiple YouTube channels and are looking for a Virtual Assistant who can help create scripts using AI tools.

You are NOT expected to be a professional writer.

Your job is to use AI (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to help generate, refine, and organize scripts based on our system.



This is a process-driven role, not a creative writing role.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Taking approved video ideas

Using AI tools to generate scripts

Editing and refining AI output to make it clear and engaging

Structuring scripts properly for YouTube

Assisting with research to improve script quality

Preparing scripts for voiceover and production



Important:

You are NOT writing from scratch

You are using AI and following a system



Work Expectations:

2–3 scripts per day

Fast turnaround

Strong communication

Ability to follow instructions exactly

Willingness to learn and improve



Required Skills:

Good English (very important)

title: Sales & Engagement VA for Online Education Business (Setter + Social Media + Tracking)
description:
About Us

We run a 12-week online program that helps educators and education professionals build profitable teaching businesses without quitting their jobs. We work with passionate, mission-driven educators who are tired of salary caps and institutional red tape. They want to own their expertise and build income on their terms. We're growing fast and need a sharp, sales-minded VA to help us scale.



What You'll Do

Your primary job is to move conversations toward enrollment.

You'll be the first voice prospects hear from us. You'll engage with cold and warm leads on social media, respond to DMs, qualify interest, book discovery calls for our co-founder, and track everything so nothing falls through the cracks.

This role requires flexibility and eagerness to learn. You'll need to step in and be trained on whatever the business needs as we grow — whether that's refining DM scripts, testing new outreach strategies, or supporting other areas of the business. We're looking for someone who sees this as an opportunity to grow with us, not just complete tasks.

Daily Responsibilities:

DM Management & Lead Engagement



Monitor and respond to messages across LinkedIn, Instagram,
, and TikTok

Use our proven scripts to move cold and warm leads toward discovery calls

Follow up consistently with prospects using our outreach sequences

Identify high-intent prospects and book calls with our closer



Lead Qualification



Ask qualifying questions before booking calls (current role, pain points, timeline)

Flag hot leads to prioritize

Politely redirect poor-fit prospects



Call Booking & Coordination



Send Calendly links to qualified leads

Confirm calls 24 hours in advance and send reminders

Update tracker with call outcomes (showed / no-showed / rescheduled / closed)



Tracking & Reporting



Update DM tracker daily (who was contacted, responses, next steps)

Update sales tracker after each discovery call

Provide weekly reports on activity and results



Light Social Media Engagement (As needed)



Like and comment on posts from warm leads

Respond to story replies and engagement

Maintain a warm, relational presence online





Who You Are

Must-Haves:



? Sales experience — You've done appointment-setting, lead generation, or sales support before. You understand how to move conversations toward a goal.

? Amazing conversational English — You write like a real person, not a robot. Your grammar is flawless and your tone is warm and natural.

? Admin skills — You're organized, detail-oriented, and can manage multiple conversations and tracking systems without dropping the ball.

? Eager learner — You're excited to be trained on new systems, tools, and strategies. You don't just want to complete tasks — you want to understand the business and grow with it.

? Cultural fit — You're proactive, positive, and collaborative. You bring solutions, not just problems. You communicate clearly and take ownership of your work.



Strong Pluses:



???? Previous experience in education, coaching, or course-creator industries

???? Experience with CRM systems or pipeline management tools

???? Comfortable working with U.S.-based clients in similar time zones



Personality Fit:



Relational and warm — You genuinely enjoy connecting with people. Our audience is educators — they can spot inauthenticity immediately.

Results-driven — You're energized by hitting goals and seeing conversations turn into booked calls and closed sales.

Comfortable with sales — You don't shy away from asking for the call. You see it as helping, not pushing.

Fast-moving and adaptable — You're comfortable with change and evolving systems. You don't need everything to be perfect before you act.

Proactive and enthusiastic — You see what needs to happen and make it happen without being told.

Coachable — You take feedback well and improve quickly.





Compensation & Hours

Starting Rate: $4.00/hour

Hours: 20–25 hours per week to start (potential to grow to 30–40 hours based on performance and business needs)

Commission: $125 per closed sale (begins after your first month of employment)

Payment: Weekly via PayPal, Wise, or your preferred method

How Earnings Work:

Month 1 (Training Period):



You'll earn your base hourly rate while you learn our systems, scripts, and processes

No commission during Month 1 — this is your ramp-up period



Month 2 and Beyond:



Base pay continues at $4/hour

You earn $125 commission for every prospect you engage with who enrolls in our program

Commission is paid weekly along with your base pay



Commission Eligibility: You earn commission when a prospect you directly engaged with (via DM, follow-up, or booking coordination) enrolls in our program. We track this through our DM and sales trackers, so you'll always know which leads are yours.

Example Monthly Earnings (After Month 1):



Base (25 hours/week × 4 weeks × $4/hour): $400/month

Commission (3 closed sales/month × $125): +$375/month

Total potential: $775+/month



High Performer Example:



Base: $400/month

Commission (5 closed sales/month × $125): +$625/month

Total: $1,025+/month



As you prove yourself and take on more responsibility, we're open to raising your base rate and increasing commission structure.



Work Schedule & Availability

Required Working Hours:

We need someone available during U.S. Central Time (CST) business hours, specifically:



Monday–Friday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST (at least partial overlap required)

Some flexibility required for evening coverage (7:00–9:00 PM CST) 2–3 nights per week when discovery calls happen



You don't need to work all those hours, but you need to be responsive during those windows.

Start Date: As soon as possible (we're ready to onboard the right person immediately)



How to Apply

IMPORTANT: Applications missing ANY of these requirements will be deleted without review.

To apply, you MUST:

1. Use exactly 9 Application Points (AP) when submitting your application through OnlineJobs.ph

2. Use this exact
 subject line:

"Sales VA – [Your First Name] – 9 AP"

3. Submit a short video no more than 2-minutes on Loom, unlisted YouTube, or another platform where you:



Introduce yourself

Explain why you're interested in a sales/setter role (not just general VA work)

Confirm your internet speed and availability during CST hours



4. Include in your application message on OnlineJobs.ph:



Your resume (attach as PDF)

Link to your Loom/YouTube intro video

Your specific availability (which hours you can work in CST, Monday–Friday)

Confirm you used exactly 9 Application Points





Application Checklist (Check These Off Before Submitting):



 I used exactly 9 Application Points when applying

 My subject line is: "Sales VA – [My First Name] – 9 AP"

 I included a short intro video less than 2 minutes (Loom, YouTube, or other medium)

 I attached my resume as a PDF

 I confirmed my internet speed and CST availability in my video

 I stated my specific availability hours in my application



Applications that don't follow these instructions exactly will be deleted without review.

This is your first test of attention to detail — the same skill you'll need every day in this role.



Why Work With Us?

? Meaningful mission — You're helping educators take control of their income and build businesses they own

? Growth opportunity — We're scaling fast. Prove yourself and this role can grow with you (more hours, higher pay, expanded responsibilities)

? Direct mentorship — You'll work closely with experienced business builders

? Performance-based rewards — We reward results, not just hours logged

? Supportive, collaborative team — We value proactive communication, ownership, and getting better every week

? Fast-moving environment — We're building in real-time. You'll see the direct impact of your work immediately



We're looking for an eager learner with sales experience, exceptional English skills, and the right cultural fit — someone who sees this as more than just "a VA job."

If that's you, we'd love to hear from you.
