title: Cartoon & Animated Ad Creator (AI-Powered) — DTC Health Brand
description:
About Us

We are a fast-scaling direct-to-consumer health & wellness brand based in Europe, serving customers across the Netherlands, Belgium, and Scandinavia. We run aggressive performance marketing campaigns on Meta 
 & Instagram) and are building one of the most efficient remote creative teams in Europe.

We move fast. We test constantly. And we need someone who can keep up.



The Role

This is NOT a traditional animation or illustration job.

We're looking for an AI-powered Cartoon Ad Creator who specializes in scroll-stopping, high-converting animated creatives for Meta 
 & Instagram). You won't just make things look pretty — you'll be building cartoon-style ad assets that grab cold audiences by the throat and turn them into paying customers.

Cartoon and animated ads are one of the highest-performing creative formats right now. We're going all in — and we need someone who lives and breathes this format.

You'll work directly with our creative strategist, producing multiple cartoon ad variations per week — all built with AI-assisted workflows.



What You'll Be Creating



Cartoon / Animated Ads: Scroll-stopping, character-driven animated creatives optimized for Meta feeds and Reels — this is your primary output

Hook Variations: Multiple animated opening hooks per concept for systematic split testing

Story-Format Ads: Short animated narratives (problem ? solution ? CTA) built for cold traffic conversion

Static Cartoon Creatives: AI-generated illustrated stills and cartooned product visuals for ad sets

Concept Iterations: Fast turnaround on multiple style variations per brief



Key Responsibilities



Produce conversion-focused cartoon and animated ads optimized for Meta 
 & Instagram)

Transform written briefs and scripts into character-driven animated ad creatives

Use AI tools (image gen, animation tools, video upscalers) to produce 10–15+ creatives per week

Create multiple hook variations per concept for A/B testing

Collaborate closely with the creative strategist and iterate quickly based on ad performance data

Stay current on cartoon and animation trends across Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



What We're Looking For



2+ years of experience creating animated or cartoon-style content — preferably for performance marketing or DTC/eCommerce brands

Deep, hands-on experience with AI image and animation tools: Midjourney, Leonardo, Flux, DALL-E, Runway, Pika, Kling, or similar

Experience bringing characters and scenes to life with motion: CapCut Pro, Adobe After Effects, Premiere Pro, or equivalent

Proven understanding of direct-response marketing: hooks, pattern interrupts, problem-agitate-solve structure

Able to produce 10–15+ cartoon ad creatives per week using AI-assisted workflows

Fast, organized, and proactive — able to manage multiple briefs at once

Fluent in English (written and spoken)

Reliable internet connection and own equipment



This Role Won't Suit You If You...



Focus only on aesthetics and ignore performance metrics

Have no experience producing content for Meta Ads

Struggle with fast feedback loops or tight turnaround times

Need constant step-by-step supervision

Are unavailable for full-time consistent work



What We Offer



Stable, long-term full-time position with a fast-growing European brand

Work directly with the founder and creative strategist — no layers of bureaucracy

Real creative ownership: your animations directly impact business results

Performance bonuses based on winning ad creatives

Access to paid AI tool subscriptions

Freedom to experiment with cutting-edge tools and the latest animation formats

A fast-paced team that values speed, creativity, and measurable impact



Ready to Apply?

We only review applications submitted through our Typeform. Please copy and paste this link into your browser (remove spaces):



Only candidates who complete the Typeform will be considered. It takes less than 8 minutes — we'll respond within 3–5 business days.

title: Trilingual Translator (Filipino/English/Chinese)
description:
Job Description: Trilingual Translator (Filipino/English/Chinese)



Job Title: Trilingual Translator & Interpreter

Location: [City/Remote/Hybrid]

Employment Type: Full-Time / Freelance / Contract

Reports To: [e.g., Localization Manager / Operations Director]



Role Overview



We are seeking a highly skilled Trilingual Translator to facilitate communication across Tagalog (Filipino), English, and Chinese (Mandarin and Cantonese). The ideal candidate will act as a linguistic and cultural bridge, ensuring that technical documents, marketing materials, and verbal communications are accurately conveyed across these languages.



Key Responsibilities



Translation & Localization (Written)



· Translate a variety of documents from English to Filipino (Tagalog), English to Chinese (Simplified/Traditional), and vice versa.

· Localize marketing content to resonate with Filipino and Chinese-speaking audiences, adapting idioms and cultural references appropriately.

· Proofread and edit translations produced by other team members or automated tools to ensure accuracy, consistency, and brand voice.



Interpretation (Verbal)



· Provide real-time interpretation during business meetings, conference calls, and site visits between Filipino, English, Mandarin, and Cantonese speakers.

· Handle consecutive or simultaneous interpretation as required for negotiations or training sessions.



Cultural Consulting



· Advise management on cultural nuances and etiquette when dealing with Filipino and Chinese counterparts.

· Flag potential cultural misunderstandings in communications or business practices.



Cantonese Specialization



· Specifically manage interpretation/translation for Cantonese-speaking stakeholders, ensuring clarity between Cantonese and Mandarin documents/audio when required.



Qualifications



Education & Experience



· Bachelor’s degree in Linguistics, Translation, Communications, or a related field (or equivalent work experience).

· Minimum [2-3] years of professional translation/interpretation experience.

· Native or near-native proficiency in Tagalog and English.

· Professional working proficiency in Mandarin (Simplified) and Cantonese.



Skills & Competencies



· Linguistic Excellence: Deep understanding of grammar, syntax, and idioms in all four language variants.

· Dialect Awareness: Must be able to distinguish between and accurately translate Cantonese and Mandarin where they diverge.

· Technical Proficiency: Familiarity with CAT tools (e.g., Trados, MemoQ) is a plus. Proficiency in MS Office and Google Workspace.

· Soft Skills: Excellent active listening, attention to detail, and the ability to remain calm under pressure (especially during live interpretation).

· Cultural Sensitivity: Deep understanding of Philippine, Chinese, and Western business etiquette.



Preferred (Nice to Have)



· Experience in Legal and Finance 

· Certification from a recognized translation/interpretation body.

· Experience with subtitling or voice-over coordination

title: Sales Admin Support
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW



Fintonia Group is seeking a Senior Sales Admin & AI Operations Support professional to serve as the operational backbone of its sales and client engagement functions. This is not a conventional administrative role: the individual will be responsible for maintaining rigorous sales operations while independently building and managing AI-powered workflows that enhance team productivity, client responsiveness, and process quality. A non-negotiable attribute for this role is an exceptional standard of accuracy — the work product this person owns directly reflects on the firm's credibility with clients and counterparties.



The successful candidate will bring a combination of structured administrative discipline and a strong command of modern AI automation tools. Reporting directly to the Head of Sales, this person will work across sales, compliance, and operations to ensure that client onboarding and engagement workflows operate to institutional standards.



At a firm that sits at the intersection of traditional finance and digital assets, the ability to translate operational complexity into streamlined, technology-enabled processes will be a direct contribution to commercial outcomes.



Key Responsibilities:

Client Onboarding & Documentation

Own the full client onboarding lifecycle — from intake through KYC/AML documentation, compliance review, and account activation — ensuring every file is complete, accurate, and audit-ready before submission.

Prepare and coordinate all onboarding documentation including subscription agreements, client questionnaires, and regulatory forms, working closely with the compliance and operations teams to meet applicable standards.

Proactively track onboarding status for all active clients, following up on outstanding items and escalating blockers to avoid delays in the activation timeline.

Maintain a structured, version-controlled onboarding repository that can withstand internal or regulatory audit at any point.



Client Relationship Support

Serve as the first point of contact for client enquiries, providing timely, professional responses and managing expectations on resolution timelines.

Coordinate all client-facing logistics — meetings, product demonstrations, webinars, and review calls — ensuring preparation materials, agendas, and follow-up notes are managed without requiring senior team members to chase.

Maintain accurate, current client records in the CRM; flag data anomalies, contact changes, or missing information proactively rather than reactively.

Support the relationship management team in preparing client update materials, periodic reports, and tailored communications.



Sales & Administrative Support

Support the sales team with scheduling, calendar management, CRM maintenance, and preparation of pitch materials and proposals.

Maintain internal trackers and action logs for client interactions, onboarding milestones, and sales pipeline activity.

Identify and flag opportunities to streamline administrative workflows using available technology tools.



Requirements:

3–5 years of experience in client onboarding, client servicing, or relationship support within financial services, fintech, or asset management

Hands-on experience managing KYC/AML documentation and compliance-driven onboarding processes end-to-end — not just assisting

Strong proficiency in CRM systems (e.g. Salesforce, HubSpot) and Microsoft Office / Google Workspace

Excellent written English communication skills; able to draft professional client-facing correspondence independently and accurately

Structured, detail-oriented approach to documentation management with a track record of maintaining audit-ready files

Demonstrated ability to manage multiple concurrent client onboarding workflows without supervision

Comfortable working remotely and independently, aligned to Singapore / KL business hours (SGT/MYT)

Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, or a related field



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Work Hours: Aligned with Singapore Time Zone (SGT), Monday to Friday



Please apply through this link - 

ONLY applicants who upload CV via the link will be considered. Thanks!

title: AI Video Editor for Ecommerce Ads (Higgsfield, CapCut, ElevenLabs)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company producing high-converting video ads for DTC brands in industries such as supplements, footwear, and lifestyle products.



We are looking to hire 2 AI Video Editors to start immediately by the end of this week.



The ideal candidate can create extremely realistic AI-generated video ads that are indistinguishable from real footage, with strong editing and creative skills for direct-response advertising.



This role is ideal for someone who understands performance marketing, high-volume creative production, and AI video generation tools.





What You'll Do

• Produce 20–50 fully AI-generated video ads per week for multiple ecommerce brands

• Create AI talking heads, UGC-style ads, and b-roll scenes using advanced AI tools

• Edit and assemble all video content in CapCut with expert-level precision

• Analyze competitor ads on Meta Ads Library and Google to develop high-converting ad variations

• Concept, build, and iterate multiple creative angles and hooks that drive conversions

• Assist with script refinement or hook optimization when needed (scripts usually provided)





What We're Looking For

• Proven experience creating AI-generated video ads for DTC ecommerce brands

• Strong proficiency with AI tools such as Higgsfield and ElevenLabs

• Expert-level CapCut editing skills with a strong portfolio

• Ability to create extremely realistic AI visuals of people, products, and environments

• Strong understanding of direct-response ad creative and what makes ads convert

• Ability to work independently and produce high-volume creative output





Nice to Have

• Experience with Midjourney, Runway, Kling, or Sora

• Familiarity with Meta Ads Library or competitor research tools

• Experience creating UGC-style ads for paid social





Role Details

• Part-time role (32 hours per week)

• Flexible schedule Monday–Saturday

• Remote position

• We are hiring 2 editors immediately and expect onboarding by the end of this week





How to Apply

To confirm you read this entire post, start your application with the phrase:



AICreator492



Then answer the following questions:



1. Walk us through your workflow for creating a fully AI-generated UGC-style video ad from start to finish. From receiving a script to delivering the final edit in CapCut. 

2. Which AI tools do you currently use for video generation, image generation, and voice generation? Rate your proficiency with each tool (beginner / intermediate / advanced). 

3. How do you ensure that AI-generated talking heads and visuals look realistic enough to be used in paid ads? What techniques or tools do you use to avoid the typical "AI look"? 

4. When analyzing competitor ads for inspiration, what specific elements do you look for that indicate high conversion potential? 

5. How long does it take you to create a single 25-second short-form video ad that is fully AI-generated, from start to finished edit?

If you're passionate about AI video creation, performance marketing, and high-volume creative production, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Dropshipping Creative Video Editor for E-Commerce Brand (AI Skills Preferred)
description:

Our products focus on compact and travel friendly hair styling tools designed for modern lifestyles. Your role will be to transform raw footage, user generated content, and AI generated assets into high performing video creatives that capture attention and encourage customers to purchase.



The ideal candidate understands how video creatives influence customer behavior on platforms such as
, Instagram, and TikTok. You will work closely with our marketing team to create short form videos that highlight product benefits, demonstrate real usage, and drive measurable revenue through advertising campaigns.



If you enjoy combining creativity with performance marketing and understand how video content converts viewers into buyers, we would love to see your portfolio.



How Your Work Generates Revenue



Your video creatives will directly contribute to revenue generation through:



Product demonstration videos that show how the tools are used.



Before and after styling transformations that highlight visible results.



Lifestyle videos showing travel convenience and everyday usability.



UGC style testimonials that build trust with new customers.



Short form ads optimized for Meta and TikTok conversions.

UGC and AI Based Content

Visual Enhancements

Creative Research

Performance Optimization

Edit video creatives with the goal of improving engagement, click through rates, and conversions.



Requirements

AI Skills



Applicants should have experience using AI tools for video production such as:



AI voice generation tools

AI based script generation tools



Work Setup

Work from home



Expected Output

The expected production 2 quality video creatives per day.



Compensation

$350 Fix Rate per month + Bonuses

title: E-commerce & Marketplace Growth Lead
description:

, TikTok Shop, and other key e-commerce platforms.

You will be responsible for listings, promotions, platform campaigns, affiliate creator coordination, livestream support, stock coordination, customer and order support coordination, and performance tracking, while working closely with internal teams to ensure smooth execution and commercial growth.

This role is not primarily focused on Shopee and Lazada account management, but on growing our broader e-commerce business across Shopify, TikTok Shop, and other key digital sales channels.



< KEY>

Work closely with design, marketing, warehouse, and operations teams to ensure timely campaign execution

Experience with EDM platforms,
, or other digital marketing channels

title: SEO Content Writer
description:
Why This Role Exists

We are not looking for a "content producer" to fill a blog with words. We need a Growth Operator who views content as a scalable acquisition channel.



This role is designed to provide Founder and Marketing Leverage by owning the entire lifecycle of organic authority. You won’t just be writing articles; you will be architecting a library of high-intent assets that capture search traffic and convert it into revenue. In this role, you bridge the gap between creative storytelling and technical SEO, ensuring that every word published serves a strategic purpose in our growth engine.



What You’ll Be Responsible For (Outcomes)

Research and execute comprehensive pillar pages and "evergreen" guides that establish us as the definitive voice in our space.

Write and optimize page copy that satisfies both the Google algorithm and human psychology, maintaining a delicate balance between SEO density and high-velocity CTAs.

Produce in-depth, long-form assets (1,500+ words) designed to rank for high-difficulty keywords by solving for user intent better than any competitor on page one.

Own the "freshness" of our digital library. You will proactively audit, rewrite, and re-optimize existing content to defend rankings and improve click-through rates (CTR).

Execute flawless on-page SEO—from semantic keyword integration and internal linking structures to meta-data and schema—ensuring 100% crawlability and relevance.

Requirements

What You’ve Done Before

You have a portfolio of content that currently ranks in the top 3 positions for competitive, high-intent keywords.

You are a power user of Ahrefs, SEMrush, SurferSEO, or similar tools, using them to find "content gaps" that competitors have missed.

You have experience translating complex technical concepts into clear, persuasive prose for sophisticated professional audiences.

You’ve managed content calendars where success was measured by organic traffic growth and lead conversion, not just "word count."

Who You Are

You don’t need a brief to tell you what to write. You dig into the data, identify what the market is searching for, and build the solution.

You understand that modern SEO is about Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness. You write for humans first, knowing that’s what Google rewards.

You understand the "why" behind site architecture and how content affects the broader technical health of a domain.

You thrive in high-growth environments where speed of execution and quality of output are equally weighted.

Who This Is NOT For

The "Generalist" Blogger: If your experience is primarily in lifestyle writing or high-volume, low-quality "content farms," this isn't the right fit.

The AI-Only Writer: We value efficiency, but if your process is "prompt and publish" without deep original research and strategic layering, you won't meet our standards.

The Task-Taker: If you need a manager to assign you every topic and keyword, you will find our pace challenging.

What Success Looks Like

Month 1: Comprehensive audit of existing top-performing content; identification of 5 "low-hanging fruit" keywords; first 2 high-intent pillar posts published.

Month 3: Measurable upward trend in organic impressions and "Position 1-3" keyword rankings; landing page conversion rates stabilized through A/B testing.

Month 6: The organic channel is a predictable lead-generation machine, with a compounding library of assets that allow the leadership team to scale back on paid spend.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):



Organic Traffic Growth: Month-over-month increase in targeted search traffic.

Keyword Velocity: Number of target keywords moving into the Top 10.

Conversion Rate: Percentage of readers moving from blog/guide to a lead action.

Content Freshness Score: 100% of "Core" assets updated within the last 6 months.

Minimum Technical and Work Environment Requirements:



Internet Connection:

Primary internet connection with a minimum speed of 15 Mbps.

Backup internet connection with at least 10 Mbps.

Backup connection must be capable of supporting work during a power outage.

Primary Device:

Desktop or laptop equipped with at least:

Intel Core i5 (8th generation or newer), Intel Core i3 (10th generation or newer), AMD Ryzen 5, or an equivalent processor.

A minimum of 8 GB RAM.

Backup Device:

Must meet or exceed the performance of an Intel Core i3 processor.

Must be functional during power interruptions.

Peripherals and Workspace:

A functioning webcam.

A noise-canceling USB headset.

A quiet, dedicated home office space.

A smartphone for communication and verification purposes.

title: Community & Partnerships Manager
description:
Company: Hypervibe & Sage Space Technologies

Employment Type: Part-Time (4–6 hours per day, with potential to grow into full-time)

Compensation: $6–$9 USD per hour (depending on experience)



About Us

Hypervibe is a global leader in whole body vibration technology, delivering science-backed solutions for fitness, rehabilitation, and performance.

Sage Space Technologies is pioneering a new category at the intersection of technology, wellness, and immersive sensory experiences.



We are building brands that combine cutting-edge technology with real-world impact—and we are looking for someone who can help us grow and engage our global community.



Role Overview

This is a hands-on role focused on community engagement, influencer outreach, and partnership growth.



You will manage conversations across our social platforms, build relationships with influencers and affiliates, and help grow a loyal, engaged customer and partner ecosystem.



This is not just a support role—we are looking for someone who can think strategically and contribute to growth.



Key Responsibilities



Community Management

Monitor and respond to comments and messages across our social media platforms

Engage with our audience in a way that reflects our brand voice and values

Identify opportunities to turn engagement into deeper relationships



Community Growth

Develop and execute strategies to build and grow our customer communities

Increase engagement, retention, and brand loyalty

Help turn customers into advocates



Influencer Research & Outreach

Research and identify relevant influencers, creators, and professionals aligned with our brands

Conduct outreach for collaborations and partnerships

Build and maintain a pipeline of potential partners



Affiliate & Reseller Management

Act as the main point of contact for existing affiliates and resellers

Support, nurture, and grow these relationships

Ensure affiliates remain active, engaged, and aligned with our brand



Partnership Growth

Develop strategies to grow our affiliate and reseller programs

Identify new partnership opportunities (e.g. therapists, clinics, gyms, wellness professionals)

Help scale partnerships into meaningful revenue channels



Minimum Requirements

Excellent command of English (both written and spoken)

At least 2 years of experience working remotely

Experience using a CRM such as HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar

Highly organized, proactive, and able to work independently



Technical & Work Setup Requirements

Private and dedicated workspace

Minimum 100 Mbps internet connection

Backup internet (ISP)

Desktop or laptop with at least 16GB RAM

Backup power supply and/or generator

High-quality noise-canceling headset



Working Hours & Flexibility

Our customers are located worldwide, across multiple time zones.



The ideal candidate is flexible and comfortable working across different time zones, including:

US hours (primary focus, as most customers are based in the United States)

Occasional Australian hours

Split shifts (e.g. part morning / part evening) when needed



What We’re Looking For

Experience in social media management, influencer outreach, or affiliate marketing

Strong communication and relationship-building skills

Ability to think strategically—not just execute tasks

Comfortable taking ownership and initiative

Interest in health, wellness, fitness, or emerging technologies is a strong plus



What Success Looks Like

Engaged and responsive social communities

A growing network of high-quality influencers and partners

Active and productive affiliates and resellers

Measurable contribution to brand growth and revenue



Why Join Us

Work with innovative, global brands in fast-growing industries

Opportunity to take ownership and make a real impact

Flexible remote work environment

Clear pathway to increased hours and long-term growth



To apply please submit your CV along with a 1-minute audio recording of yourself explaining why you would be a good fit for this position.



We are looking for someone who is not just looking for a job—but wants to grow with us.

title: Content Creator (Instagram)
description:
Why This Role Exists

We are not looking for a "Social Media Manager" to post updates and monitor comments. We need a Content Architect and Growth Operator who understands the mechanics of virality and the leverage of a creator ecosystem.



This role exists to transform our organic social presence into a high-performance acquisition channel. You will bridge the gap between creative storytelling and algorithmic performance, ensuring our Reels, Shorts, and Creator partnerships aren't just "aesthetic"—they are engineered for reach, retention, and revenue. By building a scalable Creator Program, you provide the Founder and Marketing Team with massive leverage, turning our brand into a content powerhouse that operates far beyond the capacity of a traditional internal team.



What You’ll Be Responsible For (Outcomes)

Architect and execute a high-velocity short-form video strategy across Instagram, YouTube, and LinkedIn. You own the hook, the script, and the retention logic that forces the algorithm to distribute our content.

Design, launch, and scale our Creator Program from the ground up. This includes structuring incentive models, creating "Virality Playbooks," and building the infrastructure to manage a fleet of external voices.

Provide strategic input on high-level assets—including website headlines, campaign visuals, and landing page structures—ensuring a cohesive, conversion-focused narrative across all touchpoints.

Identify emerging cultural and platform trends early and translate them into our B2B niche before they become saturated, maintaining our position as a forward-thinking market leader.

Move beyond vanity metrics. You will analyze watch-time data and drop-off points to relentlessly iterate on formats, doubling down on what drives follower growth and pipeline velocity.

Requirements

What You’ve Done Before

You have a proven track record (and the case studies to prove it) of growing accounts and generating millions of views through strategic short-form video.

You have experience recruiting, onboarding, and managing creators or influencers, moving past one-off posts into long-term performance partnerships.

You are an expert in narrative tension and retention editing. You know how to stop the scroll in the first 1.5 seconds.

You understand how to make professional services "bingeable" without sacrificing brand authority or institutional trust.

Who You Are

You don't wait for a content calendar. You spot a gap in the market, script the solution, and coordinate the production autonomously.

You use metrics to validate your creative intuition, but you understand that "virality" requires a human touch that a spreadsheet can't always predict.

You don't think in "posts"; you think in "franchises." You build repeatable content formats that scale and compound over time.

You are constantly studying platform updates and creator psychology to find the next 1?ge in distribution.

Who This Is NOT for

The "Aesthetic" Curator: If your main focus is on color palettes and grid layouts rather than watch-time and shareability, this is not a fit.

The Task-Follower: If you need a script provided to you to start filming, you will struggle in this high-autonomy role.

The Generalist: If you treat Reels the same way you treat a static LinkedIn post, you won't achieve the scale we are looking for.

What Success Looks Like

Month 1: Comprehensive audit of current social performance; first "Viral Format" pilot launched; Creator Program incentive structure finalized.

Month 3: A consistent 2x–3x lift in organic reach via Reels/Shorts; first cohort of 5–10 creators actively producing content under your guidelines.

Month 6: Organic social is a primary driver of top-of-funnel awareness; our Creator Program is a self-sustaining engine providing a constant stream of high-quality assets for the marketing team.

Minimum Technical and Work Environment Requirements:



Internet Connection:

Primary internet connection with a minimum speed of 15 Mbps.

Backup internet connection with at least 10 Mbps.

Backup connection must be capable of supporting work during a power outage.

Primary Device:

Desktop or laptop equipped with at least:

Intel Core i5 (8th generation or newer), Intel Core i3 (10th generation or newer), AMD Ryzen 5, or an equivalent processor.

A minimum of 8 GB RAM.

Backup Device:

Must meet or exceed the performance of an Intel Core i3 processor.

Must be functional during power interruptions.

A functioning webcam.

A noise-canceling USB headset.

A quiet, dedicated home office space.

Peripherals and Workspace: A smartphone for communication and verification purposes.

title: Amazon Book Launch and Review Assistant
description:
I am launching a book this week that aims to help couples improve their relationship relationships, followed by five additional books in the coming 2 months. I’m looking for someone who has experience in the field of book launches and can help gain ethical ARC-style reviews on Amazon.



This role is not about shortcuts, fake reviews, incentives, or gray-area tactics. I am only interested in legal, policy-compliant, ethical strategies that protect my Amazon account and long-term publishing goals.



If you don’t have direct experience with ethical ARC or Amazon review processes, this role is not a fit.



What This Role Is Responsible For

• Coordinating ethical ARC-style review outreach for one immediate book launch and future titles

• Helping recruit and manage real readers 
 lists, communities, prior readers, etc.)

• Ensuring strict adherence to Amazon’s review policies at all times



What This Role Is Not

• No paid reviews

• No incentives, gifts, discounts, or compensation for reviews

• No review swapping or manipulation

• No bots, fake accounts, or gray-hat services

• No practices that could put my Amazon account at risk

If you’ve ever used or promoted those methods, please do not apply.





What I’m Looking For

• Demonstrated experience supporting ethical ARC campaigns or review coordination and websites

• Clear understanding of Amazon review guidelines and compliance

• Organized, detail-oriented, and process-driven

• Comfortable explaining why a strategy is safe, not just what it is

• Able to work independently and communicate clearly



Required Questions to answer:



Please answer:

1. Describe a past ARC or review campaign you’ve supported. What was the book, how many reviews were generated, and what was your role?



2. Assuming there is no
 list to work with, what websites and platforms have you used, and which ones would you use here?



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Social Media Manager, Content Creation, Growth & Automation, Video/Graphic Talent
description:
I am an author, therapist, and course creator launching a series of relationship books and online courses to help couples improve their marriage. I’m looking for a reliable and talented, creative Virtual Assistant to support the launch of a larger content and educational ecosystem.



This role begins with building an authentic and meaningful, high-quality social media presence. This is with through organic content that is photo, text, and video for all the major platforms. I also want to launch a youtube channel and need someone that has experience with offering industry stand direction for scripts, and  can help with video editing and uploading, and supporting
 list building, lead magnets, and basic automation.



 I am able to create content on my own, but I am very busy and need a good partner. Therefore, I have very high standards for top professional looking quality and do not want content that looks cheap, templated, or just ai created. I am looking to be authentic in my social media presence and gain followers, engagement and most importantly, my
 list, which needs to be setup with lead magnets and basic automation.



As my brand and reputation are very important to me, it is essential that I get to build trust in you over time, and that you are a team player with good communication skills - so that you can check in with me regularly for approval and guidance on ideas, in order to make sure the content an direction reflects the brand and larger goals of the project. I'm looking for a partner to work closely with me who is motivated and very productive, but also able and willing to check in for feedback on a regular basis. 



As our brand grows, I would also be interested in you coming up with outbound communication ideas for sharing our products with the right
 groups, professionals and others that can benefit from the products and help promote them. 



This is a hands-on execution role with close collaboration, regular check-ins, and feedback.





Core Responsibilities



Social Media & Content Execution

 • Launch, manage and grow, organic content across Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube Shorts 

 • Repurpose long-form content into high-quality short-form clips

 • Create, schedule, and organize consistent posts

Graphics & Video

 List & Automation Support

 • Set up basic
 sequences and automations (ConvertKit, MailerLite, or similar)

 • Support opt-in pages, simple funnels, and webinar assets

 • Maintain organized folders, naming systems, and workflows





What I’m Looking For



Required

 • Strong Canva and graphic design skills (non-negotiable)

 • Confident short-form video editing experience

 • Familiarity with YouTube and TikTok algorithms and best practices

 • Experience posting across multiple social platforms

 • Basic understanding of
 marketing and automation

 • Organized, reliable, detail-oriented

 • Comfortable using AI tools for efficiency, not as a crutch

 • Fluent in English and comfortable communicating clearly and regularly



You must have experience using the top tools and software in the industry for social media, editing. I am looking for someone that can use data, analytics, and a/b testing in their work to maximize performance and growth. 



An added benefit is if you have experience with online courses and selling digital products, but this is not required.



This role is for a hands creative partner who wants to be a part of making a difference in the world. I need someone who is focused and able to multitask to make sure the jobs get done without excuses. If you don’t personally create graphics, are not familiar with the algorithms on YouTube or tiktok, if you don't edit video well, or build
 automations YOURSELF, this role is not a fit. I am looking for a superstar, who is fluent in English, a self-starter that is motivated and ready to be a part of doing something great.



Please note: 

 • This is not an agency role

 • This is not a paid ads or PR position

 • You must personally create graphics, edit video, and build basic automations yourself, not hiring others

 • If you do not understand YouTube, instagram, or TikTok algorithms, this role is not a fit



I am looking for a focused, motivated, highly productive creative partner who wants to grow with a meaningful project and is open to feedback, collaboration, and continuous improvement.





To Apply, you MUST ANSWER ALL FOUR QUESTIONS BELOW, or your application will not be considered: 



 1. A short note describing who you are, and what is your experience with social media, Canva, and video editing

 2. It is important to me to see examples of your work so that I can see what you have done in the past. Please send me links to 3 examples of graphics AND ALSO 3 examples of videos you personally created, and any other relevant work that you think would help me understand what your can do

 3. Please send me a list of the tools/software that you regularly use and are very familiar with and how you would use them to help create, launch and manage my social media.

 4. Finally, please answer this important question personally (without AI help): If I wanted to create a 90 second video talking about relationships, and you were going to guide me on the elements and script that I should use a successful video, what would you recommend the video include to be very impactful? And what are all the specific next steps would you take once I sent you the raw footage in order to get it online? What steps would you take to increase engagement once the video is live?



Thank you and I look forward to hearing from you! Have a beautiful day!

I am not interested in working with capcut, but if you have experience in the other areas and can quickly learn Descript, please feel free to apply.



When responding, keep it brief and include:

1. your direct experience with Descript

2. your direct experience with Kajabi

3. 2–3 links or samples

4. your typical hourly rate



Thank you and I look forward to hearing from you. 

Dr. S.

title: QuickBooks Specialist (UK Experience Required)
description:
Part-Time | Remote | £6/hour



About the Role

We are recruiting on behalf of a fast-growing, UK-based accountancy firm (8-figure business) seeking a highly detail-oriented QuickBooks Specialist / Bookkeeper to support a diverse client portfolio.



This is a hands-on, ownership-driven role where accuracy, organization, and accountability are critical. You will work closely with the Director to ensure all financial records are clean, compliant, and fully prepared for accountant review.



This is not a data entry role — we’re looking for someone who can take full responsibility for bookkeeping workflows and deliver consistently high-quality work.



Important Requirement (Please Read Before Applying)



Applicants without UK bookkeeping experience using QuickBooks Online will not be considered.

If you do not have hands-on UK bookkeeping experience in QuickBooks, please do not apply, as applications without this requirement will not be reviewed.



Working Hours

UK Time: 10:00 AM – 3:00 PM (Tuesday & Thursday)

PH Time: 5:00 PM – 10:00 PM



Key Responsibilities



Bookkeeping & QuickBooks Management:

Maintain accurate and up-to-date records in QuickBooks Online

Post and allocate bank transactions

Manage purchase invoices and expenses

Handle sales invoicing and receipt allocation

Maintain clean ledgers (debtors, creditors, nominal accounts)

Perform bank, credit card, and balance sheet reconciliations

Prepare and support VAT returns

Process journal entries within scope

Ensure all records are audit-ready and fully supported



Deadlines & Workflow Management:

Manage VAT, month-end, and reporting deadlines

Work proactively to avoid last-minute pressure

Request missing information ahead of deadlines

Maintain consistent workflow with no backlog



Client Communication:

Respond to client queries within 1 working day

Communicate clearly, professionally, and concisely

Maintain a commercially aware approach

Escalate issues beyond scope when necessary



Data Accuracy & Financial Cleanliness:

Maintain clean ledgers (no duplication or miscoding)

Ensure full reconciliation across all accounts

Clear suspense accounts promptly

Monitor aged debtors and creditors

Regularly review bank feeds and financial data



Escalation & Financial Awareness:

Identify and flag unusual transactions

Highlight risks, inconsistencies, or compliance issues

Raise potential cash flow concerns

Escalate unclear items promptly



Reporting:

Provide weekly updates on:

Completed work

Work in progress

Missing information

Risks or issues



Essential Skills & Experience:

UK bookkeeping experience (mandatory)

Strong hands-on experience with QuickBooks Online (non-negotiable)



Solid understanding of:

Reconciliations

VAT processes

Ledger management

High level of accuracy and attention to detail

Strong English communication skills

Ability to work independently and manage workload

Highly organized and process-driven



What We’re Looking For:

We’re looking for someone who:

Takes full ownership of their work

Keeps financials clean, accurate, and review-ready

Works proactively—not reactively

Manages deadlines without supervision

Communicates clearly with clients and internal teams

Identifies and raises issues early



What This Role Is NOT

? Basic data entry

? Leaving reconciliations incomplete

? Allowing backlog to build

? Ignoring errors or inconsistencies



How to Apply



Please follow these instructions carefully:

Use “Vixa Hire” as the subject line

Submit your resume and cover letter

Include:

Internet speed test result

Screenshot of your laptop/computer specifications

title: Auditor I
description:
PLEASE APPLY THROUGH THIS LINK: 
/apply-job-1



About us:



With over 100 years of combined industry experience, the Community Minerals team specializes in the purchase of mineral or royalty rights all over the US. We have earned a stellar reputation with hundreds of satisfied customers and an “A” Rating with the Better Business Bureau. With our proven track record, we continue to serve mineral owners in several states with transparency, accountability, and a personalized experience to meet individual needs.



Job Summary:



Auditor I provides entry-level audit support by reviewing royalty statements, bank documents, and production records to calculate accurate annualized cash flow estimates. Auditor I focuses on learning internal audit standards, building foundational financial analysis skills, and managing less complex or lower-value audits under the guidance of more experienced auditors. This role is essential for maintaining accurate records, identifying basic discrepancies, and supporting faster and compliant deal evaluations.



Job Description:



-Evaluate and review basic financial documentation, such as royalty statements and lease operating statements, to determine annualized cash flows.

-Assist in identifying abnormalities or prior period adjustments that affect reported revenues.

-Flag discrepancies or missing data and escalate them to the Senior Auditor for resolution.

-Ensure the completeness and accuracy of supporting documents used in underwriting evaluations.

-Maintain proper documentation for each audit case and follow internal version control standards.

-Collaborate with peers and senior auditors to meet team-level accuracy and timeliness targets.

-Focus on smaller and less complex audits, learning how to interpret oil and gas financial documents.

-Work under close supervision, receiving regular feedback to improve audit skills and judgment.

-Participate in onboarding discussions, audit training, and continuous knowledge development.



Education:



-Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline.



Experience:



-0–2 years of experience in auditing, financial review, or documentation processing.

-Internship or academic exposure to audit practices or oil and gas finance is a plus.



Technical Skills:



-Basic knowledge of Excel (e.g., sorting, formulas, formatting).

-Familiarity with financial document types (e.g., bank statements, royalty checks) is an advantage.

-Ability to interpret straightforward financial data and identify missing fields.



Soft Skills:



-Eagerness to learn and grow within the audit function.

-Strong attention to detail and task accuracy.

-Receptive to feedback and comfortable working in a highly structured environment.

-Effective time management and organization.



What's in it for You:

- Competitive Compensation: Earn $3.00 - $3.55 per hour, commensurate with your skills and experience.

- Work your way: Remote Work Set-Up enabling you to operate from the comfort and convenience of your own chosen workspace

- Flexible Healthcare Bonus (Philippines): A healthcare bonus you control. Use it for HMO coverage, life insurance, or set it aside as an emergency fund—whatever best supports your well-being. It’s entirely up to you.

- Success Incentives: Enjoy company bonuses and performance-driven rewards.

- Soar with Us: Opportunities for career growth and promotions await you.

- Positive Vibes Only: Experience a supportive and uplifting work culture.

- Annual Bonus: We value your dedication throughout the year, rewarding you with an annual performance bonus shared at the end of the year.

- Performance Raise: Your hard work doesn't go unnoticed. Be ready to seize opportunities for a salary increase based on your outstanding performance.

- Performance Incentives: We believe exceptional work deserves recognition. Performance incentives are awarded to individuals who demonstrate outstanding contributions, initiative, and results. It’s our way of celebrating excellence and motivating continued success.

- Discretionary Bonus: At Community Minerals, exceptional work doesn’t go unnoticed. Contractors who consistently go above and beyond may be rewarded with discretionary bonuses, a token of appreciation for outstanding contributions, impactful results, and dedication to excellence. Let your work speak, and the rewards will follow!



Other Requirements:

- Willing to work in US Business Hours (CST)

- Must have stable Internet and Power Connection

- Must have a Computer with at least 2 monitors set up, a stable Internet Connection



System Requirements:

To ensure optimal performance and functionality while using different web and application tools, please make sure that your syste
ets the following requirements:



Operating System:

- Windows: Windows 10 (64-bit) or higher

- macOS: macOS 11 (Big Sur) or higher



Processor:

- Intel: 8th Gen Core i3, i5, i7, or newer

- AMD: Ryzen 3 (2018) or newer



Memory (RAM):

- A minimum of 8 GB of RAM is required.

- Recommended: 16 GB RAM for multitasking and optimal performance



Job Type: Full-time



Application Question(s):

-How comfortable are you managing multiple deals simultaneously under tight deadlines?

-Do you have experience reviewing and auditing legal or financial documents for accuracy and completeness?

-How do you identify and handle discrepancies or inconsistencies in documentation?

-The person must look for a long term position, full commitment to learn and understand the process and demonstrate that they take the work seriously

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 5a
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

title: Performance Marketing Specialist
description:
Marketing Done Right (MDR) is looking for a dedicated, full-time Performance Marketing Specialist to join our team. We aren't looking for a typical social media manager; we need a technical "A-Player" who can own our lead-gen engine from end-to-end. If you thrive on 100% lead flow efficiency and proactive problem-solving, we have a long-term home for you with HMO, fixed mid-shift hours, and performance-based growth.



About Us 

Marketing Done Right (MDR) is a close-knit digital marketing agency based in Cleveland that delivers high-impact lead generation and automation solutions. We pride ourselves on a culture of high trust, proactive problem-solving, and helping our tea
mbers grow professionally while delivering measurable ROI for our clients.



Why Join Us?

Supportive Team Culture – Work with a collaborative, international team where your contributions truly matter.

100% Remote Work – Work from the comfort of your home with a team that respects your work-life balance.

Paid Leaves & PH Holidays – We value your time off. Enjoy paid leaves and observance of Philippine holidays.

Unlimited Growth Potential – This is a long-term role with performance-based salary increases and opportunities to advance as the agency scales.

Job Stability – We are looking for an "A-Player" who wants a long-term career home, not just a gig.

Results-Driven Autonomy – We operate on high trust. If your work is on track and your funnels are converting, we give you the space to lead.

Comprehensive Healthcare (HMO) – We value your well-being. We provide HMO coverage to ensure you and your family are taken care of.



Role This position serves as the engine for our lead generation and automation ecosystem. You will lead the strategy and execution of Meta ads and GHL funnels, ensuring every lead is nurtured and delivered to our clients with 100?ficiency.



Responsibilities

Launch and optimize Meta and Yelp ad campaigns to drive high-intent leads.

Manage the GoHighLevel (GHL) ecosystem, including workflow builds and
 campaigns.

Design and maintain Zapier integrations for seamless lead flow and real-time notifications.

Oversee the technical health and conversion performance of end-to-end sales funnels.

title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor Wanted - Long Term Fitness Content (Remote)

I run a videography company and I'm looking for one reliable editor to join me on a long term project producing fitness and coaching videos. This role will last over a year with consistent weekly work and real potential to grow into bigger, better paying projects down the line.



The Work:

Each video is 1 to 2 minutes long. You will receive multiple camera angles of the same scene, sync them together by audio and cut them into a seamless final edit. A full template is provided with transitions, layout and style already built — you are not starting from scratch. Videos include captions and fitness terminology that need to be checked for accuracy, so strong English comprehension is essential.



Requirements:

Premier pro or CapCut preferred, premier is best as CapCut has poor caption generation



Turnaround:

Output must be fast and consistent. The target is 50 completed videos per week at full capacity. Footage will be delivered via Google Drive and all finer details of the workflow will be discussed at interview.



Pay:

Pay is based on output and reviewed regularly.

$13 per hour for 4 videos completed per hour — this is the target and the rate we want to work at long term.

$10 per hour for 3 videos completed per hour — this is the minimum acceptable output, any lower than this and you will not work with us. 

Consistent underperformance will result in the role ending. Hit the target consistently and this is reliable, well paid work for over a year.



First Month:

The first month will be closely reviewed as we establish the working relationship. Editors who perform well during this period will have the opportunity to take on additional projects with higher pay rates.



To Apply:

Send your portfolio, confirm you use Premiere Pro or CapCut, and be ready to complete a paid test edit using footage I provide.

title: Accountant
description:
We’re looking for a detail-oriented Accountant to join our team and help keep our finances clean, accurate, and compliant. You’ll be the go-to person for managing accounts, preparing reports, and making sure everything balances out. If you love numbers and enjoy looking at financial data, this role is for you.



Your Responsibilities:

• Handle day-to-day financial transactions.

• Reconciling general ledgers, bank statements and balance sheets.

• Analyzing financial data/documents and managing employee or business expenses.

• Prepare closing journal entries, adjustments and monthly Financial Schedules.

• Prepare financial statements for management, shareholders and tax reporting.

• Ensure compliance with accounting standards, company policies, legal and regulatory requirements, tax filing and documentation.

• Process payroll and managing payments, taxes and benefits.

• Organize and archive documents.

• Support CFO in budgeting, forecasting and financial planning.

• Collaborate with teams across the company in securing accurate documents and correct details.

• Conducting internal expense audits to check discrepancies.

• Maintaining internal controls and accounting systems to support accuracy and prevent fraud.

• Handle any related tasks relevant to job assigned by the management.



Who we’re looking for:

• Bachelor’s degree in Accountancy, Finance, or business-related field.

• Proven 3-5 years’ experience in full cycle accounting and bookkeeping.

• Experience in Tax Preparation and filing preferably in TaxAct.

• Strong, independent and confident to own the accounting end to end function.

• Proficient Accounting Software preferably Xero.

• Excellent Attention to details and organizational skills.

• Ability to communicate financial information clearly.



Nice to have:

• Have a CPA, CMA, CA certification or working toward it.

• Experience with US companies or clients.

• Experience in Financial Analysis and Financial Planning Reports.

• Proficient in Accounting, ERP, Payroll and Tax Software. (Gusto, Xero, Quickbooks,TaxAct etc.)



What We Can Offer

• A supportive team that values collaboration and improvement.

• Flexible schedule.

• Direct access to leadership for clarity and feedback.

• Opportunity to build, develop and take on more responsibility.

• Long term role and opportunity to a growing company.



If you believe you’re the right fit, please send your latest resume to 
 forget to include the word “Yield” in the subject line so we know you’ve read the full job description.

title: First-Pass Video Editor for YouTube Chaos Vlogs (Premiere ONLY)
description:
We are looking for a skilled First-Pass Video Editor / Assistant Editor to join our creative team and help shape fast-paced, engaging YouTube chaos vlogs from large amounts of raw footage.



This is not just a polishing role. We need someone who can take 30GB–100GB+ of raw 4K footage, go through it properly, remove dead takes, repeated takes, unusable footage, filler, cut down b roll and weak sections, then build a strong first-pass edit that gives us the backbone of the video.



The final creative polish may still be done internally, so this role is about saving serious time by making smart editing decisions early and building a solid, watchable assembly. Therefore it is essential that you are using Adobe Premiere.





Key Responsibilities

Review and organize large amounts of raw vlog footage

Cut out dead takes, repeated takes, mistakes, dead air, filler, and unusable footage

Build a strong first-pass story edit fro
ssy real-world footage

Tighten talking sections and improve pacing

Add simple visual coverage where needed to hide cuts and keep the video engaging

Follow feedback and improve over time

Return editable project files and high-quality exports when required

Requirements

Strong experience editing long-form YouTube content

Good judgment for what footage is usable, funny, important, or should be cut

Ability to work with large 4K projects and large file transfers

Strong understanding of pacing and audience retention

Good understanding of written and spoken English

Own editing setup, including capable computer, editing software, storage, and reliable internet

Comfortable working independently and making smart choices without needing every cut explained



Nice to Have

Experience editing travel vlogs, comedy, challenge videos, or personality-led content

Experience with proxy workflows and large project organization

Ability to source or place simple supporting visuals where needed



About You



You are not just someone who adds effects. You understand that good editing starts with judgment — knowing what to remove, what to keep, and how to shape messy footage into something entertaining and clear.



You are organized, efficient, responsive to feedback, and able to work through raw footage without getting lost.



How to Apply



Please send:



2–3 relevant samples of long-form YouTube edits

A short note explaining exactly what you did on each sample

What editing software you use

Your computer specs

Your experience with large 4K projects

A short explanation of how you would turn 100GB+ of messy vlog footage into a strong first-pass edit



Your rate and availability.

We are open to different working arrangements, so please provide your salary expectations and hours of availability.



Shortlisted applicants may be asked to complete a small paid test edit.

title: Social Media Manager & Automation Specialist (VA)

We are looking for a highly skilled Social Media Manager and Automation Specialist who can own our entire social media presence, build and manage ManyChat automation flows, handle community engagement, and produce high-volume carousel content across all major platforms  every single week.



This is not a basic scheduling role. You will be creating 20 carousels per month (each with 7–10 slides), managing DM automations, maintaining our systems in Notion, designing in Canva, and working closely with the founder to grow a premium personal brand.



If you are the kind of person who takes ownership, thinks strategically, and executes with precision — keep reading.



Responsibilities

Carousel Content Production (Primary Output)



Create a minimum of 20 carousel posts per month, each containing 7–10 slides

Adapt every carousel to the correct format for each platform (Instagram,
, LinkedIn, TikTok, Pinterest)

Design all carousels in Canva following strict brand guidelines (colours, typography, layout)

Write compelling carousel copy — strong hooks on slide 1, clear value throughout, and a call to action on the final slide

Repurpose carousel content into stories, pins, and static posts where appropriate

ManyChat Automation (Critical Skill)



Build, manage, and optimise 
 flows for Instagram and

Set up keyword triggers, comment automations, and DM sequences

Create lead capture flows that move followers from social media into our
 list (Flodesk)

Troubleshoot and fix broken flows quickly

Stay current with ManyChat updates and new features

Community Engagement & DM Management



Reply to all comments and direct messages promptly and professionally across every platform

Use ManyChat for automated replies where appropriate, and personal replies where needed

Proactively engage with target audience accounts (likes, comments, shares, follows)

Flag hot leads, collaboration requests, and priority messages to the founder

Build genuine relationships no copy-paste replies, no generic responses

Flodesk
 Integration



Ensure ManyChat flows connect seamlessly with Flodesk
 sequences

Tag and segment new leads entering from social media automations

Monitor delivery and ensure subscribers land in the correct sequences

Basic
 formatting and scheduling when needed

Notion Workspace Management

Track carousel production status, posting schedule, and engagement metrics

Keep the social media dashboard organised and current

Log weekly performance data in Notion for review

Canva Design



Expert-level Canva use for all carousel and social media graphic creation

Maintain brand consistency across every visual asset — no shortcuts, no off-brand designs

Create stories, highlight covers, and promotional graphics as needed

Adapt templates and build new layouts within established brand guidelines

Scheduling & Publishing



Schedule and publish content across Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn, Pinterest, and YouTube

Use scheduling tools (Later, Metricool, Buffer, or Meta Business Suite)

Ensure nothing is missed — posting consistency is non-negotiable

Reporting



Provide a simple weekly performance summary (reach, impressions, saves, shares, DMs, follower growth)

Track which carousels perform best and recommend content adjustments

Report ManyChat automation metrics weekly

Required Skills & Experience (Non-Negotiable)

Minimum 2 years managing social media for a business or personal brand (not personal accounts)

ManyChat — must have hands-on experience building flows, keyword triggers, and DM automations

Canva — expert-level proficiency, able to create polished carousels at volume

Notion — comfortable managing workspaces, databases, and content calendars

Flodesk — working knowledge of
 sequences, tagging, and subscriber management

Strong working knowledge of Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn, Pinterest, and YouTube

Excellent written English — you will be writing captions and carousel copy for a UK-based brand

Ability to produce 20 carousels per month (7–10 slides each) without quality dropping

Self-starter who takes full ownership — you do not wait to be told every step

Preferred (Not Required but a Strong Plus)

Experience with 
 or similar funnel/course platforms

Understanding of direct-response marketing or content strategy

Experience with Pinterest SEO

Familiarity with short-form video editing (reels, TikToks, Shorts)

Experience working with a UK or international client remotely

Working Hours & Timezone

Full-time: 40 hours per week

Must be available during UK business hours (GMT/BST) for at least 5–6 hours of overlap daily

Flexibility on exact schedule as long as deadlines, posting times, and DM response times are consistently met

Weekend engagement monitoring may occasionally be required

What We Offer

Competitive salary: PHP 30,000–45,000/month depending on experience

Long-term, stable position with a growing premium brand

Direct access to the founder — your input and ideas genuinely matter

Clear brand guidelines, content briefs, and structured workflows so you always know what is expected

Opportunity to grow into a senior social media strategist or marketing operations lead

A founder who respects your time and values precision over busywork

How to Apply

Please include ALL of the following in your application. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

Links to 2–3 social media accounts you have managed (with a note explaining what you did)

A screenshot or link to a Canva carousel you have created (minimum 5 slides)

Your answer to this question: "A carousel post gets high saves but low comments. What do you do next?"

Applications that do not answer question 5 will be automatically rejected.

title: Video Editor — Ads + Organic Content (AI Video Experience Required
description:

The Role

We're looking for a Video Editor who produces results, not just content. You'll be the person who takes raw footage, AI-generated clips, and stock video and turns it into high-performing ads and organic content that actually stops the scroll.

This isn't a slow-paced editing job. You'll work on paid ads and organic social content side by side — and you'll be expected to understand what makes a video perform, not just look good.

We start on a project/freelance basis, but for the right person, this becomes a full-time role.



What You'll Do

Maintain consistent visual quality and brand feel across all output

Deliver quickly without sacrificing quality — we iterate fast





What We're Looking For

Required:



Proven experience editing video ads that have run (show us results, not just pretty edits)

Strong skills in stock video sourcing — you know where to look and how to pick what works

Hands-on experience with AI video tools (Runway, Kling, Pika, or similar)

Experience editing organic short-form content (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

Fast turnaround without quality drop — this is non-negotiable

Self-starter: you manage your own time, meet deadlines, and flag issues before they become problems



Nice to Have:



Experience with light therapy, wellness, or health brands

Basic motion graphics or text animation skills (CapCut, Premiere, After Effects)

Understanding of ad metrics — you know what a hook rate is

$
/month depending on experience and output quality

Creative freedom within a clear brief

Long-term opportunity for the right person we want to grow together

title: Graphic Designer — E-Commerce Listing Images (Product & Ad Visuals)
description:
Mvolo is a fast-growing Dutch light therapy brand competing at the highest level in e-commerce. We don't do average — our visuals need to stand out against the biggest players in the market. If you take pride in work that is both beautiful and effective, this is your kind of place.



The Role

We're looking for a Graphic Designer who understands that great listing images sell. You'll be creating product visuals primarily for our e-commerce listings — images that are clean, instantly clear, and visually compelling. A customer should understand the message within seconds of seeing your work.

This is not a role for generalists. We need someone who has a sharp eye for composition, knows how to communicate a benefit visually, and holds themselves to an A+ standard — every single time. You start freelance on a project basis, with a clear path to full-time for the right person.



What You'll Do



Design high-quality product listing images for e-commerce (Amazon, website, and similar platforms)

Create visuals that are clean, on-brand, and immediately communicate the product message

Design ad creatives based on listing visuals for paid social campaigns

Translate briefs into designs independently — without needing your hand held

Revise based on feedback quickly and without losing quality

Maintain a consistent visual standard that competes with top-tier brands





What We're Looking For

Required:



A portfolio with strong e-commerce or product listing design work — results that actually look premium

Sharp eye for clean, minimal design that communicates clearly and fast

Ability to work independently: you understand a brief, ask the right questions, and deliver

Experience with both static product visuals and ad creatives

High output quality under deadline — speed and quality, not one or the other



Nice to Have:



Experience with health, wellness, or consumer electronics brands

Basic photo retouching / compositing skills (Photoshop)

Understanding of what makes a listing image convert (hierarchy, benefit communication, visual flow)





What We Offer



$
/month depending on experience and portfolio quality

Start freelance/project-based with a clear path to full-time

Direct feedback loop — no long approval chains, no corporate noise

Work on a premium brand that gives you work worth putting in your portfolio

Long-term partnership for the right person





How to Apply

Send the following



Your portfolio — show us your best e-commerce or product listing work specifically

3 examples you're most proud of and why they work

One short sentence: What makes a great listing image, in your opinion?



No portfolio = no review. Quality of application reflects quality of work.

title: PPC Specialist – Amazon Marketing Agency
description:
PPC Specialist – Amazon Marketing Agency (Remote)



Full-Time | Remote | Competitive Salary + PTO



About Us:



The Amazon Whisperer is a fast-growing, full-service Amazon marketing agency that delivers profitable sales growth for consumer brands. We specialize in Amazon SEO, PPC, listing optimization, and catalog management, and we do it with systems, strategy, and speed. We’re looking for a PPC Specialist who wants to grow into a world-class media buyer by executing and managing high-performing Amazon ad campaigns.



The Role:



The PPC Specialist plays a hands-on role in the day-to-day execution of Amazon advertising campaigns. You’ll be responsible for uploading bulk files, adjusting bids and budgets, building campaigns, harvesting keywords, and ensuring PPC performance stays aligned with ACoS, TACoS, and budget targets. This is a perfect fit for someone who wants to master the technical side of Amazon ads and learn how to run efficient, scalable campaigns from the ground up.



You’ll work directly under the PPC Lead, taking direction on strategy while owning the implementation across multiple client accounts.



Responsibilities:



- Work closely with the PPC Lead to implement strategies across client accounts

- Create new campaigns (SP, SB, SD) and restructure existing ones for efficiency

- Adjust bids, update budgets, and modify placement settings

- Harvest high-performing keywords and promote them into new campaigns

- Apply negative keyword targeting to eliminate wasted ad spend

- Track and maintain campaign health daily to ensure accounts remain within budget

- Monitor and flag issues with ACoS, TACoS, or unexpected spend spikes

- Harvest PPC data to support organic SEO initiatives

- Maintain clean data and reports in spreadsheets and tracking tools



Requirements:



- Minimum 2 years of Amazon PPC experience (SEO knowledge is a plus)

- Proficiency in Helium 10, Data Dive, Jungle Scout, or similar keyword tools

- Strong analytical mindset and comfort working with performance data

- Must be proficient in Google Sheets and Excel

- Experience using automated ad platforms like Trellis, Adlabs, Bidx, Teikametrics, Quartile, Perpetua, or other similar sofware

- Clear communication skills for working with team leads and managers

- Reliable and organized, able to manage multiple campaigns without hand-holding

- Fast and reliable internet connection

- Fluent English (written and spoken)

- Ability to type 55+ words per minute



Company Culture:



At The Amazon Whisperer, we highly value transparency, communication, and trust. This is not just another job, it’s a place where your ideas are valued, hard work is rewarded, and growth opportunities are everywhere. We’re building a team that operates like a unit. Supportive, proactive, and relentlessly focused on client success. If you’re looking for a long-term remote role where you can grow your skills and career, you’re in the right place.



What You’ll Get:



- Competitive pay

- 13 days PTO (including public holidays)

- 100% remote work

- Opportunity to grow into roles like PPC Lead and beyond

- A collaborative and growth-minded team environment



Apply today and be part of a company that’s scaling fast and doing things differently in the Amazon space. We’re not looking for average. We’re looking for exceptional.



Submit your application here:
