title: Customer Service Member
description:
Remote Customer Service Member (Work from Home)

Independent Contractor



A prominent and growing North American facilities services organization is expanding its remote operations support and is seeking dependable, detail-oriented customer support professionals. This is a work-from-home contractor engagement supporting commercial and retail clients across Canada.



This is an independent contractor engagement, paid weekly upon receipt of invoice. The schedule is 9-hour shifts, five (5) days per week. Occasional Saturday shifts (approximately once per month) may be required. Shifts align with Eastern Standard Time: 8:00–5:00, 9:00–6:00, or 10:00–7:00 EST.



Role Overview

This is a dynamic, high-energy administrative and customer support position where every day brings new experiences and opportunities for professional growth. The role involves real-time coordination via Zoom and other internal systems to progress various tasks.



As an independent contractor working with our Customer Service Team, you’ll play a key role in maintaining the efficient flow of work orders through our systems and processes. 



Based on your skills and interests, you’ll be assigned to one of our specialized sub-teams:



•
ing Team: Monitor and manage an inbox with thousands of daily incoming
s, sort and flag urgent or high-priority
s, and collaborate with relevant teams.

• Scheduling Team: Dispatch and schedule work orders with technicians to ensure timely completion.

• Compiling Team: Handle compiling tasks, including before/after photos, invoices, sign-offs, assisting with month-end closures, and answering phones.

• Check-In/Out Team: Sign in technicians as they arrive on-site for jobs, address any issues or scope changes, and ensure smooth operations while technicians are on location.



Each sub-team works collaboratively to deliver exceptional service while minimizing bottlenecks in our workflows.



Requirements for Home Office Set Up:

• Windows PC preferred, running Windows 11

• Minimum 300 Mbps internet speed; Fibre connection strongly preferred

• Multiple monitors required (single monitor setups not suitable)

• High-quality headset with a microphone and a Reliable webcam

• Quiet, professional workspace suitable for full-day Zoom collaboration

Traits We Are Seeking:

Organization: You can handle high
 volumes, prioritize tasks, and keep everything on track.

Problem-solving: You take initiative, think independently, and easily resolve issues.

Collaborative Communicator: You work confidently with others, fostering accountability and motivation. You are a positive, self-motivated individual with clear communication.

Composed Under Pressure: You enjoy working within tight deadlines and fast-paced environments. 

Proven work history: You are looking for a long-term opportunity and have a proven track record. Experience in virtual assistance, remote administrative roles, or customer service preferred.

Strong technical Skills: You have in-depth technical skills with the ability to work in several systems and databases at one time

title: Administrative Assistant
description:
Position overview

We are looking for a motivated, highly organized Administrative Assistant to join our team. In this role, you will serve as the first point of contact for patients and callers, support the Director of Operations, help recruit and onboard new staff, and keep daily operations running smoothly. If you are detail-oriented, tech-savvy, and thrive in a fast-paced environment, we want to hear from you.



Key responsibilities

Support for Director of Operations



Provide direct administrative support to the Director of Operations, assist with special projects, prepare reports, and help carry out day-to-day operational priorities.



Patient communication & phone calls



Answer incoming calls promptly and professionally, assist patients with scheduling, questions, and concerns, and make outbound calls as directed.



Scheduling & calendar management



Create and maintain staff schedules, coordinate appointments and meetings, and ensure accurate calendar management across the team.



Data tracking & Excel reporting



Build and maintain Excel spreadsheets and trackers to monitor key metrics, staff data, and operational information. Organize and update records consistently to ensure data accuracy.



Recruiting & hiring



Post job openings, review applications, coordinate interviews, and assist with the full hiring process from start to finish.



Staff training & onboarding



Onboard and train new employees, ensure they understand office policies and procedures, and provide ongoing guidance and support.



General office organization



Keep the office organized and running efficiently, manage filing systems, handle correspondence, and provide support across departments as needed.



What we're looking for

Proficient in Microsoft Excel — able to build and manage spreadsheets, trackers, and reports



Strong verbal and written communication skills



Exceptional organizational skills and attention to detail



Ability to manage multiple priorities and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment



Experience in a healthcare, medical, or patient-facing environment preferred



Prior experience in recruiting, HR, or staff management is a plus



Compassionate, professional demeanor with a patient-first attitude



How to apply

Please send your resume and a brief cover letter to 
 or apply in person at [your address here]. We look forward to meeting you!

description:

**PLEASE DO NOT APPLY THROUGH ONLINE JOBS. USE THE LINK AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS POST TO APPLY**

About the Role



We’re looking for a highly organized, professional, and results-driven Business Development Executive with strong B2B sales and cold-calling experience. This is a client-facing role where you’ll act as a trusted extension of our clients’ teams—managing outreach, follow-ups, meetings, and sales operations while maintaining exceptional communication and organization.



You’ll work under our company and be assigned to a client, similar to a high-level executive or client success placement model. Candidates with prior Team Lead or Manager experience and strong executive presence are highly preferred.

Sales & Outreach

, and CRM

Operations & Reporting

Presentations & Demos

Ideal Candidate

Resilient, coachable, proactive, and accountable

Tech-savvy (CRM—GHL preferred, Google Workspace, Slack, Zoom)

Requirements

Compensation & Benefits

Long-term, stable remote role

Supportive team with growth opportunities

Candidates must already be comfortable delivering professional Zoom presentations.

Your updated resume

Introduction

Sales experience

Client-facing and reporting experience

Apply here:

title: YouTube VA
description:
Hi there



PLEASE READ EVERYTHING:



We are looking for a VA that can make videos for our YouTube channels. We have a lot of channels and want to make even more. The process is very simple, and all our videos are made with Ai, so they are fast and straight forward to produce.

WE need someone who is determined to learn and work alot. Also someone who is very active and answers messages alot (we will use WhatsApp)





We will send SOPs (tutorials, step by step video) on how each production part will work! You just need to be ready to learn.

You would make scripts, record voiceovers, and edit videos, create thumbnails and upload videos 



As a bonus, if you have experience with Pictory AI, Google Nano Banana and Veo 3 that would be helpful



Our salary works like this:



$100 a month for about 20 - 25 videos per month



Then we can do many more channels to expand that salary even more... ($100/m per channel)

and so on...



We will need videos on weekends. You dont have to work on weekends, but you have to make videos in bulk so we can still upload on weekends. Its up to you how you do it, as long as theres videos.



Please apply by sending sample of your work, those that pass the initial stage of selection, we will ask you to do a very easy sample video





We need someone who can start work NOW.

title: Short-Form and Long-Form Video Editor
description:
Snapshot:

- Part-time or Gig Based

- ~15–20 hours/month

- $600–$800/month



Company Overview:

Hone Coach is a business coaching company that helps home service business owners: landscapers, HVAC techs, plumbers, and similar trades build profitable, systemized businesses that no longer depend on them to run. We serve owners doing $200K–$2M in annual revenue.



Role Purpose:

We are hiring a Video Editor to turn raw footage into polished, on-brand short-form and long-form content. This role ensures that every piece of content looks great, stays on-brand, and is delivered on time, every time. 



You can see our previous short form edits for reference on Instagram: honecoach



Key Responsibilities:



Big Rocks (Core Duties):



Edit 15–20 short-form videos per month (Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts — 60–90 seconds each)

Edit long-form YouTube or course videos on an as-needed basis. Potentially clipping short form clips from these.

Deliver finished edits within 1–2 business days of receiving raw footage





Supporting Responsibilities



Add accurate, clean captions to every video (not just auto-generated, needs to be reviewed and corrected)

Create high quality thumbnails for YouTube videos

Apply brand colors, fonts, and visual style consistently (brand guide provided)

Source and add b-roll, text overlays, and transitions where appropriate

Select background music that fits the brand (quiet hip hop / lofi preferred, trending audio welcome)

Communicate proactively about timelines, questions, or issues



Must-Have Qualifications:



Portfolio of high quality short-form content , this is required, no exceptions. Bonus for business or coaching content.

Proficient in any professional video editing software (CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

Strong eye for brand consistency - colors, fonts, pacing, and style

Reliable internet connection capable of handling large video file transfers

Clear, professional written communication in English



Nice-to-Have Skills:



Experience supporting content strategy or social media growth

Familiarity with Instagram and YouTube best practices

Interest in eventually supporting scripting or content planning (not required now, potential to grow into it)



Hours and Pay



Hours: Part-time or gig based, likely15–20 hours/month? (Flexible on this, I actually don't know how much time it takes)

Pay: $600–$800/month

Compensation paid via Wise at an agreed upon interval



Why Work With Hone Coach

We help home service business owners stop working 70-hour weeks and start running businesses that support their lives. We're a lean, focused team. We value quality work, clear communication, and people who take ownership of their craft.

This role requires attention to detail. To be considered, you must include the word "cheese" in your subject line when you apply. If it's not there, we'll assume you didn't read this far and will not review your application.



How to Apply

Complete both steps to be considered:



Portfolio — Send links to 2–3 short-form videos you've edited. No portfolio = no consideration.



Loom Video (3 minutes or less) — Record a short video covering:

-Who you are and where you're based

-Why you'd be a strong fit for this role

-A brief walkthrough of a past edit (show your process, not just the final result)

-Title your Loom: Hone_VideoEditor_[Your Name]



Submit your Loom link and portfolio by replying to this post.



Next Steps

Applicants who follow the instructions above will move to a short skills assignment, followed by a 30-minute interview.

title: Senior Operations & Finance Analyst (Google Sheets & Xero)
description:
Location: Remote – Philippines

Employment Type: Full-time

Reporting to: Operations / Finance Leadership

Type of Employment: Assume full time, BUT we will consider flexibility if the role can be covered in 20-30 hrs per week. 



About WCJ: 



We are a growing, operations-led service business based in London UK.  We have a core office team of 8, including 2 valuable members in the Philippines.  As part of our growth strategy this year, we are building better data accuracy, and focusing on key metrics. We've always had stronger financial controls, but would like to support the person covering our financial controller role. 



Our core values are non-negotiable:



Trust & Respect – for our people, our clients, and our environment



Low Hassle – simple, efficient solutions over complexity



Ownership – we take responsibility and follow issues through



Problem Solving – we solve problems and own both success and failure



Kindness – results matter, but people matter too



We are building long-term systems and a long-term team.



Role Overview



This is a critical analytical and control role responsible for the daily integrity of our operational and financial data. You will ensure that three core systems are fully reconciled on a daily basis:



Daily Operations Reporting



Job Management System



Xero Accounting Software



You will own the master operational spreadsheet, ensure all inputs and outputs are correct, and provide accurate, timely metrics to senior management. This role requires strong analytical thinking, excellent spreadsheet engineering skills, and confidence working with accounting data.



Key Responsibilities



Own daily reconciliation between operational reports, job system data, and Xero



Design, maintain, and optimise advanced Google Sheets (array formulas, QUERY, nested logic, error handling, dashboards)



Ensure revenue, costs, invoices, and operational volumes align across all systems



Identify discrepancies, investigate root causes, and resolve or escalate appropriately



Support accounts receivable and credit control, including invoice tracking and exception reporting



Assist with Xero reconciliations and data integrity checks



Produce daily, weekly, and monthly management metrics and performance reports



Improve data workflows, controls, and reporting processes over time



Act as a trusted data and reporting partner to operations and finance leadership



Technical Requirements



Essential:



Advanced Google Sheets expertise, including complex formulas, data validation, reconciliation logic, and structured reporting



Proven experience using Xero accounting software in a professional environment



Strong understanding of operational finance, reconciliations, and revenue tracking



High attention to detail with the ability to work accurately at speed



Experience reconciling data across multiple systems



Strong written English and clear documentation skills



Highly Desirable:



Experience building dashboards or KPI reporting for management



Background in finance operations, business analysis, or accounting support



Experience with job management or service-based businesses



Process improvement mindset with automation experience (where appropriate)



What Success Looks Like:



Daily reports are accurate, reconciled, and trusted by management



Discrepancies are identified early and resolved quickly



The master spreadsheet is clean, structured, and scalable



Leadership has clear visibility of performance through reliable metrics



Systems and processes improve continuously as the business grows



What We Offer:



Fully remote, long-term role



High level of ownership and autonomy



A values-driven business that balances performance with kindness



Opportunity to grow into a senior operations, finance, or systems role over time



Stability, trust, and clear expectations



How to Apply:



Please apply via OnlineJobs.ph and include:



A summary of your experience with Google Sheets and Xero



Examples of complex reconciliation or reporting work you’ve owned



Any experience improving or automating reporting processes



We’re looking for someone who takes pride in accuracy, ownership, and building systems that scale. Whilst we currently expect this role to be full time, we would consider some flexibility / part time (but we do need consistent hours and more than 20 hrs per week ideally)

title: Paralegal
description:
Judgment Business Incubator · Full-Time



Paralegal — Judgment Collections

About us

We're Judgment Business Incubator (JBI) — a New York company that helps people start and run their own judgment enforcement businesses. We've been doing this for over 10 years and we're really good at it.



What we're looking for

We're looking for a paralegal who knows New York judgment collections inside and out and can hit the ground running. Here's what matters to us:



1 You understand NY judgment collections

Restraining notices, information subpoenas, income executions, docketing — you know the process and don't need it explained to you.



2  You're extremely organized

Multiple cases, multiple deadlines, lots of moving parts — nothing falls through the cracks on your watch.



3.  You can handle discovery and research

Reviewing subpoena responses, digging through bank records, tracking down assets — you're comfortable doing the investigative work a collections case requires.



4. You're great with people

You'll be working with our clients and team every day. Being friendly, clear, and easy to talk to goes a long way here.



5. Strong administrative skills

Drafting correspondence, managing files, staying on top of follow-ups — the behind-the-scenes work that keeps everything running smoothly.



Interested?

Please

title: Senior Meta Ads Media Buyer (Life Insurance Lead Generation)
description:
We are a U.S.-based life insurance lead generation company looking for a highly experienced Meta 
/Instagram) Ads Media Buyer to manage and scale paid campaigns.



This role is focused specifically on lead generation for final expense, mortgage protection, and life insurance products. You will be responsible for building, optimizing, and scaling campaigns that produce consistent, compliant, high-quality leads.



Responsibilities:

 • Launch, manage, and optimize Meta ad campaigns for lead generation

 • Build campaign structures (CBO/ABO), ad sets, and creative testing frameworks

 • Monitor CPL, conversion rates, and lead quality

 • Scale winning campaigns while maintaining performance

 • Work with funnels, landing pages, and CRM integrations (GoHighLevel preferred)

 • Ensure ads meet Meta and financial/insurance compliance standards

 • Provide weekly performance updates and recommendations



Requirements:

 • 5+ years running Meta ads

 • Strong English communication (written + verbal)

 • Proven experience in lead generation (insurance preferred)

 • Ability to manage multiple campaigns and budgets simultaneously

 • Strong understanding of tracking, pixels, and performance optimization

 • Experience working with U.S. markets

 • Self-starter, detail-oriented, and performance-driven



We are looking for someone highly skilled, well-trained, and focused on results — not beginners.

title: Female Appointment Setter (Multiple Clients)
description:
SSP Marketing is looking for a Female Appointment Setter to join our growing remote team. You’ll be responsible for scheduling and managing in-person appointments for our clients in the home service industry — all while working from home.



This is a full-time role ideal for someone who is organized, dependable, and an excellent communicator. If you enjoy coordinating schedules, speaking with customers, and helping businesses run efficiently, this position is for you!



Key Responsibilities



-Schedule and manage in-person appointments for multiple clients



-Conduct outbound calls and messages to potential customers to set appointments



-Consider travel time and routes to ensure efficient daily scheduling



-Record and update appointment details accurately in GoHighLevel (HighLevel) CRM



-Maintain strong communication with clients and the internal team



-Suggest ways to improve scheduling processes and client satisfaction





Requirements



-Proven experience in appointment setting (preferably for in-person services)



-Knowledge of travel time and route optimization



-Excellent English communication skills — both written and verbal



-Highly organized and detail-oriented; able to manage multiple accounts



-Familiarity with HighLevel CRM or similar scheduling software



-Reliable internet connection and quiet home workspace



-Positive, professional, and proactive attitude







Why Join SSP Marketing



At SSP Marketing, we help local businesses grow by managing their appointment scheduling and customer communication. You’ll join a supportive, remote team that values consistency, teamwork, and quality work.



We provide paid training to help you succeed in this role. Pay adjustments may be considered after training based on performance and company needs.



How to Apply



Interested applicants may apply through this link:

title: Salesforce Support Specialist
description:
Position Summary:

We are looking for a Salesforce support resource to handle routine day-to-day Salesforce admin and user support work.

This role is intended to offload basic Salesforce tasks from internal senior technical resources.

The focus is on support, access, reports, and user administration, not architecture or development.





Core Responsibilities:

-Handle Salesforce support tickets and user requests.

-Create, deactivate, and maintain user accounts.

-Assign permission sets and troubleshoot basic access issues.

-Fix basic report and dashboard issues.

-Support users with navigation, record access, list views, and common usage questions.

-Assist with light data cleanup and basic record maintenance.

-Document recurring issues and resolutions.

-Escalate complex issues involving flows, integrations, code, architecture, or advanced security design.



Required Qualifications:

-Experience supporting users in Salesforce in an admin or support capacity.

-Working knowledge of users, profiles, roles, permission sets, and access management.

-Ability to troubleshoot common Salesforce issues independently.

-Experience with reports and dashboards.

-Strong written communication and ticket follow-through.

-Organized, responsive, and detail-oriented.



Preferred Qualifications:

-Salesforce Administrator certification preferred but not required.

-Experience with healthcare or other operational service businesses is a plus.

-Experience with managed packages is a plus.

-Comfort working in a HIPAA-sensitive environment is a plus.
